Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Hill Country nonprofit pledges $40 million to help rebuild flood victims’ homes,” Texas Tribune'sColleen DeGuzman \-- "A Hill Country nonprofit announced Thursday that it’s pledging $40 million to help rebuild homes in Kerr County, the grief-stricken community hit the hardest by the July 4 weekend flash floods that devastated neighborhoods, summer camps and RV parks. The Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country has pledged the amount as the first step to its four-pronged recovery plan: rebuilding homes, supporting mental health, economic recovery, and reviving the area’s quality of life. » Community Foundation CEO Austin Dickson said the organization is starting with housing efforts “because rebuilding a safe, stable place to call home is at the heart of recovery .... This is more than bricks and lumber. “Whether it's a rebuilt house, a repaired RV or a safe temporary apartment, this fund will help families get home,” he later added. » Dickson spoke alongside Gov. Greg Abbott and Hill Country leaders from a park in Kerrville — most of the 137 Central Texas flood victims died in Kerr County. The park is about a 30-minute drive from Camp Mystic, where 27 campers and counselors died in the flood that struck in the early morning hours on July 4. Tightening camp safety and securing relief funding are among the highest priorities of state lawmakers this special legislative session, Abbott said. In Austin, the Texas House on Thursday passed six bills related to flood and disaster relief, including to set aside hundreds of millions of state dollars to fund recovery efforts. While lawmakers are discussing flood relief and response at a statewide level, Dickson said local leaders are doing what they can to jump start the recovery process. The Community Foundation on Thursday also announced that it has created a local advisory council made up of community members who will “guide funding decisions.” It didn’t release the names of the members Thursday. Hunt ISD Superintendent Luci Harmon said rebuilding homes will help students, whose first day of the school year was Wednesday, get back to some sense of normalcy. “Our students thrive when their housing situation is under control — when they're in their homes and their homes are stable,” she said. The Community Foundation has also allocated $1.6 million to covering short-term housing for flood victims through AirBnB’s nonprofit, , so families have a place to stay while their houses get rebuilt." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. | | |
---
Sean Hannity here, listen up. If you don't understand how this works, your retirement savings may be at more risk than it needs to be. ---
* 2 million+ jobs on the line...
* Stocks poised for a 25% nose-dive...
* IRAs and 401(k)s vulnerable to 25% losses, or worse.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s bleak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvrg9pl65ec3tbchv3csheti0d7nrbmo9ia9rml8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o77cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zisvf7c5sd6pqv1pcpgvod1061n97p0crchf1j48_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o77cdh2bs)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqcpqeqas7krsq2fqep0h9g1a8kr18v8ckm3f70_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o77cdh2bs)

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: The Supreme Court will hear their case. Will you help protectwomen’s sports?
body:
This term, the U.S. Supreme Court will hear two cases that could forever shape the future of women’s sports in America.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0me0f1tqlcntk4p7gdepul36s4n4pg39c86lj2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o76cth2bs)

## ****
Dear Defender of Truth, This term, the U.S. Supreme Court will hear two cases that could forever shape the future of women's sports in America.

At the center of one case stands Lainey Armistead--a former West Virginia college soccer player. For Lainey, soccer was more than a game. It was her life's passion.

But that passion--and the right to fair competition--is under attack. Like so many other female athletes, Lainey sees the threat of being forced to compete against male athletes.

She decided to take a stand.

And now, _State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ will give the Court a chance to weigh in on whether states can protect fairness and safety for female athletes--or if radical gender ideology will continue to ignore biological reality.

These are the **first-ever Supreme Court cases to directly challenge gender ideology 's impact on women's sports.
**
Will you stand with Lainey--and thousands of other female athletes--and make a gift today to support critical legal efforts like this one?

[👉 Make your gift now to protect women's sports »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zph6gkpnj5c30fe3lgue6map3oq1377sjicp2osg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o76cth2bs)

Your gift today helps:
* Defend laws passed in 27 states that protect fairness in women's sports
* Stand with courageous athletes like Lainey who are fighting for the integrity of their sport
* Push back against dangerous policies that ignore biological differences and put women at risk

Alliance Defending Freedom never charges a dime to defend clients like Lainey in court. But standing up to powerful ideologies in the nation's highest court takes significant resources.

We've won 16 Supreme Court cases since 2011--and we're winning nearly 80% of our cases overall. But we can't do it without your help.

[Please make your gift today to support this work](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziepiapffhsn067jemul9fd7nt3mqv44umi1evf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o76cth2bs)--so every girl has a fair chance to compete.

Thank you for standing up for truth--and for the next generation of female athletes.

With gratitude, **Suzanne** **Beecher**
Legal Counsel

P.S. A victory at the Supreme Court could set a national precedent that restores fairness to women's sports--and stops gender ideology from doing further harm. [Please give today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6dgio02vavioenm3ha18g1obpqiqeiegnb9h3ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3im6o76cth2bs)

But that passion--and the right to fair competition--is under attack. Like so many other female athletes, Lainey sees the threat of being forced to compete against male athletes. She decided to take a stand. And now, State of West Virginia v. B.P.J. and Little v. Hecox will give the Court a chance to weigh in on whether states can protect fairness and safety for female athletes--or if radical gender ideology will continue to ignore biological reality. These are the first-ever Supreme Court cases to directly challenge gender ideology 's impact on women's sports. Will you stand with Lainey--and thousands of other female athletes--and make a gift today to support critical legal efforts like this one? Your gift today helps: Defend laws passed in 27 states that protect fairness in women's sports Stand with courageous athletes like Lainey who are fighting for the integrity of their sport Push back against dangerous policies that ignore biological differences and put women at risk Alliance Defending Freedom never charges a dime to defend clients like Lainey in court. But standing up to powerful ideologies in the nation's highest court takes significant resources. We've won 16 Supreme Court cases since 2011--and we're winning nearly 80% of our cases overall. But we can't do it without your help. every girl has a fair chance to compete. Thank you for standing up for truth--and for the next generation of female athletes. With gratitude, Suzanne Beecher Legal Counsel P.S. A victory at the Supreme Court could set a national precedent that restores fairness to women's sports--and stops gender ideology from doing further harm. Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziednvs4e95l2l6n89t1631nvqa0l41db7pk7270_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3imepr1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf3b3llitspkcv5e2ok5ff51tqrcploov59hlci0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3imepr1c1h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7qh1pdu9fcka1pg74uragui5d0hub7aknqd7uh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3imepr1c1h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z04ukd33dkf0t017rfuclcnsd7vl9j086buje9v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3imepr1c1h2bs)
---
| |
---

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Hey can we talk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I was going through some of the things you said, and... wow...

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdlo2ka6tdsu6jlvl525m7g4tvj9a92rflmjfldg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3hm8pj2cph2bs)
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z09evnpj92vr5q9t3rb0kjncc7isidr4co52g5p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3hm8pj2cph2bs)

Hey Friend,
Sometimes, after the day is done, I like to go through the replies that people leave on these messages, just to read what my supporters have to say.

A lot of them are very kind, and some are incredibly nasty, but then I came across yours.
I mean... _**wow**_.
It’s incredible how much you and I think alike.
It’s messages like yours that make me remember what it’s all for – that keep me grounded.
You, my friend, give me _**hope**_.

So I just wanted to say thank you. You’ve been with me through it all – stood with me through thick and thin.

Please, could you confirm for me, so we can stay in touch?

[STAY IN TOUCH WITH ME](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zac7an8829iaukvcn5o25tka9pseq09c425adne0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3hm8pj2cph2bs)

God bless,
**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

clean_body: I was going through some of the things you said, and... wow... | | | | Hey Friend, Sometimes, after the day is done, I like to go through the replies that people leave on these messages, just to read what my supporters have to say. A lot of them are very kind, and some are incredibly nasty, but then I came across yours. I mean... wow. It’s incredible how much you and I think alike. It’s messages like yours that make me remember what it’s all for – that keep me grounded. You, my friend, give me hope. So I just wanted to say thank you. You’ve been with me through it all – stood with me through thick and thin. Please, could you confirm for me, so we can stay in touch? God bless, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna American First. Always. | PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Elon Musk Warns of America’s $36 Trillion Dollar Debt Bomb
# The system is crumbling, protect your wealth or suffer the fallout.
---
Elon Musk has avoided two major financial crises before. He pulled Tesla and SpaceX back from the brink of collapse and built two of the most valuable companies in history.

Now, he’s sounding the alarm about America’s $36 trillion debt time bomb that could destroy the fabric of our society.

While head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) under President Trump, Musk exposed just how bad things are:

✅ Runaway government spending has pushed national debt to unsustainable levels
✅ The Federal Reserve’s rate hikes are squeezing the economy, making inflation irreversible
✅ The stock market is on shaky ground, putting traditional 401(k)s, IRAs, and TSPs at risk

With Trump back in charge, major spending cuts are coming. While necessary, these cuts may send shockwaves through Wall Street, creating unpredictable market turbulence.

That’s why financial elites aren’t waiting to react, they're moving their wealth now.

Here's a way to keep yourself protected and illuminate your path on night walks.

We made a stun tool that harnesses the absolute maximum voltage we were allowed to put into one civilian-approved product.

Introducing the 250 MILLION VOLT Stun Baton and Flashlight, we call it [**THE MUTILATOR**](https://app.zerolethal.com/campaigns/ng899pm0qxe2d/track-url/yc932vafx3f7c/99eb4b67a669192ca44be7939e9dc289ec801dea).

**We certainly hope you never encounter a situation where you will need to use this on another person...

...although if you're on a night walk, and you sense a threat coming in the distance, let the thunderous CRACK of The Mutilator send a message for those within ear shot to be very cautious when approaching. **

This is not a toy, or a gimmicky product that will only produce a sound of 250 million volts, IT IS A **[ELECTROCUTION SELF-DEFENSE WEAPON](https://app.zerolethal.com/campaigns/ng899pm0qxe2d/track-url/yc932vafx3f7c/99eb4b67a669192ca44be7939e9dc289ec801dea)** and will absolutely take an attacker down.

We can probably both agree you'll want to carry your concealed firearm for ultimate protection, but most of us aren't going to walk around the neighborhood holding your firearm open carry every single time you leave the house to walk the dog (even if your state permits).

Carrying the mutilator, acts as a, essential high-lumen flashlight, but has that next level of convenient electrocution threat defense at a moment's notice.

Today we are are running a special discount that comes with an industry leading lifetime warranty.

Not much to lose, but 250M volts of defense to gain with this one.

**[Check Out THE MUTILATOR HERE.](https://app.zerolethal.com/campaigns/ng899pm0qxe2d/track-url/yc932vafx3f7c/99eb4b67a669192ca44be7939e9dc289ec801dea)**

We made a stun tool that harnesses the absolute maximum voltage we were allowed to put into one civilian-approved product. Introducing the 250 MILLION VOLT Stun Baton and Flashlight, we call it . We certainly hope you never encounter a situation where you will need to use this on another person... ...although if you're on a night walk, and you sense a threat coming in the distance, let the thunderous CRACK of The Mutilator send a message for those within ear shot to be very cautious when approaching. This is not a toy, or a gimmicky product that will only produce a sound of 250 million volts, IT IS A and will absolutely take an attacker down. We can probably both agree you'll want to carry your concealed firearm for ultimate protection, but most of us aren't going to walk around the neighborhood holding your firearm open carry every single time you leave the house to walk the dog (even if your state permits). Carrying the mutilator, acts as a, essential high-lumen flashlight, but has that next level of convenient electrocution threat defense at a moment's notice. Today we are are running a special discount that comes with an industry leading lifetime warranty. Not much to lose, but 250M volts of defense to gain with this one. ~Zero Lethal | Zero Lethal is a proud community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can here at any time. | | |

# Friday, August 22, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1851, the U.S. schooner _America_ beat Britain in a race around the Isle of Wight, claiming a silver trophy later gifted to the New York Yacht Club for perpetual international competition. That prize, the "[America’s Cup](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUxvGnwQ4DRxmxoNjGbrbd0iAcxrOLYgDH-PabublvcOtf8n3J_89zflqKtL9-2w1NDWne8SoRa8U813xuR6AdfU7Hgd5l6_5hXuwMAhQXmgPM3lK8577xJiACdg0aOSil1SCVaFajvJdLUNqNcuh6341SevcYhBv7cXjYpSHzWRMaQAqh-rH1o1s6p3WQGrtBBNYL9FRTbv8m2uuKId7pjbl1aWuiWWs9Cut-MZgYTNd1tSuVmvL9cQZTXalwb29OO_8WBpM9X2epHIDBdPLCL9oLD5RL5XbDTM4W7s6jycYfF8VI5TGwXrw2S_HruP6o1tvA_wAAAP__g8N_tA)," is now the world’s oldest continuously contested sporting trophy. We always suspected it, and now neuroscience confirms it: [our best ideas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO4yAURldjd0SYhx8FxTTuMu2UFoZLfCcYLLhOxrsfJVv46-_T0dH5c1_uFiOmx2-7g6GQlwTvGoEIykLl3I-ACXzJxwHeFeueUFa7CC404yMTYvEW47Wo1psAIEC2YLpB61EPnebtZoTu5TBMfpRKQj-oHnoIq5dBK-UnvbZoPjQ-CtFxrtV085NbpRvH0I0gBx4axcEj5XL7mzHRBiFe-QXl5vLeRrMRHbWRvxoxN2ImcFvAf5bAf_ZGzAnOkqtDSISVKqv2YitgejCXUyWbKF5sPevFCvjTQWVXPguzK0aki1FmtGF6sgPKbhN877oRc1uMP94YI9Z-aBR_7Bbj14l-FPJlxP8AAAD__6CDi2A) don’t strike when we’re grinding through tasks, but when we finally let our minds wander. Read more in _Science_. In today’s _Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown talks about the return of Trader Joe’s viral mini tote bags. Once resold for thousands online and now a hipster accessory in London, the $2.99 carriers are making a fall comeback. Watch on [YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu8yAUBeCnMZutyzXYeGD4l2z5p0oZEYZLTIuNRUisvH3l9hG6nqPzDed2NVcbU9zu_-1KuoZsNjoeiWqlYmp5rnuIG_mS9528K9Z9UZmtQUDZgmoRjbcxvY1gXgcipJ6R5qOUSo5cAlu0whC4s2pQCFMQw6xA2iCmqedOqnlgUZ8aKEQOIMXU-cnNvVMqcEX9CKERQD7WXLrPHLe6UEjv_KLSubyypJda90fT_2vw0uDlOI7unZ_1OdPZn6GAm61uaT8Wai-_U1a034-YUnwMYyPgvtqYfrz6pxNeGr8DAAD__-A-cF8) for details. Protect your privacy online from threats of AI and other online scammers from today's sponsor, [Incogni](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQxvHT4C4WHgwmBcWTntxl2y0RhiGZXQwWJoly-5WjvcGWvylGf32fF3txlChfP9yKpsViMz73hK1hta3e1y1SxlDLtmHw1flvrIuzwEGeuD4B2OAovezYBRMRAUWHZpik1HIaJO9uZsLohYqLVAADwgKCa1BBSwVhWVzsyBzfuAYYOJfjuQ9nvwivdRw0iolHNnIM1ErtvwrldsOYXuWBtfdl7ZK5tbbtTPxjMDOYA7rUU_blmqmnwmB2MVrPxFxixGopMPFfMVDH-Y1BTIfvNf2agdrLvXo8kF2jkl06-rpqwvaklGhXExv5dXWU3hXtT9M9DPwEAAD__0evgG8).

## Trump Fraud Fine Overturned
A New York state appeals court on Thursday [tossed out a $500 million civil fraud penalty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd0QYg40Lim3cZdstrRd4xOxgg-A5Uf5-lMwnTH1179U5_67rFWKKx_0v7Ggp5PXAZ0tIhHWleu4lxAN9zaWgdxXcF9YbrFJIzYXhUq4eYnqtqvM2IEocOrT9pLXRU69Ft9kRRq9A6eDmMQjt0BhvzOyD7wetYO6ifa8JI2UvhFbzxc_uNjhjQm9wmERgSqCPlOvlf44HbRjSKz-wXlzeu2Q3otLY8IfJhcmFNtxiSu-MyaXi_UxAMR9MLi6flfgNiBI2JhetxkHPM_9g8lDh9NxBQw6lIKTGfwqUW8PGCx6Q6MXk0lXryzOmFNs4MSXuO8TPYUe_Mviw8jsAAP__C9mHBA) against President Donald Trump, ruling it violated the Constitution’s ban on excessive fines. The court upheld the underlying judgment that Trump and his company overstated asset values to secure favorable loans and insurance, but said the state failed to justify the massive financial penalty. Sanctions limiting Trump and his top executives’ [ability to run New York businesses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd7bg2sRQUGzjLttuaeHLJWaDDcIkVv7-yfmF14000hnN-Xef7zbEsD_-2o1M9Wne6Twi1UplruW1ZR92ciXlTA6LxSeVxc7AQbZctQCzsyF-5qFxxhMB9Q0ZMUqp5Cgkb1ajtQJhb4jIF42kNfaoRi09oYBeLE0wF40rAMG5HHTnNC49KuWFon7kng2cXKipdP9T2OtKPn7Sm0qHaWuiWWvNB-v_MJgYTOd5drgveJUMpgvNYOLqyoLB9P3U-mJfrt3pbD-pPFubM9l4dGvdYlOMy2eIMRy3kQ38sdkQv1P1V37eBn4CAAD__8IeeNI) remain in effect. Attorney General Letitia James said she plans to appeal the decision to the state’s highest court.
## Illegal Immigrant Numbers Fall by 1.5 Million
The U.S. illegal immigrant population [dropped by 1.5 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ8GulkZgxdv4SIN3U2bEhk8Xibxn-zZu9q3jyCPkO5IM_qOvvPra_2yFCg9f9qIhn1eE75bQGasK9dXLJ4SuppLQbdXu__ButlVCqlAaJBydZbCZ516ZzyixLFHM8xKaTUPSvSHmUb_UF7OSs3jfN-sm-00ie2xC63ddh97MidNaCkHIdT0uLnHvo271n7QOM7Cd5NAR5zr7XemxAf68MnfWG97jn0wB3Np3fijk0snl_QpufF56uRygju5CH3moZPLq8Hp9y9RjPSsNjGUXF7BMuUEp2oDnyvwgeCpNgamiEAJlIAP2trANri2gYY2tOtzy9VhBZsclFc7sEG0rYHDkitf6LO1r8aVN4VA7T53k3hGS-Hy4P8a_9vIvwEAAP__mg-asw) in the first half of 2025, marking the first decline in five decades. Pew Research estimates the illegal immigrant population reached a [record 14 million in 2023](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u1DAQhZ_G6byyxzHrFC4WoTTo0iABXeS1J7sD_pPj3Gh5ehRe4XYzOjqfdL6fb8ubo0j58c0ltH0tS8Zji9g7tqW3PdWVMoZWasXgm_N_sN3dAgI0F4YDLMFRfC3jEOyKCKgGtPKqtdFXqcXwtEaBnHBUoEEqqYyZ1D1o8JNYhXBKD2RPmjAAUgg9Tpcw-bvyxqzSoLqKlY0CA_XSLr8L5f7ENb7KO7aLL2mI9tl73Zi6MZgZzMdxXNKWz4zBjJnvG4O5lkid_Hk-zmpOmDuDec-h-P18MHBKiR7N5c5rqXt0nUrmT-q8oS8tcDkmTpmDAMUrHtxlF18bnVDX-O0mv_6iv9-ZmounwNSXz6dWPLYf2OrQbKgHxUjbpysbxSM5iv8H9A9Zf7fwLwAA__9mi5eg), fueled by migrants arriving from outside Mexico and record parole releases under former President Biden. Homeland Security says 1.6 million have voluntarily left since January, and ICE has deported more than 330,000 in 200 days. The Trump administration has set a target of one million deportations per year. [See full report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnjAQhJ_GdEZmgQMKijR0lzYl2t9ewybGthZz6M_TR-QVrhvNSDOj79fn-okcOG4_8aC5-LRGus9ApZCsRa4je47kJOVMzgraPyQvXMFAr82oAVaHHN5rV7nZEwG1Fc3N0PdjPzS9qfb5BZPx7dR0frTGYU-ux2my5B1O3eA-Kp6fNjMCNMb03VS7yb5aO46-GakdjFedIcclSf07cSw7-fBOXyS1TUcV5r2UfKr2h4JFwXLfd53pFjoJxe51kk3BImhJY3Sayh7ZcnkrWJ5ZBYsZH90oWC596iviVfYk_Jec5uPgTTAWnVO-AhZOUQuh3clp1EI2idNNpw8O4ck4ajDQKlgqmV2-H_v8GFRntgM5_H9cvoX5a4Z_AQAA__-8opJM).
## Evangelist James Dobson Dead at 89
Dr. James Dobson, founder of Focus on the Family and one of the [most influential evangelical leaders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3rDwswl4YOjiLV07Wpj3SEgxWIDj5u-r9Bc6X-nqnPN1Xa7GBx9vn2YjXV1aIp0lUK2Ul5qPbXc-Eua074Q2G_tNeTULcBCMKwawoPHhtYwtakcENLSkeymEErIXvL1raUgO42jFiI7by9ojDJOUYNwEZiDVev1-4wqg51yMU4eTXQerlOsVDZK7ZuSEvqbcPZKP9U4uvNKTcmfT1gZ9r3UvzfDRwNzAfJ5n59LP2-K9NzAfpYEZM3uYjQrDtJYUmUv2KMyZzYcXc-mISJkZfPqSMhNsz1Q8UqyFIRlkamqzxv30Ifhykc3Ib5vx4Y-g_ivbU8NvAAAA__92jYOA) of the past 50 years, died Thursday at age 89. A psychologist and prolific author, Dobson built Focus into a global Christian media powerhouse and later launched the Dr. James Dobson Family Institute.

At its peak under Dobson’s leadership, the _Focus on the Family_ daily radio program was carried on more than 4,000 stations across North America. The broadcasts were also translated into 27 languages and distributed in over 160 countries. He advised [five U.S. presidents](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S3CAQhU-DMqZQA4IJCJyQrVOHKgaaHdYIVIBWpdu75Cts1B28-t7Pn4_1w6Wcyudvt6EZsa4Fz55xDGzraMe2x1QwtLrvGHxz_i-2l1uBgaRMU4A1uJSvVUzBRERAPqGZlZRaqlmy6W2YE455xwUuT2R8UYJDFH4R_KlU9K8pmZvGNMDMmBTPR3j6F_dax1kjVywSwTCkUdvjq6Yy3hjzVb-xPXzdpmzeY-yd8F8ELAF7nufj6G7U4K5bQMD2UdtFwN7N7uNGqoWAvW0JWKbvfyZgv9yGnYb66rXQWP3RaS10vJFGt6V80ViPErDRkPAmaankAlwzpgjYqZmwnynn1BdFBPvcXMr_M44fDftt4F8AAAD__8cEimM) and became a key figure in conservative politics, championing traditional family values and opposing abortion and same-sex marriage. He is survived by his wife, Shirley, their two children, and two grandchildren.

On this day in 1851, the U.S. schooner America beat Britain in a race around the Isle of Wight, claiming a silver trophy later gifted to the New York Yacht Club for perpetual international competition. That prize, the "," is now the world’s oldest continuously contested sporting trophy. We always suspected it, and now neuroscience confirms it: don’t strike when we’re grinding through tasks, but when we finally let our minds wander. Read more in Science. Protect your privacy online from threats of AI and other online scammers from today's sponsor, . | Trump Fraud Fine Overturned A New York state appeals court on Thursday against President Donald Trump, ruling it violated the Constitution’s ban on excessive fines. The court upheld the underlying judgment that Trump and his company overstated asset values to secure favorable loans and insurance, but said the state failed to justify the massive financial penalty. Sanctions limiting Trump and his top executives’ remain in effect. Attorney General Letitia James said she plans to appeal the decision to the state’s highest court. Illegal Immigrant Numbers Fall by 1.5 Million The U.S. illegal immigrant population in the first half of 2025, marking the first decline in five decades. Pew Research estimates the illegal immigrant population reached a , fueled by migrants arriving from outside Mexico and record parole releases under former President Biden. Homeland Security says 1.6 million have voluntarily left since January, and ICE has deported more than 330,000 in 200 days. The Trump administration has set a target of one million deportations per year. . Evangelist James Dobson Dead at 89 Dr. James Dobson, founder of Focus on the Family and one of the of the past 50 years, died Thursday at age 89. A psychologist and prolific author, Dobson built Focus into a global Christian media powerhouse and later launched the Dr. James Dobson Family Institute. At its peak under Dobson’s leadership, the Focus on the Family daily radio program was carried on more than 4,000 stations across North America. The broadcasts were also translated into 27 languages and distributed in over 160 countries. He advised and became a key figure in conservative politics, championing traditional family values and opposing abortion and same-sex marriage. He is survived by his wife, Shirley, their two children, and two grandchildren. name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
I presided over my first NEGOP State Central Committee meeting this past Saturday. I will admit, I had some trepidation because my parliamentary skills are rudimentary at best, but I forged ahead knowing I had help close by if I got lost. The meeting opened with an uplifting and thoughtful invocation by Pastor John Schnell, Chairman of the Saunders County GOP. The tone he set was perfect: scripture after scripture about God's love for peace and His hatred of strife. I wish every Republican across the state could have heard it. God's Word is powerful.
Our guest speaker was former Attorney General and Treasurer, the Honorable Don Stenberg, whose knowledge of Nebraska politics and history is unmatched. He spoke about the many eras of Nebraska politics and the ups and downs that accompanied each. In that historical perspective, our current disagreements felt less daunting and more manageable with patience and time. Again, I wish everyone could have heard his message of hope and perseverance.
My primary goal for the meeting was to move toward a fairer, more neutral endorsement policy that prevents the NEGOP from making Republican primary endorsements. While some tweaks were made, the essence of the policy remained intact and passed easily. This endorsement policy had long been the main obstacle to reconciliation among the many factions within the NEGOP, and I was greatly relieved that this sticking point will no longer be a thorn in our side. Finally, for the first time in recent memory, the SCC meeting adjourned 30 minutes ahead of schedule instead of one or two hours late. From my position on the dais, it felt like a small but unexpected miracle. Then again, the whole day felt a bit miraculous.

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
---
| |
---
---
| |
# What's Happening...
---
Communications Report
Since April, we've seen some really exciting growth across NEGOP communications. By focusing on consistent, timely messaging, we've been able to expand our reach, boost engagement, and keep our voice strong both online and in the press. The results show that our strategy is working.
Highlights from April-August 2025:
* Facebook: Reached 128,100 people (up 32.3%) and generated 387,800 views (up 28.6%). Interactions also grew to 11,000.
* Instagram: Launched in May and already showing traction with 3,200 reach and 309 interactions in just three months.
* X (Twitter): The biggest jump- impressions up 73% to 136,700, engagements up 94% to 7,100, and reply activity up 171%.
* Email: A huge turnaround. Open rates climbed from 6% to 31% after moving to Constant Contact, with July newsletters topping 40%. We sent 131,727 emails total with a 99% delivery rate.
* Press: Released 11 statements (compared to only 3 in the prior period), with several earning over 20,000 views and strong engagement.
* Earned Media: More than 15 placements since April, showing clear momentum in interviews, news coverage, and mentions that extend our reach beyond our own platforms.

Looking ahead, we're ready to take the next step by weaving more fundraising into everything we do: social media, email, events, and beyond. We'll keep building partnerships with the RNC, the Leadership Institute, and regional coalitions, and we'll continue amplifying the voices of our elected officials. The progress over these past few months is just the beginning. By turning this momentum into action, we're laying the foundation for Republican victories across the state.
Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party communications@gopne.org

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair I presided over my first NEGOP State Central Committee meeting this past Saturday. I will admit, I had some trepidation because my parliamentary skills are rudimentary at best, but I forged ahead knowing I had help close by if I got lost. The meeting opened with an uplifting and thoughtful invocation by Pastor John Schnell, Chairman of the Saunders County GOP. The tone he set was perfect: scripture after scripture about God's love for peace and His hatred of strife. I wish every Republican across the state could have heard it. God's Word is powerful. Our guest speaker was former Attorney General and Treasurer, the Honorable Don Stenberg, whose knowledge of Nebraska politics and history is unmatched. He spoke about the many eras of Nebraska politics and the ups and downs that accompanied each. In that historical perspective, our current disagreements felt less daunting and more manageable with patience and time. Again, I wish everyone could have heard his message of hope and perseverance. My primary goal for the meeting was to move toward a fairer, more neutral endorsement policy that prevents the NEGOP from making Republican primary endorsements. While some tweaks were made, the essence of the policy remained intact and passed easily. This endorsement policy had long been the main obstacle to reconciliation among the many factions within the NEGOP, and I was greatly relieved that this sticking point will no longer be a thorn in our side. Finally, for the first time in recent memory, the SCC meeting adjourned 30 minutes ahead of schedule instead of one or two hours late. From my position on the dais, it felt like a small but unexpected miracle. Then again, the whole day felt a bit miraculous. Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | What's Happening... Communications Report Since April, we've seen some really exciting growth across NEGOP communications. By focusing on consistent, timely messaging, we've been able to expand our reach, boost engagement, and keep our voice strong both online and in the press. The results show that our strategy is working. Highlights from April-August 2025: Facebook: Reached 128,100 people (up 32.3%) and generated 387,800 views (up 28.6%). Interactions also grew to 11,000. Instagram: Launched in May and already showing traction with 3,200 reach and 309 interactions in just three months. X (Twitter): The biggest jump- impressions up 73% to 136,700, engagements up 94% to 7,100, and reply activity up 171%. Email: A huge turnaround. Open rates climbed from 6% to 31% after moving to Constant Contact, with July newsletters topping 40%. We sent 131,727 emails total with a 99% delivery rate. Press: Released 11 statements (compared to only 3 in the prior period), with several earning over 20,000 views and strong engagement. Earned Media: More than 15 placements since April, showing clear momentum in interviews, news coverage, and mentions that extend our reach beyond our own platforms. Looking ahead, we're ready to take the next step by weaving more fundraising into everything we do: social media, email, events, and beyond. We'll keep building partnerships with the RNC, the Leadership Institute, and regional coalitions, and we'll continue amplifying the voices of our elected officials. The progress over these past few months is just the beginning. By turning this momentum into action, we're laying the foundation for Republican victories across the state. Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party communications@gopne.org | | | | == | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | == | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdad1e421-19c6-42e4-9b31-90278c90333c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hey Peter, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive _$5 million_ ad buy attacking me. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75caed5d-2085-4649-a24e-84554e2854e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_fr_ossoff_q32025?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf95fa9cd-9285-4101-bd46-18f9d3e36c6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02e58075-a30f-4fb5-818e-7b490b54e78a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — they lock it in for the long-term. With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone. [So please, split a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefb37124-7448-44f8-9a98-a6232e6c7718/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining. And come next November, we will raise it higher. In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption. Thank you — for everything. — Jon

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc18b0ed8-b358-423f-8834-0d975cb31dfa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
The Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country has [pledged $40 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQRp8GOiN7wPwULm5Dl9tuiYw9JqM1OLInIbz9KvsK23_6js75ui03S5GO7b_d0fA7pOXAs0Rkxrw4uz_2qzC5YHeKhIWxMIVrAQlayFEALN5SvJau9maVflI1GjVoPfayG1V9NwAtukm7VulJaTt2ehjkFNpVtYN2fVuT-ZzJEUApqdTUaB_6doJRYaedt67qJHrilBu-I-PblhCv9MLcuLTX0dyZH6Vq_1UwVzCf59mE9B7sszAdn0kF88epgnnLuAm7rolZfGPOwqXnwZcIMSUvMkbCIMLz8HRsdTb-cVKMVPqh6uS2W4q_RP5bp5eBnwAAAP__tPt-TA) to provide housing assistance to flood victims. Gov. Greg Abbott [said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMRp8GOiOS4beg2Ga6u-2WKCQOWEriUWLmXt5-xewjbG2fI53vz9f6ZShQ2n-biIv8eF4TfpeAIphXa-IrXkXIehMpEBbBIuSvVbe6h3YCrVdnKFxrV7tla92salzU2PfT0HaTqo-l69VmhhF9t6GeBjvOOJrH7AccDTq91bTcsnbSWqlWqbnpnR8es54Udr11xlZdi46EcyMHCv6Y4sPFb8yN5ViH5RB5lerxq9LPSj93fjefp2bnd6Wfd06lny8u8u-KOXEGs20sApZjPBPJBZ7P5IwQJ2APciB8LHBQCGD5TJIvMCnxmSzCrYGuhUgh3AglCJx2EMwRfGB2kDEQevBncpR2QO85S6nz4l7fN1WGseraPRoKnxD5v_nfi_4bAAD__8_uoLE) he has "never seen a community or foundation respond faster at getting the resources donated to the people who need it the most."

name: Paul Dans, Director of Project 2025
subject: I need your support to stop the Uniparty wars and swamp deals
body:
Help send a true conservative to the Senate.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Patriot, South Carolina deserves a senator who fights for _you_ \- not the D.C. swamp.
**[I’m Paul Dans, architect of Project 2025, and I’m running to unseat Lindsey Graham in the 2026 Republican primary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
For too long, Graham has betrayed our values - backing Biden’s judges, pushing endless wars, and cozying up to the establishment while South Carolina conservatives boo him at Trump rallies. It’s time for his "Sunset Boulevard".

[FIRE LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, at Project 2025, I built a blueprint to shrink government, secure our borders, and put America First.
Now, I’m bringing that fight to the U.S. Senate to deliver President Trump’s agenda and restore South Carolina’s voice. But I can’t do it alone, our grassroots campaign needs your support to take on Graham’s war chest and the D.C. insiders protecting him.

**The Problem** :Lindsey Graham’s been in Washington for 30 years, voting for Obama and Biden judges (over 200 confirmed!), cheerleading foreign wars, and failing South Carolina voters. In 2023, he was booed off the stage at a Trump rally in Pickens. He’s out of touch, and his donors are the swamp - not the people.****
****
**The Solution** :You. By donating today, you’re fueling a movement to replace Graham with a Senator who’ll fight for secure borders, lower taxes, and America First policies. Every dollar powers our team to knock doors, rally voters, and spread the word across South Carolina.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[JOIN TEAM DANS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This isn’t just about one election, it’s about taking back our party from RINOs and building a Senate that stands with President Trump.
**[In 2024, South Carolina sent a message by backing Trump overwhelmingly. Now, let’s finish the job by electing a Senator who’ll do the same.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

**_[Your support today sends a clear signal: the swamp’s days are numbered, and South Carolina’s future is bright](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

_For America_ ,

**Paul Dans** Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b17g/?__vbtrk=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

name: not good
subject: first very slowly, then all at once (dem collapse in PA)
body:
When describing what it’s like to go bankrupt Ernest Hemingway wrote that it occurs “first very slowly, then all at once.” Democrats in PA are barreling into the “all at once” phase of collapse.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ZXTefdJuHpgGP6mBs9AblRdx6LpeUIyl3pgeW2yB4ytVY5OpPSBjsN5cEDq5CnsmRPNma-usvng4lxzlRX_r37S4FQsLQ-sGRJz3Vk_kgA1TYcHOd7TVROY8h5Bz9cgu7lvFcXuxxTssSriuKloS3Y2lnzfHr1PZWzUHJtLXmhwg245hfKNVrVQOSd0s-Atdpv_cp7ZDoKVyCnNBr5j4XBvCHa4uCW5qfdgwdkW5q8=&c=7mGNdeF8ZeYRIUm5nUj28xaZqu3YOA9MowiL7I3mxSaPJk5P-V2rFA==&ch=66NXETkUsixERvNFSJNhlXtANr3wDp9NY-5hw-dh7GlyZqLYbRkp6w==)
---
| Peter,
When describing what it's like to go bankrupt, Ernest Hemingway wrote that it occurs "first very slowly, then all at once."
Throughout the summer Democrats in Pennsylvania, key swing state and backbone of Democrats' blue wall electoral strategy, have been warning anyone who will listen that we are in what Hemingway would call the "very slow" part of collapse.
Over the course of just a few months the GOP has whittled down what was once a 1,000,000 voter registration lead for PA dems to a mere 59,000 voter lead and it could be surpassed any day now.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ZXTefdJuHpgGP6mBs9AblRdx6LpeUIyl3pgeW2yB4ytVY5OpPSBjsN5cEDq5CnsmRPNma-usvng4lxzlRX_r37S4FQsLQ-sGRJz3Vk_kgA1TYcHOd7TVROY8h5Bz9cgu7lvFcXuxxTssSriuKloS3Y2lnzfHr1PZWzUHJtLXmhwg245hfKNVrVQOSd0s-Atdpv_cp7ZDoKVyCnNBr5j4T5AyR1IX5M1HkrMlSzdxjk=&c=7mGNdeF8ZeYRIUm5nUj28xaZqu3YOA9MowiL7I3mxSaPJk5P-V2rFA==&ch=66NXETkUsixERvNFSJNhlXtANr3wDp9NY-5hw-dh7GlyZqLYbRkp6w==)
---
| | | | Now, with only two months until Pennsylvania's beyond critical 2025 Supreme Court Election, a high stakes race that will determine whether or not MAGA can redraw PA's congressional map, pass an abortion ban, and carry out unrestrained voter suppression, Democrats are barreling into the "all at once" phase of collapse.
We can't afford to lose this race but every indicator and metric is telling us that this is what is about to happen:
At state and county fairs across Pennsylvania this summer there have been massive registration drives held by Republicans whereas Democrats have been nowhere to be found. People are receiving mailers and digital ads from the GOP about this race but nothing from Dems. And in the Philadelphia suburbs Republican canvassers are going door to door.
Defend our Courts, one of the only Democratic orgs engaged in the PA Supreme Court race, is scrambling to salvage this. This week we hired a field director, placed massive orders for campaign literature, and have begun the process of hiring canvassers to rapidly deploy into the field. The comeback starts now.
[Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us rapidly scale our get out the vote operations and pull Pennsylvania back from the brink?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ZXTefdJuHpgGP6mBs9AblRdx6LpeUIyl3pgeW2yB4ytVY5OpPSBjsN5cEDq5CnscwMiP9E8iWktOWXvtW5A8jL8NEvgEDvN1gZ2BMOnMEqMHESARiLVNjv8OHhAJKrQJJX_W8LLB9PxtIxPq8NpWSemC2MdbEGFXvXQY-PhY3PJIfOvAf33nC9VG2yAL9K6KJ8n3obvSWZzCV0DNti-KeuV6E17ZAlkxxNydykgOST4uWNkq8CNtg==&c=7mGNdeF8ZeYRIUm5nUj28xaZqu3YOA9MowiL7I3mxSaPJk5P-V2rFA==&ch=66NXETkUsixERvNFSJNhlXtANr3wDp9NY-5hw-dh7GlyZqLYbRkp6w==)

clean_body: When describing what it’s like to go bankrupt Ernest Hemingway wrote that it occurs “first very slowly, then all at once.” Democrats in PA are barreling into the “all at once” phase of collapse. | | | | | == | Peter, When describing what it's like to go bankrupt, Ernest Hemingway wrote that it occurs "first very slowly, then all at once." Throughout the summer Democrats in Pennsylvania, key swing state and backbone of Democrats' blue wall electoral strategy, have been warning anyone who will listen that we are in what Hemingway would call the "very slow" part of collapse. Over the course of just a few months the GOP has whittled down what was once a 1,000,000 voter registration lead for PA dems to a mere 59,000 voter lead and it could be surpassed any day now. | == | | | | Now, with only two months until Pennsylvania's beyond critical 2025 Supreme Court Election, a high stakes race that will determine whether or not MAGA can redraw PA's congressional map, pass an abortion ban, and carry out unrestrained voter suppression, Democrats are barreling into the "all at once" phase of collapse. We can't afford to lose this race but every indicator and metric is telling us that this is what is about to happen: At state and county fairs across Pennsylvania this summer there have been massive registration drives held by Republicans whereas Democrats have been nowhere to be found. People are receiving mailers and digital ads from the GOP about this race but nothing from Dems. And in the Philadelphia suburbs Republican canvassers are going door to door. Defend our Courts, one of the only Democratic orgs engaged in the PA Supreme Court race, is scrambling to salvage this. This week we hired a field director, placed massive orders for campaign literature, and have begun the process of hiring canvassers to rapidly deploy into the field. The comeback starts now. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == We need you now more than ever. Thank you in advance for your support. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Shinji Oh
subject: 📚We’re Going Back to School!🎒
body:
Friends- Summer is almost over, the school year is getting started, and we are so excited! Back-to-school shopping, learning new things, and time for kids to see their friends again are all things to
| | |
---
| |
---
| 📚We're Going Back to School!🎒
---
| Friends-
Summer is almost over, the school year is getting started, and we are so excited! Back-to-school shopping, learning new things, and time for kids to see their friends again are all things to celebrate.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-lEO87W2JQVLZ1T5PqSjHaBjrx5iNghimZ2bCmjExBy4WJjtJb9zRclF6xyA2fwC69uIP9R0nh2EdrzYqvIxbW5CoM1UrhWjRd8GqfklePE5VRtNqS7ZgscOa9OMpXc6hHOIgknDMEzrYI3vDNy-ZCZJ1_0kf2t&c=6fTRF3pMxVhOGNHrcPYssDsxolTndptPzE7kRqhI75wX-KPEnpxqqQ==&ch=Vx1VqxFX6pVwOJCNMoldPVblv2q2kDRxQBL6zuWZ3i1pNKzuVj8Yqw==)
---
| But we should also be celebrating teachers, school employees, and the parents who put so much time and care into making sure Virginia's kids get the education they deserve. We're continuing to fight for Paid Family & Medical Leave in Virginia so that parents can take time for themselves and their children when unexpected illness or injury hits.
In Virginia, [it is estimated that 78% of working people](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-lEO87W2JQVLZ1T5PqSjHaBjrx5iNghimZ2bCmjExBy4WJjtJb9zSe9R2zu-vxhyiWpdmXYYGQnpdUNH-V8J36gw70jee927KV5hTY3Zf4aCKc-PVJqG72X5BXlq6XZalevBX7CyRhb4xdl96MRY5O18gqB_nZ6bOz5U8ensEkm7_WZrqbXbWCxqKT7LBhkWMRSWs6gf8FsCwJfJVpF6IDEu9HMCxTyRZ6lxMy9e-ohgAqSXoW_xtQGRi_8xAsq&c=6fTRF3pMxVhOGNHrcPYssDsxolTndptPzE7kRqhI75wX-KPEnpxqqQ==&ch=Vx1VqxFX6pVwOJCNMoldPVblv2q2kDRxQBL6zuWZ3i1pNKzuVj8Yqw==) - about 3.4 million workers -have no guarantee that they won't miss a critical paycheck when they need to take time off to care for themselves or a loved one. That means teachers have to make the choice to either put their families' financial stability or their own and their students' health at risk, when they should be able to take time to recover or care for a sick loved one. That means parents making the hard choice to send their sick children to school because they can't afford the bills if they miss work.
No one should have to make these kinds of decisions. Hardworking Virginians deserve the freedom to care for a sick loved one or a new baby without worrying about paying their bills. We should respect Virginians' hard work by ensuring that they can take paid leave.
Shinji Oh Digital Manager
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-lEO87W2JQVLZ1T5PqSjHaBjrx5iNghimZ2bCmjExBy4WJjtJb9zSe9R2zu-vxhygMJ2c4YB5lLhy8OMPOw2zenZSJgBwrjzPJ2qS8sqU-6s_tqQMe09lg8nYLmC7_QP74S1A3cVZdeR4tI0fkpR9JAlZLvXNpFBfwObN9hEPs=&c=6fTRF3pMxVhOGNHrcPYssDsxolTndptPzE7kRqhI75wX-KPEnpxqqQ==&ch=Vx1VqxFX6pVwOJCNMoldPVblv2q2kDRxQBL6zuWZ3i1pNKzuVj8Yqw==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-lEO87W2JQVLZ1T5PqSjHaBjrx5iNghimZ2bCmjExBy4WJjtJb9zSe9R2zu-vxh23vUKPK9JTFgKFFiLIc5ADzlcA73vK9fIJqmJWFrPYrM-qfowNncJJjCcI52vy5BAIW_yYqAIP1r-5U-p4otWdkETCBkJPuH&c=6fTRF3pMxVhOGNHrcPYssDsxolTndptPzE7kRqhI75wX-KPEnpxqqQ==&ch=Vx1VqxFX6pVwOJCNMoldPVblv2q2kDRxQBL6zuWZ3i1pNKzuVj8Yqw==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-lEO87W2JQVLZ1T5PqSjHaBjrx5iNghimZ2bCmjExBy4WJjtJb9zSe9R2zu-vxh9AVkagRSd6ctkQbnOSlf5F43At-IsBoAZGFjcROyVYlOm7rwgpCseHPsw5ZtEwRfTlzVkkBJAzaencn2vP5eumugdr8zAnFh5XKt0AZEhaQ=&c=6fTRF3pMxVhOGNHrcPYssDsxolTndptPzE7kRqhI75wX-KPEnpxqqQ==&ch=Vx1VqxFX6pVwOJCNMoldPVblv2q2kDRxQBL6zuWZ3i1pNKzuVj8Yqw==)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Paid protesters tried to intimidate us…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The Left is targeting us and watching our every move
| Dear Friend,
---
This was truly an honor.
---
I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority.
---
And thank God for that decision.
---
Because right now, we're only _ONE_ seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is _**ours**_. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar.
---
And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move...
---
**...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us.**
---
Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, _but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re**“closing the gap”** on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York._
---
**It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district.**
---
**From _Wall Street Journal_ : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...”**
---
The Radical Left sent us _their_ message of intimidation. Now it’s _our_ turn to respond with a message of our own.
---
**I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED.**
---
I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight.
---
**Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now.**

clean_body: The Left is targeting us and watching our every move | Dear Friend, This was truly an honor. I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority. And thank God for that decision. Because right now, we're only ONE seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is ours. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar. And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move... ...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us. Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re“closing the gap” on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York. It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district. From Wall Street Journal : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...” The Radical Left sent us their message of intimidation. Now it’s our turn to respond with a message of our own. I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED. I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight. Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Matt Diemer
subject: Democracy doesn’t rest
body:
| |
---
Hey everyone, Ohio is heating up. Amy Acton is running for governor and will face Vivek Ramaswamy. Sherrod Brown is taking on Jon Husted for the Senate. In Cleveland, city council races are turning contentious, and the Browns' new stadium in Brook Park is already bogged down with delays and politics. Meanwhile, Washington is broken. Congress isn't working for the people. Life in Ohio keeps getting more expensive--housing is out of reach, property taxes are driving families out of neighborhoods, mortgage rates keep climbing, and gas prices never came down. Our national debt just passed $37 trillion, healthcare is harder to access, and everyday Ohioans are left holding the bag. Here's the truth: none of this changes unless we make it change. Voting matters. Electing the right people matters. But just as important--holding them accountable matters. Don't take your foot off the gas once your party is in power. If they promise something, make them deliver. The only way forward is with clarity and resolve. Know what you want from your leaders. Demand it. And never stop pushing, especially when it's our own party in charge. Democracy works when we work it. Let's get to work. Best,
Matt
---
|
---

name: First Look News
subject: Stay Hairless Without Using a Razor
body:
Ditch the razor for good. This simple at-home solution is helping thousands stay smooth and hair-free--without painful waxing, messy creams, or daily shaving. It's fast, gentle, and safe for all skin types. Women everywhere are loving how easy it is to use and how long the results last. Ready to stay hairless without the hassle?

**Why I 'll Never Shave My Face Again
**
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoijntiea5nf1au60hr8ea4jedhu4irmde7vhvl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4o34cph2bs)

We're a bunch of hairy ladies. That's just the way our family is! Not much we could do about it. One of my aunts got laser treatment, costing $1,000s of dollars, taking 6 months of treatment and... She is as hairy as ever. Now we all just shave and wax. Or give up. That's what I did when my husband left. He said he didn't feel attracted to me anymore because I was letting my stubble get too manly. And after he left, I pretty much just stopped dating. It was so hard to stay smooth, and it didn't even feel worth it. Plus, I have bigger fish to fry--like raising my daughter! She's always been a sweet, loving girl, and I feel so lucky to be her mom. Raising her was honestly a breeze! Until my problem became her problem. I was hoping she wouldn't be as hairy as me, because she's got lighter hair like her dad. But luck was not on her side. Her arm and leg hair started coming in pretty thick and fast when she was still little. I showed her how to shave younger than most moms would approve of, but I knew how it was to be the hairy girl at school, and I didn't want that for her. But arms and legs are one thing. I really wanted to wait as long as possible before I let her start shaving her face. I noticed a couple hairs here and there, but they seemed fine and not very noticeable. I prayed that she wouldn't inherit my full-on mustache, and weird beard. I was still keeping my head in the sand about the problem, until one day, she burst into the house, crying. "Gemma, what happened??" I rushed over to her, holding her tight. She wriggled out of my arms like a worm and started wailing. "WHY I AM LIKE THIS?? WHY DO I HAVE A BEARD? I'M A GIRL!!" she screamed and cried, "EVERYONE IS CALLING ME LUMBERGEMMA BECAUSE I LOOK LIKE A LUMBERJACK!" My heart broke into a million pieces. I felt like a failure as a mother. I had been ignoring this problem for so long, that I guess I was just hoping it would disappear. But I couldn't ignore my daughter getting bullied. I needed to find a solution. It was time for her to take the rite of passage all the women in my family had taken before. It was time for my little girl to start shaving her face. I knew from my own experience that waxing was going to be too painful for her, and too expensive for me to be able to afford on a regular basis. So out came the razors. But as she shaved her face in the mirror, she just started bawling. "I look like a boy," she said, "I HATE this!!" It was horrible. I wished desperately that I could find a better way to help my poor sweet baby. She didn't deserve to be a pariah! That's when a miracle happened. My mom came into town to visit for a while, so we made a nice dinner. And we had the best time! It was so great to have 3 generations of women hanging out together, talking and laughing, eating a drinking. My heart was so full! Then my mom dropped the bomb. "How's school, sweetie? You breaking any boys' hearts yet? she asked. I held my breath, and my daughter burst into tears, telling her grandmother all about the horrible bullying she was going through. "Oh my gosh!" my mom said when she finished, "I can't believe I forgot to tell you guys about Glabrous Skin!!" "What's that?" we asked. "One second," she said excitedly, and ran into the room where she was staying. She came back out beaming, and holding a cute little pink and white device. "This is it!! It is MAGICAL!" she told us. "What is it? Some kind of razor?" I asked. "Nope! It's only the best epilator in the world!" she said, "It completely erases hair from anywhere, pulling it out by the root. It gets all your hair, no matter how fine--even as small as a grain of sand!" Then she stood up and showed off her completely smooth legs. She felt as smooth as a seal! "Does it hurt?" I asked. "The first time you use it, it does sting a little bit," she said, "But it hurts way less than waxing or threading! You should try it!" I took the [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zku3aavvh1541t3vhs2bpa046nj9euaotnaqia98_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4o34cph2bs) and ran it over my arm. It actually didn't hurt much at all, and to my shock, the hair was completely gone! It was so unbelievably smooth! "And you use it on your face?" I asked. "Yep, I use it EVERYWHERE!" she said, "Even on my bikini area. No more bumps or ingrown hairs, and I barely even have to use it. I just keep it with me out of habit now. I haven't used it on my legs in a month!" Holy smokes!! This sounded like just the device for our hairy selves! It seemed to be too good to be true, so I decided to look it up online right then and there. There were 4,283 5-star reviews!
---

When I saw there was a satisfaction guarantee, I knew we had nothing to lose. I immediately went to order 2, for me and my daughter, but they were SOLD OUT! "Don't worry sweetie," my mom said, "They sell out all the time since they went viral. Just keep checking back and I'm sure you'll be able to order soon." We enjoyed the rest of our night, and I went home excited about getting a [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhd1tdnpmqsqhvmtovq7f71vo6jdldn6ues5rod8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4o34cph2bs) of my own. I checked back the next couple days, and they were back in stock a couple days later. I ordered 2 Glabrous Skins right away. I felt such a sense of relief wash over me when I clicked the BUY NOW button, and got my confirmation email. Our Glabrous Skins were on the way! When they arrived, I showed my daughter, all excited like a kid on Christmas. She was still skeptical, but we decided to go into the bathroom to try it. It worked just as well as my mom had told us!! My daughter had a hair-free face for the first time since she was young, and she looked incredible! No more bullying at school, and her confidence has increased ten-fold. It's amazing to see, and I'm so happy that she's doing so well. I started using my [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9u4mptd8ro31g814dqt17acv3ntvd2bgh06f5d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4o34cph2bs) too, and I just love it. Best money I ever spent. Now, a few months later, I barely even have to use it because the hair is coming back in fine and nearly invisible. When there's even just a little bit of hair, the Smooth Glide erases it, easily and instantly. I wanted to share my story, for any other hairy ladies out there!

clean_body: Ditch the razor for good. This simple at-home solution is helping thousands stay smooth and hair-free--without painful waxing, messy creams, or daily shaving. It's fast, gentle, and safe for all skin types. Women everywhere are loving how easy it is to use and how long the results last. Ready to stay hairless without the hassle? Why I 'll Never Shave My Face Again We're a bunch of hairy ladies. That's just the way our family is! Not much we could do about it. One of my aunts got laser treatment, costing $1,000s of dollars, taking 6 months of treatment and... She is as hairy as ever. Now we all just shave and wax. Or give up. That's what I did when my husband left. He said he didn't feel attracted to me anymore because I was letting my stubble get too manly. And after he left, I pretty much just stopped dating. It was so hard to stay smooth, and it didn't even feel worth it. Plus, I have bigger fish to fry--like raising my daughter! She's always been a sweet, loving girl, and I feel so lucky to be her mom. Raising her was honestly a breeze! Until my problem became her problem. I was hoping she wouldn't be as hairy as me, because she's got lighter hair like her dad. But luck was not on her side. Her arm and leg hair started coming in pretty thick and fast when she was still little. I showed her how to shave younger than most moms would approve of, but I knew how it was to be the hairy girl at school, and I didn't want that for her. But arms and legs are one thing. I really wanted to wait as long as possible before I let her start shaving her face. I noticed a couple hairs here and there, but they seemed fine and not very noticeable. I prayed that she wouldn't inherit my full-on mustache, and weird beard. I was still keeping my head in the sand about the problem, until one day, she burst into the house, crying. "Gemma, what happened??" I rushed over to her, holding her tight. She wriggled out of my arms like a worm and started wailing. "WHY I AM LIKE THIS?? WHY DO I HAVE A BEARD? I'M A GIRL!!" she screamed and cried, "EVERYONE IS CALLING ME LUMBERGEMMA BECAUSE I LOOK LIKE A LUMBERJACK!" My heart broke into a million pieces. I felt like a failure as a mother. I had been ignoring this problem for so long, that I guess I was just hoping it would disappear. But I couldn't ignore my daughter getting bullied. I needed to find a solution. It was time for her to take the rite of passage all the women in my family had taken before. It was time for my little girl to start shaving her face. name: Rep. Gloria Johnson
subject: Legislative Wrap Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF GLORIA JOHNSON, LISA SORENSEN, TREASURER
body:
From Mason to Knoxville-fighting for Tennessee's future

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3012135e6d90/legislative-wrap-up-7362731?e=dc5f639d62)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| |
Peter

In the last few weeks, I’ve seen both the challenges and the hope that define our work in Tennessee.After recording an episode of _The Tennessee Brando Podcast_ , I traveled with Brando to Mason, TN to stand alongside community members in opposition to CoreCivic’s prison and a new ICE contract — a deal pushed through in a loud room with bad sound, changing the results after constituents had left, silencing their voices and undermining democracy. Decisions like these create what I can only call an “Alligator Alcatraz” in our state — a symbol of cruelty that we must resist. (**Click on the picture of me and TN Brando below to watch the podcast.**)At the same time, new data has revealed another injustice: families in Governor Bill Lee’s school voucher program are receiving more state funding on average than the students in our public K–12 classrooms. Instead of strengthening our neighborhood schools — where the vast majority of Tennessee children learn, grow, and thrive — this administration is funneling taxpayer dollars into a program that leaves too many kids behind. Our communities deserve better.
---
[|
---](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=08ef345bf32fd78090e04097b&id=e3fda58b37&e=dc5f639d62)
| | But I’ve also witnessed the power of hope and history. At the Suffrage Coalition fundraising dinner in Knoxville, I joined friends and neighbors to support the Suffrage Museum. Hearing Eleanor Smeal — a true champion for women’s rights — reminded me that Tennessee has always been a battleground for democracy, and that the fight for justice and equality is never finished.And just as inspiring, I met with the Tennessee High School Democrats of East Tennessee for their organizational meeting. These young leaders are stepping up with energy and vision, ready to carry the torch of democracy into the next generation. Their commitment gives me hope that the fight for a fairer future is in good hands.That’s why I am in this race. I will never stop fighting for fairness, transparency, and dignity for all Tennesseans — whether it’s demanding accountability from private prison corporations, protecting our kids’ right to a strong public education, or carrying forward the legacy of those who fought for the right to vote. But I can’t do this alone.
[**If you're with me, chip in now. Every dollar helps us keep up the fight.**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=08ef345bf32fd78090e04097b&id=5c933926c8&e=dc5f639d62)
Will you contribute today to help me continue this work in Nashville? Every dollar helps me organize, fight back against corporate influence, and lift up the voices of our community.
[**Make a donation today to help fuel this fight for the future our families deserve.**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=08ef345bf32fd78090e04097b&id=daf37d3461&e=dc5f639d62)
It’s an honor to serve the people of Knox County and to stand tall with All Y’all!
Gloria JohnsonState Representative
House District 90

P.S. Be on the lookout for mini town halls now being scheduled in HD90 for September and October. I want to hear from you before I submit new legislation for 2026!
---
| | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF GLORIA JOHNSON, LISA SORENSEN, TREASURER
---

ICYMI: IL GOP Governor Hopeful Ted Dabrowski Steers Clear of Trump at Illinois State Fair (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/il-gop-governor-hopeful-ted-dabrowski-steers-clear-of-trump-at-illinois-state-fair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1b93c4be80-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/il-gop-governor-hopeful-ted-dabrowski-steers-clear-of-trump-at-illinois-state-fair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1b93c4be80-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ted Dabrowski, president of Wirepoints, speaks to reporters after telling fellow Republicans he plans to announce a bid for governor soon. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Jerry Nowicki)
By Illinois Review

At the Illinois State Fair last Thursday, GOP gubernatorial hopeful Ted Dabrowski steered clear of President Donald Trump – sticking to a strategy favored by party insiders.

“Illinois’ problems have nothing to do with Donald Trump,” Dabrowski told a Republican crowd at the state fair. “He can’t fix the property taxes. He can’t fix the gas tax. He can’t fix our out-migration. We have to fix it.”

For years, Dabrowski has maintained his distance from Trump, carefully avoiding any hint of an endorsement.

Dabrowski, a close ally of state central committee member Jeanne Ives and Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, is president of Wirepoints, an organization that offers commentary on Illinois’ finances and economy.

The Wirepoints president frequently appears on Proft and Ives’ radio shows. In March, he joined Ives and former Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau – who lost his re-election bid in a landslide – for a pension-focused town hall.
