# ACTION ALERT: SUPPORT OTC IVERMECTIN
|
---
HB 25 (Rep Shofner) would finally allow Texans to **access Ivermectin without a prescription**! The bill will be heard in the House Committee on Public Health TODAY, Friday August 22 at 9am. This is a priority bill for Speaker Burrows and is supported by Governor Abbott. Now it’s YOUR turn to speak up and help get this bill passed out of Committee! Read below for how to make your voice heard! Tell members of the Public Health Committee that patients deserve to use this effective medicine over-the-counter. **TAKE ACTION NOW!**
**1- Email the Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov,elizabeth.campos@house.texas.gov,john.bucy@house.texas.gov,nicole.collier@house.texas.gov,charles.cunningham@house.texas.gov,james.frank@house.texas.gov,ann.johnson@house.texas.gov,jolanda.jones@house.texas.gov,mike.olcott@house.texas.gov,katrina.pierson@house.texas.gov,mike.schofield@house.texas.gov,joanne.shofner@house.texas.gov,lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20HB%2025&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20vote%20%E2%80%9Cyes%E2%80%9D%20on%20HB%2025%20to%20give%20patients%20autonomy%20in%20accessing%20ivermectin.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|

name: Your American News
subject: Stay Hairless Without Using a Razor
body:
Ditch the razor for good. This simple at-home solution is helping thousands stay smooth and hair-free--without painful waxing, messy creams, or daily shaving. It's fast, gentle, and safe for all skin types. Women everywhere are loving how easy it is to use and how long the results last. Ready to stay hairless without the hassle?

**Why I 'll Never Shave My Face Again
**
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbjogsnm5c91nb4gtsa6nqlhsdst7n4v4g8qdm18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4p72chh2bs)

We're a bunch of hairy ladies. That's just the way our family is! Not much we could do about it. One of my aunts got laser treatment, costing $1,000s of dollars, taking 6 months of treatment and... She is as hairy as ever. Now we all just shave and wax. Or give up. That's what I did when my husband left. He said he didn't feel attracted to me anymore because I was letting my stubble get too manly. And after he left, I pretty much just stopped dating. It was so hard to stay smooth, and it didn't even feel worth it. Plus, I have bigger fish to fry--like raising my daughter! She's always been a sweet, loving girl, and I feel so lucky to be her mom. Raising her was honestly a breeze! Until my problem became her problem. I was hoping she wouldn't be as hairy as me, because she's got lighter hair like her dad. But luck was not on her side. Her arm and leg hair started coming in pretty thick and fast when she was still little. I showed her how to shave younger than most moms would approve of, but I knew how it was to be the hairy girl at school, and I didn't want that for her. But arms and legs are one thing. I really wanted to wait as long as possible before I let her start shaving her face. I noticed a couple hairs here and there, but they seemed fine and not very noticeable. I prayed that she wouldn't inherit my full-on mustache, and weird beard. I was still keeping my head in the sand about the problem, until one day, she burst into the house, crying. "Gemma, what happened??" I rushed over to her, holding her tight. She wriggled out of my arms like a worm and started wailing. "WHY I AM LIKE THIS?? WHY DO I HAVE A BEARD? I'M A GIRL!!" she screamed and cried, "EVERYONE IS CALLING ME LUMBERGEMMA BECAUSE I LOOK LIKE A LUMBERJACK!" My heart broke into a million pieces. I felt like a failure as a mother. I had been ignoring this problem for so long, that I guess I was just hoping it would disappear. But I couldn't ignore my daughter getting bullied. I needed to find a solution. It was time for her to take the rite of passage all the women in my family had taken before. It was time for my little girl to start shaving her face. I knew from my own experience that waxing was going to be too painful for her, and too expensive for me to be able to afford on a regular basis. So out came the razors. But as she shaved her face in the mirror, she just started bawling. "I look like a boy," she said, "I HATE this!!" It was horrible. I wished desperately that I could find a better way to help my poor sweet baby. She didn't deserve to be a pariah! That's when a miracle happened. My mom came into town to visit for a while, so we made a nice dinner. And we had the best time! It was so great to have 3 generations of women hanging out together, talking and laughing, eating a drinking. My heart was so full! Then my mom dropped the bomb. "How's school, sweetie? You breaking any boys' hearts yet? she asked. I held my breath, and my daughter burst into tears, telling her grandmother all about the horrible bullying she was going through. "Oh my gosh!" my mom said when she finished, "I can't believe I forgot to tell you guys about Glabrous Skin!!" "What's that?" we asked. "One second," she said excitedly, and ran into the room where she was staying. She came back out beaming, and holding a cute little pink and white device. "This is it!! It is MAGICAL!" she told us. "What is it? Some kind of razor?" I asked. "Nope! It's only the best epilator in the world!" she said, "It completely erases hair from anywhere, pulling it out by the root. It gets all your hair, no matter how fine--even as small as a grain of sand!" Then she stood up and showed off her completely smooth legs. She felt as smooth as a seal! "Does it hurt?" I asked. "The first time you use it, it does sting a little bit," she said, "But it hurts way less than waxing or threading! You should try it!" I took the [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znrdtio3kf38f0ahv0m7f3kgdak67mrb6s7b8lm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4p72chh2bs) and ran it over my arm. It actually didn't hurt much at all, and to my shock, the hair was completely gone! It was so unbelievably smooth! "And you use it on your face?" I asked. "Yep, I use it EVERYWHERE!" she said, "Even on my bikini area. No more bumps or ingrown hairs, and I barely even have to use it. I just keep it with me out of habit now. I haven't used it on my legs in a month!" Holy smokes!! This sounded like just the device for our hairy selves! It seemed to be too good to be true, so I decided to look it up online right then and there. There were 4,283 5-star reviews!
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zevb53p6tv0gv79khsjlllgvkkeh3o5sfbt70j4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4p72chh2bs)
When I saw there was a satisfaction guarantee, I knew we had nothing to lose. I immediately went to order 2, for me and my daughter, but they were SOLD OUT! "Don't worry sweetie," my mom said, "They sell out all the time since they went viral. Just keep checking back and I'm sure you'll be able to order soon." We enjoyed the rest of our night, and I went home excited about getting a [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn2f6h67k185oqrjq45o5toq3n8c0melamfcnskg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4p72chh2bs) of my own. I checked back the next couple days, and they were back in stock a couple days later. I ordered 2 Glabrous Skins right away. I felt such a sense of relief wash over me when I clicked the BUY NOW button, and got my confirmation email. Our Glabrous Skins were on the way! When they arrived, I showed my daughter, all excited like a kid on Christmas. She was still skeptical, but we decided to go into the bathroom to try it. It worked just as well as my mom had told us!! My daughter had a hair-free face for the first time since she was young, and she looked incredible! No more bullying at school, and her confidence has increased ten-fold. It's amazing to see, and I'm so happy that she's doing so well. I started using my [**Glabrous** **Skin**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zupho82bdb67vn6g38s8if0fvt3abbl36bj1sl28_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3ge4p72chh2bs) too, and I just love it. Best money I ever spent. Now, a few months later, I barely even have to use it because the hair is coming back in fine and nearly invisible. When there's even just a little bit of hair, the Smooth Glide erases it, easily and instantly. I wanted to share my story, for any other hairy ladies out there!
**
**

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

subject: This is a direct attack on our freedom to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TJ-2BacarXLc-2FHnstBgOUePxRps31cA7-2Farmdp4-2F7fLP6jEDpug8RqkJK5j8AT7PW743NtX-2F0qpRaQUSM7J60crYc-3DurY1_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7Un-2Bxg-2FjvLoFXEcDsBVPph2ISBmVMEYGkZsOtUk-2FsPKnH7A9hHPrDXDiceqoAhnvPWZDQzPYst5vDD-2B3dLHHA7x67wjBTHLnGd0kNfQZST38-2FV6RdJNqcvvNgBLwyfzhi8ai6kc4G3xKdKiEquNWKcDFQAazVIY2SMrOhbFCuAUYyATaIafjwXt9NvCKPeiN)

Fellow activist,

Trump has announced his plans to sign an executive order that would attempt to eliminate vote-by-mail, replace voting machines with federally approved ones, and impose federal oversight of state elections.

**Let’s be clear: this is not about protecting elections. This is an attempt at an unconstitutional hostile takeover of our elections by the Trump regime, aimed at silencing the voices of all voters, especially Black, brown, young, and working-class Americans. **
** **
**If this executive order is signed, it will be a blatant power grab and a direct attack on our freedom to vote.** Our elections already have rigorous checks and balances in place to ensure they are secure and that every vote is counted. This order does nothing to add protections. Instead, it limits access to the ballot box — and that’s the point!

Trump is once again trying to create fear and doubt in our election system. We must do everything we can to prepare for this attack and ensure the American people continue to have safe, fair, and accessible elections. Our democracy is at stake.
[**This is our message: We will NOT be silenced. We will defend everyone's right to be heard because democracy only works when all of us can participate. Join us as we work to deepen democracy and protect the freedom to vote in Pennsylvania by rushing $25 immediately →

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Trump has announced his plans to sign an executive order that would attempt to eliminate vote-by-mail, replace voting machines with federally approved ones, and impose federal oversight of state elections. Let’s be clear: this is not about protecting elections. This is an attempt at an unconstitutional hostile takeover of our elections by the Trump regime, aimed at silencing the voices of all voters, especially Black, brown, young, and working-class Americans. If this executive order is signed, it will be a blatant power grab and a direct attack on our freedom to vote. Our elections already have rigorous checks and balances in place to ensure they are secure and that every vote is counted. This order does nothing to add protections. Instead, it limits access to the ballot box — and that’s the point! Trump is once again trying to create fear and doubt in our election system. We must do everything we can to prepare for this attack and ensure the American people continue to have safe, fair, and accessible elections. Our democracy is at stake. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: The freedom to vote is the foundation of every other freedom. If they take this away, they can take everything else with it. We can’t let that happen. In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer New Pennsylvania Project Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: DemsGive
subject: What’s happening in DC is bigger than one city
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
A federal takeover of DC’s police sets a troubling precedent for communities nationwide.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K38ZJMBV7TEXZ52GNYN11YB7_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, Washington, DC’s police department is now under federal control, with more than 1,900 National Guard troops mobilized from multiple states. This week, the president said the DC law enforcement initiative will “go on to other places.” Local leaders say these moves bypass the city’s ability to manage its own public safety and raise questions about how far this approach could go. What happens in DC could influence how power is exercised in communities across the country. [**Read the full story** ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K38ZJMBV7TEXZ52GNYN11YB7_1) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org

body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpomdh4mahetqmk4gong4k087kk38mrgtj4p350_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3geco72c3h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjamm76dvtj3l81d8t4t1fu8bns935t72u449g88_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3geco72c3h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq5nnd2i1pm3jh4k2dvg2pffteorg4r6ci9gfe30_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c3geco72c3h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---

The difference between Republicans and Democrats| | | Friend, North Carolina has more illegal immigrants than Arizona. Sometimes I share that with voters, and they look at me in shock, but it's true. **Why does a North Carolina Congressman care so much about building the wall, funding ICE, and tackling illegal immigration?** Because I know firsthand what illegal immigration, sanctuary cities, and the flow of fentanyl are doing not just to harm, but killing, Americans. When I see ICE has arrested 350 gang members in Houston, I celebrate. My Democrat "colleagues" protest. And when I have the chance to make sure the Border Patrol can finish building the wall during President Trump’s current term and add 18,000 new officers, I support it, while the Democrats try to stop it. Democrats cannot be trusted to make this country safe. They cannot be trusted to protect the American people. We cannot allow Democrats to win back the White House, the Senate or Congress ever again. clean_body: The difference between Republicans and Democrats| | | Friend, North Carolina has more illegal immigrants than Arizona. Sometimes I share that with voters, and they look at me in shock, but it's true. Why does a North Carolina Congressman care so much about building the wall, funding ICE, and tackling illegal immigration? Because I know firsthand what illegal immigration, sanctuary cities, and the flow of fentanyl are doing not just to harm, but killing, Americans. When I see ICE has arrested 350 gang members in Houston, I celebrate. My Democrat "colleagues" protest. And when I have the chance to make sure the Border Patrol can finish building the wall during President Trump’s current term and add 18,000 new officers, I support it, while the Democrats try to stop it. Democrats cannot be trusted to make this country safe. They cannot be trusted to protect the American people. We cannot allow Democrats to win back the White House, the Senate or Congress ever again. Will you stand with me and Stand with Republicans. Stand with me. Thank you, Addison McDowell Republican Congressman NC-06 | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by McDowell for Congress Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress Our mailing address is: McDowell for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , and .

👋 To all of our supporters,
We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end.
Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**
That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.
_And when we say small donations, we mean it._
This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.
But now, with less than three months until Election Day, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election.
**[Will you stand with Abigail today, Peter? ---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/98cb8333-c615-47c8-8f8f-976b9d836ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Traxer](https://substack.com/redirect/f5e496c4-e787-40e7-b195-99763d09eb86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/fa0f40d6-4930-4944-af7b-b1df042e4bff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> "A government of laws, and not of men." - **John Adams**
For centuries sound money protected liberty. Today, fiat currencies can be created at will, fueling debt and inflation that erodes your savings. As grocery prices climb and wages stagnate, many sense that paper money controlled by politicians is failing. **Bitcoin** offers an alternative: a monetary protocol with rules enforced by math (laws) instead of men.
## Scarcity and Inflation
Bitcoin's supply is capped at 21 million coins and follows a predictable issuance schedule. Roughly every four years, "halving" events cut new issuance in half, steadily reducing inflation and raising its stock‐to‐flow ratio above gold. Contrast this with fiat currencies, whose supply can expand indefinitely. Many analysts view Bitcoin's fixed supply as a hedge against inflation. Its scarcity is enforced by thousands of independent miners and nodes; no single government can change its monetary policy.
## Security Through Decentralization
Bitcoin is secured by decentralization and cryptography, not trust in central banks. Miners expend real‐world energy to add new blocks, and by mid‐2025 the network's hash rate exceeded one exahash per second, making it prohibitively expensive to attack. In more than fourteen years, the protocol has never been hacked. Off‐chain exchanges can fail, but that underscores the value of self‐custody. Educational resources emphasize that Bitcoin lets you truly own your money; no government controls it. Unlike a bank account, a properly secured wallet cannot be frozen or inflated away.
Bitcoin also resists censorship. In countries suffering hyperinflation and capital controls, citizens have used it to preserve savings and transact when government systems fail. Because no central authority can block transactions, Bitcoin serves as a financial lifeline.
## Faster, More Inclusive Banking
Traditional banking relies on intermediaries and fees. Bitcoin enables direct transfers between parties secured by cryptographic keys, eliminating single points of failure. Remittances illustrate this: workers can convert local currency to bitcoin, send it across borders, and recipients convert it back without paying high wire fees. For unbanked individuals, all that's needed is a smartphone.
Stablecoins and decentralized finance may extend these benefits, bringing millions without bank accounts into the financial system. Domestically, protocols such as Lightning settle payments in seconds for pennies, undercutting credit‐card fees.
## A Savings Vehicle with Network Effects
Saving in dollars is punished by low interest rates and inflation. Bitcoin is an appealing alternative: its scarcity protects purchasing power and its value grows as adoption widens. Hundreds of millions of people now own bitcoin, and corporations and governments hold it as a reserve asset. U.S. spot bitcoin exchange‐traded funds launched in 2024-2025 drew billions in inflows, signaling mainstream acceptance. Bitcoin's price is volatile, but volatility is the price of monetizing a scarce asset. Those who take a long view and dollar‐cost average can benefit from its appreciation while hedging fiat debasement.
## Bank Yourself
The most radical feature of Bitcoin is that it makes banking optional. Online commerce today requires banks and credit‐card companies to peer into your finances; you no longer have direct access to your money. Bitcoin restores that access. It's a peer‐to‐peer cash system. You can transfer value directly to anyone worldwide without permission.
This isn't theory. Last week a friend sold a piece of real estate in another country. After reaching an agreement and having a lawyer draw up the contract, the buyer attempted to wire funds from Germany to my friend's U.S. bank. Both banks demanded layers of verification; days stretched into weeks, and the transaction was ultimately returned. Frustrated, they priced the sale in bitcoin using the prior week's BTC-USD average and completed the transfer on‐chain. Within minutes the money arrived. Where the legacy system failed, Bitcoin made settlement easy and final.
Experiences like this explain why Bitcoin empowers ordinary people. It allows dissidents to fund movements and entrepreneurs to raise capital without gatekeepers. Scholars have noted that trusting the blockchain is a new way of organizing finance.
## Conclusion
Our current fiat system incentivizes reckless spending and punishes savers. Bitcoin is not perfect-- its price fluctuates. But when weighed against a monetary regime that inflates debt and erodes liberty, Bitcoin offers something profound: scarce, secure money controlled by individuals. Adopting it is not speculation; it is a stand for sound money and financial sovereignty. Educate yourself, demand clear rules, and choose money aligned with liberty and law. The future of finance need not be dictated from on high; it can emerge from the bottom up, encoded in an open protocol.

Instead of protecting our families, he's busy rolling out the red carpet for people who broke our laws to get here. And now, his dangerous policies are spilling across the country.

[**I’ve seen enough. It’s time to hold these Radical Leftists accountable before more Americans pay the ultimate price.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7b7db3e7dfad48f3b674fb731f2edf75&_e=CRcARC0FJrUiJnO8hLvtJuAR3SFUY1rP6WeiKCIbGrro1380MIXPlB1BFSEaBl5mIhUisQNC_rOiLjWz50mMVp-kSpvnKMCS6KJxEoSvqLwJOmNkg-Yt0TRHUF0C_OUSvX-HKUDG52ux8rnwPrhXmTxFYAH-VdWGb44kX7Ljr6zKKrs4Ub1-Yf7D0jkwjdXIvSAy3GGwLVLxuwtjJrvnay6py_58YaVMNm3UJiZBbAzc3rv7fqFWdJ53wFk7vvvhYdhU5ObQvbZ3NnxqvaiAYNqHz4OqBuTU1Hzu6bsfutgtSH7vHisDZ4wq_jCPMoaCBRDL_OG9bY62rdyz-79LjS7xCVIh2Dg5lVESTlNXFkujivlWlr0v60OLYD93I1Lo4NqfMQMGQRRhxoQ65-5AajeFKaL1yiBgTJILL1uOPZTYv8JFdRPpbZ0Vc0zPdw3HwwU8XQ7c_ov6NahMycdceUjRWSHqRnJI1nV4RAlls_LMdP01jmb3BEbRqE5D__maU2DhYM2OdFrl00JmCV-TcWld3E1Ps6lCdzXx2KIBUbsuwOw9im5jGUYBsinOH_en)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7b7db3e7dfad48f3b674fb731f2edf75&_e=CRcARC0FJrUiJnO8hLvtJuAR3SFUY1rP6WeiKCIbGrro1380MIXPlB1BFSEaBl5mIhUisQNC_rOiLjWz50mMVp-kSpvnKMCS6KJxEoSvqLwJOmNkg-Yt0TRHUF0C_OUSvX-HKUDG52ux8rnwPrhXmTxFYAH-VdWGb44kX7Ljr6zKKrs4Ub1-Yf7D0jkwjdXIJu8sf7bvZ9cTsrlaR_rQ9rDXipwx2zgfwq-KxKXZYmp1STIIa0ldxsqwRDInRdAFINOB86MEF1VtplX520cMOKAYHalOIEVbROaTj__5JxxK8qoQtPDzho-qBreDmHz23RTeg2m-8MuYUmyZEurkkmUZj8KRPPe-NCKhe7muCE2L7NgIBV2ru7gO6v1AFV5z60mglpaTbnaHwkbbDToxtwlKJXjq3d_FSjTu32egIKnXtMHtAiWMysWPZBIcBz5b7_mRuAUqsxbWnWQdZHQHZOg1qa--r3y8-hLUG-LlNYVsvSpVjm-86y8Cfpg-L5luaU5fowElHk1G6sSlQ8dOEdI3W7IZFAIWcWekaDPdTQ3uqRx6zwzc88j6CM4YX-P6)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7b7db3e7dfad48f3b674fb731f2edf75&_e=CRcARC0FJrUiJnO8hLvtJuAR3SFUY1rP6WeiKCIbGrro1380MIXPlB1BFSEaBl5mIhUisQNC_rOiLjWz50mMVp-kSpvnKMCS6KJxEoSvqLwJOmNkg-Yt0TRHUF0C_OUSvX-HKUDG52ux8rnwPrhXmTxFYAH-VdWGb44kX7Ljr6zKKrs4Ub1-Yf7D0jkwjdXI7OkJDtFXkHe2YR5ul5zvwA0uX7QSBqct0vpoC3SuDJhXJVYkIg9jumC-8Qb7pIyajI6VhMD6v4OIxo_OSiBjAdMvpUjQw6cJsNKCLi2sL4jCFmhfd3h_4yV-EWUIJU78V5_duXfkN47jkdt0d6TMS_hLCO8-efJTVWBS2TkbOrancfrjnGfqGRm1CSnLai7OmTWmxWjVRrraErTs6nG-lWgL56H1gV6nFOU15-wtuIqvpNTfqr1q0mMnVDXhvAaZN6Ewrnp_Fzz9SgBpsLuvO7oAlbMY4_t1GF_JHbKYnEII1S14QA1ODmqBhsI5X-ewSKSEC_zpfT_mLK74vRAxhdMgRhQxLS_k3wkPKNy6YtkTKhSutZFzNlo6DROyvuj7)

clean_body: I've seen enough. It's time to hold these Radical Leftists accountable before more Americans pay the ultimate price. | Peter, I spent my life on the football field. And let me tell you something... Gavin Newsom couldn 't coach a pee-wee team. Now, his open-borders playbook has cost innocent Americans their lives. Here 's the story: an illegal immigrant was granted a commercial driver 's license in California under Newsom's watch. Then, he got behind the wheel and killed American citizens in a car crash. That blood is on Gavin Newsom's hands. Instead of protecting our families, he's busy rolling out the red carpet for people who broke our laws to get here. And now, his dangerous policies are spilling across the country. | We don 't hand out trophies for losing teams, and we sure shouldn't hand out driver's licenses to illegal immigrants. Stand with me, fight back, and let's make sure this never happens again. - Coach Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93947?refcode=em20250822-9307&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9307%2E614464%2EhR13Xc)
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Heartland Patriots and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93947?refcode=em20250822-9307&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9307%2E614464%2EhR13Xc)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $10 now, split between Heartland Patriots and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93947?refcode=em20250822-9307&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9307%2E614464%2EhR13Xc)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.
[Peter, we’re begging you to add your name RIGHT NOW and support a federal ban on China buying U.S. farmland:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMl9MVS1JUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTI0NjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjJfTFUtSVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyNDY5LTI4OTkifQ/VJfJHKJUfHpzD797wMXc_Q) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMl9MVS1JUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTI0NjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjJfTFUtSVAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyNDY5LTI4OTkifQ/0HLAY-YzH_hw7U2LcPVDog) [ BAN CHINA FROM BUYING OUR LAND

# **[Trump's 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here](https://substack.com/redirect/a890f812-96ad-4336-bf7c-07faa4e9bea9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

## **Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?**
President Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history. His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees.
But here's the catch:
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP.
The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks.
And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis.
**[We've outlined a wealth protection strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/a890f812-96ad-4336-bf7c-07faa4e9bea9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** inside the 2025 Retirement Protection Guide -- and it's completely FREE. Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.
Time is short. Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings.

* * *
# HAPPENING: FBI raids John Bolton's home and office
Federal agents searched former Trump national security adviser John Bolton's Bethesda, Maryland home at 7 a.m. Friday morning, **[with plans to also search his office,](https://substack.com/redirect/5a26ed60-1258-429a-aec0-e729753f2113?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as part of an investigation involving classified documents ordered by FBI Director Kash Patel.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a26ed60-1258-429a-aec0-e729753f2113?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### What's going on?
* **Investigation stems from 2020 book controversy** : The probe relates to Bolton's 2020 book "The Room Where It Happened," which Trump tried to block from publication, claiming it contained national secrets and violated Bolton's NDA - the criminal inquiry originally began in 2020 during Trump's first presidency.
* **Biden administration allegedly shut down probe for political reasons** : According to a senior US official, the investigation was launched years ago but the Biden administration terminated it "for political reasons," with the FBI now suspecting the shutdown was politically motivated rather than based on legal merits.
* **Bolton continues criticism amid raid** : While FBI agents searched his home, Bolton posted on X criticizing Trump's approach to the Russia-Ukraine war, stating "Trump wants a Nobel Peace Prize, but I don't see these talks making any progress" - Bolton has been a vocal critic since leaving the Trump administration.

* * *
# Cracker Barrel defends upsetting rebrand from critics, but even the Democrats hate it too
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/85deeee4-d8cb-459d-96f3-3b20a05c1556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Cracker Barrel's spokesperson claimed that **["a vocal minority" of critics](https://substack.com/redirect/85deeee4-d8cb-459d-96f3-3b20a05c1556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are expressing dissatisfaction with the chain's new rebrand, but maintained that feedback from guests and team members has been "overwhelmingly positive," citing strong performance at remodeled locations as evidence they're "moving in the right direction."
**In a rare and shocking moment of unity in America, the Democrat Party 's official X account posted, "We think the Cracker Barrel rebrand sucks too."**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27a80336-c762-4b83-b2a2-b034c38ca019?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Why did the new logo sparks widespread backlash** : Cracker Barrel unveiled a text-only logo removing the iconic illustration of an old man by a barrel, prompting fierce criticism on social media with users calling it "absolutely horrible," "generic," and demanding the company "change it back."

* **Part of broader "All the More" campaign** : The logo change accompanies new menu offerings for breakfast, lunch and dinner, plus "refreshed restaurant remodels" that the company says were informed by guest feedback requesting brighter, less cluttered spaces with more seating options.
* **Food quality concerns raised** : Beyond the logo, customers complained that Cracker Barrel has lost focus on its core offering, with comments like "It's not country cooking anymore" and "The food has been substandard for a while" highlighting broader dissatisfaction with menu changes.

"This is an issue of political elitists in California silencing and taking the power away from voters!!" | | | Aug 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | Republican California state Senator Suzette Valladares for trying to demonize Texas Republicans for redistricting their state's electoral map and justify California Gavin Newsom's attempt to retaliate with his own redistricting campaign. "This is an issue of political elitists in California silencing and taking the power away from voters!!" | | ---|---|--- Are Your Retirement Savings Ready? President Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history. His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. But here's the catch: This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. inside the 2025 Retirement Protection Guide -- and it's completely FREE. Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises. Time is short. Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings. > << HAPPENING: FBI raids John Bolton's home and office Federal agents searched former Trump national security adviser John Bolton's Bethesda, Maryland home at 7 a.m. Friday morning, as part of an investigation involving classified documents ordered by FBI Director Kash Patel. | | ---|---|--- What's going on? Investigation stems from 2020 book controversy : The probe relates to Bolton's 2020 book "The Room Where It Happened," which Trump tried to block from publication, claiming it contained national secrets and violated Bolton's NDA - the criminal inquiry originally began in 2020 during Trump's first presidency. Biden administration allegedly shut down probe for political reasons : According to a senior US official, the investigation was launched years ago but the Biden administration terminated it "for political reasons," with the FBI now suspecting the shutdown was politically motivated rather than based on legal merits. Bolton continues criticism amid raid : While FBI agents searched his home, Bolton posted on X criticizing Trump's approach to the Russia-Ukraine war, stating "Trump wants a Nobel Peace Prize, but I don't see these talks making any progress" - Bolton has been a vocal critic since leaving the Trump administration. Cracker Barrel defends upsetting rebrand from critics, but even the Democrats hate it too | | ---|---|--- Cracker Barrel's spokesperson claimed that are expressing dissatisfaction with the chain's new rebrand, but maintained that feedback from guests and team members has been "overwhelmingly positive," citing strong performance at remodeled locations as evidence they're "moving in the right direction." In a rare and shocking moment of unity in America, the Democrat Party 's official X account posted, "We think the Cracker Barrel rebrand sucks too." | | ---|---|--- Why did the new logo sparks widespread backlash : Cracker Barrel unveiled a text-only logo removing the iconic illustration of an old man by a barrel, prompting fierce criticism on social media with users calling it "absolutely horrible," "generic," and demanding the company "change it back." Part of broader "All the More" campaign : The logo change accompanies new menu offerings for breakfast, lunch and dinner, plus "refreshed restaurant remodels" that the company says were informed by guest feedback requesting brighter, less cluttered spaces with more seating options. Food quality concerns raised : Beyond the logo, customers complained that Cracker Barrel has lost focus on its core offering, with comments like "It's not country cooking anymore" and "The food has been substandard for a while" highlighting broader dissatisfaction with menu changes. | | POLL How do you feel about the Cracker Barrel rebrand? | ? ? ? Peter,

There’s always been male cheerleaders.

They used to bring strength to the team — do lifts, support the squad, hold the line.

Now? They’re trying to out-woman the women.

The Left calls it “progress.” I call it delusion. This is what their DEI obsession leads to — men taking spots meant for women, then patting themselves on the back like it’s a win for equality. They aren’t lifting anyone up.

**They’re tearing down everything that made sense. And if you dare question it? You’re called _hateful. Bigoted. Outdated._**

ENOUGH.

If you’re tired of the insanity... If you’re tired of watching the Left erase women and call it justice... If you still believe in truth, biology, and common sense...

**Then I need you with me right now.** **[Chip in and help us fight back.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=14688f9415274f80b25c53dd3de2f629&_e=jXLd1jdBXEDF0bpEPyimYu-mqxsCUu7bX9tIGJyau71Lk8kzK5YMa7YoOLAezypvV1MlrJNmXDiMXXFhD9vFqH4qhkjanGdaWyzIlyBSFDYRHAYucPKl7PvWKPzNeAu927jZ0zaiswiIhNwGD_C5sIUTxEAUD4RmQFLB7f7ohY0wybGtApTdQ5f2ZBgl63lcmUFwU2yxfQYf1BKy7HuPIfyj98uSwBmtejWm18ioLvlGXxXSDPZSzv8NlAkslkD1--oDVd_iAz2gt06Pn1ptT5M7b_HjWclijCr28TuA1tE_gS4aoBZ7lQ-70ojuUzxFGS57wkK278xT0fCk92yzoXbK2aWdopY0qwtfixZ-XTlGJlfB1EN-HsAleJFaoWregeis-L4uCmWW8n8ETodoEiNCvGwJNGL-UEyXbiMVjbHRA2-CcSBvLcodXPhDtLV7U17-rpH4AmL_nnXtE-jtGPpad6ZHGuOExR1oWSZoCRePasPmAVrSwrqx8iiuKcob2OYNKmau0RSAvWUYHDZZzn23SIJEONZPozopMMCMQDXVjgwO4RUCU5SDpNLosJvS)**

We’re not going to fix Minnesota by playing nice with the woke mob or the Uniparty. This campaign is about restoring NORMAL — and **[we can’t do it without you.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=14688f9415274f80b25c53dd3de2f629&_e=jXLd1jdBXEDF0bpEPyimYu-mqxsCUu7bX9tIGJyau71Lk8kzK5YMa7YoOLAezypvV1MlrJNmXDiMXXFhD9vFqH4qhkjanGdaWyzIlyBSFDYRHAYucPKl7PvWKPzNeAu927jZ0zaiswiIhNwGD_C5sIUTxEAUD4RmQFLB7f7ohY0wybGtApTdQ5f2ZBgl63lcNdTAH07ACn_kAQqendxViOjl3EVMW1-0fbUpy15QT3jszYt-GfveKr_hEWkQ4kTVFtfX9jEtCwr-_2SbhTmbSYKscFYMewCMysPhzU8JA_f_PWu6nLMyfQj_KYCDUYoVsHrA_M6IcJTNVlfh8RuFB11AAVHw9Ejosza_gfVnUIp7b2uUM92PZjimgGce2Kebn39q9ka4Q4mm4pOwvvx0fI3fstsDNlKk95uYu8mPmSJdA6DYNp-VzLeAV2D-CgIZic3fdDPeonyJQljrJwxD9q4-q8Xsds9iOfyiXx7_YDcCHOsApWXeZTh9_fd5tnNl4NeqGsvpYgHqzqsYDshFbVUmGHsEwIIUSzAAiu-spvfr9ooF4UjgDwfzstaGLjWx)**

Every dollar you give helps us reach more people, break through the media lies, and stand strong against this madness.

**[Join the movement. Defend reality. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=14688f9415274f80b25c53dd3de2f629&_e=jXLd1jdBXEDF0bpEPyimYu-mqxsCUu7bX9tIGJyau71Lk8kzK5YMa7YoOLAezypvV1MlrJNmXDiMXXFhD9vFqH4qhkjanGdaWyzIlyBSFDYRHAYucPKl7PvWKPzNeAu927jZ0zaiswiIhNwGD_C5sIUTxEAUD4RmQFLB7f7ohY0wybGtApTdQ5f2ZBgl63lcgJ6-WsMOJMOlliMpp6iGuh88oOLOBLOl83AjjhFVaM2tOTJjZrkdhNa_Gt4VQU5NF-4Yvh5AnPqAD6y487ormhLGeTVBsrapfGVHabHWbJ9hR_HCJN0b07zabtT8TLzz_2wIaLasEyXbiB0WKYsK_boAxS8F2defERoNKic9VhjQomhQ4pQGC8yLcjpts5cY0nl0kT5eZYnGY3EeVCdqNNNLRbAJZVPIEjs5HFwAYBZQe5uWvqLDidPzHSMF3LqbXBrbYUdR13vxptbbaVJRBmVUXdKK5-mG5XXSHpmCSTUUi_GQAyZXjDvLOdr6Uy42RH5t4mFyMtNC5evErpy3qHXf78tElFQWVLd4LTIk8lWABZLw8ptDBYtZ-XUQRB0u)

Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Electoral College Team @ Voter Action Project
subject: Even founding father James Madison regretted it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Even after agreeing to the Electoral College, founder James Madison said the constitutional congress delegates were impaired by “ the hurrying influence produced by fatigue and impatience .”
Yes -- even the person who created it didn't like it and thought it was a cop-out.
We can't allow ourselves and our elections to be held back by this antiquated, backward system for even one more election. Pitch in $25 or more to help rid us of the Electoral College forever >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082225_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082225_1&amount=25]
The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy.
We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years .
And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote ( in 2016 ) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election.
Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082225_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082225_1&amount=35]
The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote.
We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082225_1&amount=25]
Onward,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082225_1&amount=20]

We can't allow ourselves and our elections to be held back by this antiquated, backward system for even one more election. Pitch in $25 or more to help rid us of the Electoral College forever >> [] Voter Action Project [] New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [] The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy. We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years . And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote ( in 2016 ) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election. Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote. We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California. We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [] Onward, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: Dudley Brown
subject: BREAKING: UN “Small Arms Treaty” enforcement scheme in the United States?!
body:
BOMBSHELL: New U.S. Department of Commerce firearms export rule mirrors UN global gun control requirements.
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewrciirjjeb775oadhsvb3r2gin4vbn5qsprit2zoyr1ilkx2dy4gu3nbry0s0i1c5j3g2yw9ywicuofo&__stmp=t1ei3d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Fellow Patriot,

**BREAKING:** **The White House could be on the cusp of adopting an ILLEGAL Biden-era rule to enforce the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in America!**

This comes just _WEEKS_ before the UN’s annual “Small Arms Treaty” conference in Geneva, Switzerland, where globalist one-world dictators will discuss their international gun control strategy for implementation and enforcement of the treaty around the world.

Last year, the Biden administration’s Commerce Department published a rule (**RIN 0694-AJ46**) that _directly mirrors the language in the UN “Small Arms Treaty_ ,” intended to bar the U.S. from supplying arms to civilians in other countries.

The Rule has remained unimplemented since then, but began to move last week -- just as we started packing for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” conference later this month:

**Your National Association for Gun Rights is calling on the Trump administration to:** **A)** **_Rescind this rule_** implementing the UN “Small Arms Treaty” using domestic policy; and **B)** Ensure that **_NO American taxpayer dollars_** are put toward implementing the Arms Trade Treaty, as directed by federal statute. **[So right now, before you do anything else, I’m calling on every single NAGR member to please sign your “NO UN GUN BAN” petition to President Trump, urging him to STOP THIS MADNESS>>](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonbtsl1et0ablcshfneolj3r81mqbfv2skp2dnxmt1fb9w9j3zrcd50hczt356y8uj1a68rk7eewwr445cipk58x3kt3otoj52ctzlfptx9p54hz4psqv1k1zvql3mogeyfm99vnov8c1rvyrba6nmtlwg3z9ctnraitt2uski69hg56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h)**
The Commerce Gun Control rule is directly tied back to the United Nations global gun control efforts, which insist that governments – not civilians – should have control of small arms and access to the tools of self-defense.

The rule doesn’t just flirt with globalist gun control, it directly parrots propaganda from the UN’s so-called “Small Arms Treaty” (the Arms Trade Treaty).

Line for line, the Commerce Gun Control Rule reads like it was ripped straight from the UN’s playbook; **the similarities aren’t a coincidence, they’re a blueprint.**

_This is the deep state working overtime to sneak America into compliance with, and even expand on, that dangerous treaty_.

And here’s the kicker... this Interim Final Rule blatantly violates Public Law 118-42, Section 537, which flat-out bans the use of taxpayer dollars to implement the Arms Trade Treaty.

If this rule were passed, it would have DISASTROUS economic implications for US firearms manufacturers and exporters.

More importantly, the United States would **aid in implementing the Arms Trade Treaty gun control and assist through our own policymaking process.**
**[Tell President Trump to TAKE ACTION>>](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonbtsl1et0ablcshfneolj3r81mqbfv2skp2dnxmt1fb9w9j3zrcd50hczt356y8uj1a68rk7eewwr445cipk58x3kt3otoj52ctzlfptx9p54hz4psqv1k1zvql3mogeyfm99vnov8c1rvyrba6nmtlwg3z9ctnraitt2uski69hg56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h)**
Like all gun control, the Commerce Department’s Gun Control Export Rule will only harm innocents around the world while restricting legitimate firearm exports domestically.

It **won’t stop** America’s adversaries from arming hostile actors.

It **won’t stop** rogue regimes from continuing to oppress their people with guns.

Warlords will **continue to wreak havoc** on civilian populations with guns. Innocent populations will only be further disarmed!

When I addressed the UN last year, I said to their faces that _“giving the state the monopoly of the possession of small arms is dangerous to all free-thinking individuals and liberty as a whole.”_

And that’s the same message I plan to deliver again later this month in Geneva.
**[SIGN YOUR PETITION to President Trump telling him that the United States has no business participating in GLOBAL CIVILIAN DISARMAMENT>>](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonbtsl1et0ablcshfneolj3r81mqbfv2skp2dnxmt1fb9w9j3zrcd50hczt356y8uj1a68rk7eewwr445cipk58x3kt3otoj52ctzlfptx9p54hz4psqv1k1zvql3mogeyfm99vnov8c1rvyrba6nmtlwg3z9ctnraitt2uski69hg56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h)**
**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
_President_
National Association for Gun Rights**

---

---

[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfklds8gxvq4a9fd3ruecnqnhp9pdyf1i3lth9lv0go7pqj5ye8w0b79jnif2r76g6zdr9xpqi2guet5txdiyiuvvv91z25h9il9rt0b52v31icn8f8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1io4wnao4s4mhi7uxbwsyk0c31azcokbnrhbcgcb7x33560nhd2ya6qswnfxxd5betk60461zp3809fki5gcsv50cpvfdipr6a5izn0inf2q84yx3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=5awlshcgzf9jx5misxsyrft2h1na3g5qeuwn8i98r1tis6fztzzpa7oafqm9hob9xaego97y77r8qw3pyu1ai6cbraydnp80b45robmxi48ik416fu98myjoomlu3odifwczb6r1ux9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=109osdyazmp2ppyxhu492m5261niel1bb3d50cezip5qn13iwa68e83zcuejsdijprphm0g2t3g9vui1m2u2ktm6fqakvx5nt57nexkv496a6moekkgrhix2c4gadziz3u50babfgsj6k4s15n46iaclt6kn4s5lhqc7bnzxsl92mw0l5i3pevnie771f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h) _The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. The National Association for Gun Rights' mailing address is P.O. Box 26989, Greenville, SC 29616. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is
[Gunrights.org](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4ho5x6p61dhu4st69in84efkgvggry6czwf2h57f4av3hrbevf4mnlawf12pj13v5nczyr3ax2dnrapjse6729k6bezcip5u8dw18gipn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ei3d&__onlt=h)_ Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense.

_To view this email as a web page, please click this link:[ view online](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xm=Yk02K3sfYIDiZJRwoO1uL3tanE1gKIf0rTj8pTVdXy1zXzZ3KI1iLSxzLJZ0XyZhnC%3D%3Ds&ocx_unsubscribe_link=https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewrciirjjeb775oadhsvb3r2gin4vbn5qsprit2zoyr1ilkx2dy4gu3nbry0s0i1c5j3g2yw9ywicuofo&__stmp=t1ei3d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&ocx_email_hash=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&ocx_unixtime_base36=t1ei3d&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)._
---

name: Robert Garcia
subject: My new district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I’m running to defend democracy
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789311/564961828/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZjMTkxMS02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbtU8muHnShP6wL1RJZvStEkbgrLuyuoytszwI54-do=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia.
We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack.
Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789312/564961831/789508428?refcode=250822_RG_newdistrict-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZjMTkxMS02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbtU8muHnShP6wL1RJZvStEkbgrLuyuoytszwI54-do=)
We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District.
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach.
**But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district.** In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789313/564961832/789508428?refcode=250822_RG_newdistrict-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZjMTkxMS02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbtU8muHnShP6wL1RJZvStEkbgrLuyuoytszwI54-do=)
I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line.
**So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence _us._ **
Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents _all of us._
**[Can you rush a grassroots donation today to help me kick off my campaign in this new, tougher district – and to help Democrats flip the House, end Trump’s power grab, and defend our sacred democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789314/564961833/789508428?refcode=250822_RG_newdistrict-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZjMTkxMS02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbtU8muHnShP6wL1RJZvStEkbgrLuyuoytszwI54-do=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789315/564961834/-309737922?refcode=250822_RG_newdistrict-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZjMTkxMS02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbtU8muHnShP6wL1RJZvStEkbgrLuyuoytszwI54-do=)
Thanks for being by my side. I'm ready to fight — let's get to work!
Robert

clean_body: I’m running to defend democracy = Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia. We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack. Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder. = We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District. This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach. But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district. In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that. = I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line. So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence us. Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents all of us. = = Thanks for being by my side. I'm ready to fight — let's get to work! Robert = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

This is step one in taking back the Senate from the Republicans.
#

Peter, it’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because **[I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93936?refcode=em20250822-9309&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9309%2E614464%2ENUNTwU)**
Look... **It’s been months of Trump 2.0,** and we’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn't a safe blue seat, folks._
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans. **[So if you can, please split $10 between Chris’s campaign and State Democrats Committee today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93936?refcode=em20250822-9309&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9309%2E614464%2ENUNTwU)**
