name: Andy Kim
subject: Every American deserves to retire with dignity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In New Jersey, one in five residents depends on Social Security to take care of themselves and their families.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113789716/564963401/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTUwZTFjNC02YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dFiqorZ5kzo78UWT_N4ut72KYqDiv8cUJRiqahNkIts=&emci=f4dcc839-677f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4150e1c4-6a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Every American deserves to retire with dignity. Earlier this month, we celebrated 90 years since the Social Security Act was signed into law. For generations, this landmark program has kept millions of seniors out of poverty, provided support for people with disabilities, and ensured families could rely on the benefits they earned through a lifetime of hard work. But we face real challenges in protecting Social Security. **The Trump Administration is hollowing out the Social Security Administration, making it harder for Americans to access the benefits they've worked for and earned.** In New Jersey, one in five residents depends on Social Security to take care of themselves and their families. At a recent community conversation in West Windsor, I heard directly from people who are deeply worried about losing those benefits, from retirees who rely on monthly checks to make ends meet, to caregivers who depend on survivor benefits to support loved ones. Social Security is a promise we make to each other that we will take care of our community. For 90 years, it has been a pillar of economic security for millions, and it's our responsibility to ensure it remains strong for future generations. **We can't afford to let partisan politics chip away at this commitment.** Protecting Social Security means protecting the dignity, stability, and security of countless families in New Jersey and across America. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: Andy Roth
subject: Fox News Spotlights Our Work Battling the‘Uniparty’
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLQlxy_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerCtbIz84fIfwsp4xnF9-2BbMBd0wP9PkmHQxmBsYTs5lPAT4o8fk3pehc-2BOu-2FNFjMB471jqYuSjEZHi3kjP7ZN9a0cXqhG8QhfPqOrJChTfshVHaUUSq0uFJyZDFLC8DMQUwJpwyEuGWTT4ls7nrjyH3xdDZZb0XdRwvRtTSY8ewuFbswUQbUPwpeQUQa-2BAHLff-2BK3eLIAvIKgacyfS4hIJk1XpVeou0B64c-2FHPHocFhCQ-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, August in D.C. is usually a sleepy month, as lawmakers head home and the city slows to a crawl. But we use this to our advantage. When Washington checks out, things only ramp up for us! Word is spreading how our state freedom caucuses are becoming the incubators of the anti-Swamp movement that President Trump started across the country. This momentum is catching national attention because our lawmakers are holding feet to the fire in state politics to get it done. Here are some of the highlights.
---
|
---
**FOX NEWS INTERVIEW** We have been saying for years that red states are being governed by the Uniparty of Democrats and liberal Republicans. So much so that it got the attention of Fox News. Click on the image below to read the article and watch the interview that I did with them earlier this week. This is all because of the amazing work that our State Freedom Caucuses are doing across the country!
---

**REDISTRICTING VICTORY?** Over a month ago, the **Missouri Freedom Caucus** demanded that Governor Kehoe call a special session to address congressional redistricting to help President Trump secure another U.S. House seat. Hardly any other Republicans in the legislature supported the idea. The Jefferson City Swamp wanted nothing to do with it. Commenting on the idea of redoing the maps, liberal Republican Speaker Pro Tem Chad Perkins said, “We’ve already done that. To do it again would be out of character with the way Missouri operates.” The pressure from the Missouri Freedom Caucus and the White House is proving to be too much. On Thursday, President Trump posted on social media that Missouri was "IN" for redistricting and the Lieutenant Governor and Treasurer have publicly stated that they are for it. It's only a matter of time before Governor Kehoe sets a date for the special session.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, August in D.C. is usually a sleepy month, as lawmakers head home and the city slows to a crawl. But we use this to our advantage. When Washington checks out, things only ramp up for us! Word is spreading how our state freedom caucuses are becoming the incubators of the anti-Swamp movement that President Trump started across the country. This momentum is catching national attention because our lawmakers are holding feet to the fire in state politics to get it done. Here are some of the highlights. | FOX NEWS INTERVIEW We have been saying for years that red states are being governed by the Uniparty of Democrats and liberal Republicans. So much so that it got the attention of Fox News. Click on the image below to read the article and watch the interview that I did with them earlier this week. name: Rick Scott
subject: I grew up in public housing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
This country gave me everything. I won’t let it slip away.| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1955fed46fc04df5ada794b53250ad45&_e=nZCS_w4K39TJ-CLlTxPZ9Mld74SpsVsssrAxKSZXbIiqKlBwEOBl_bwroaUDKb8lAg6lbo1D8p1Q4kQx-y1mT66HX3WEV5xy-xRXoGy3vkn3x4EEm-BrhMO0PmHFNkHlQNWghei66sX2RA-inSxrG26mA6KD-vC5SZ9zLpmruX_FkWAl-m5c9j7m28b4ayY0Xd7PjfMRrYRJTC1s49BhHvCZULCyppZr_2v9af3aRQSLQVJxx4iSjShFcKu54ZnrXwztMEr-1hB6ItsCzGNVClI68qZvl2KozVVmMxE4tFQQRylZvncMeFxiFJKj4pHG9vv7nUxcwX0qjYCfLziodVTRQC6EhdW1Ce6gv-T4cZiZqr1RjlgPRfVrc-J__KH_D-5hXU_HyLqhKp0Celi1AwZYnOj4Sws8AUUdvu9qOMnIBDKlwVj4owMZa9tYTmkx8cpv682PCyYjyMEcv87yjm8LOeFq7UVM-woZvBbvRiDgz_tgknEKtH1hG7xM0GquuvmbN6wuoo_jAaodFpnFmjDutL7HZMMhW4NTl22NsZU%3D)
---
I want to tell you something personal — something that’s shaped every decision I’ve made as a businessman, as Governor of Florida, and now as a U.S. Senator. I didn’t come from money. I didn’t go to Ivy League schools. I wasn’t handed anything. I was born to a hardworking, courageous single mom. She worked long hours as a clerk and took on second jobs just to keep the lights on. We lived in public housing andI started working at a young age to help where I could. At 18, I enlisted in the Navy. It gave me discipline, a chance to serve my country, and a belief that if you work hard and never give up, anything is possible in America. Eventually, I built a business from scratch. I created jobs, signed paychecks, and lived the very American Dream that today’s Democrat leadership is working so hard to dismantle. **That’s why I’m in this fight.** I’ve experienced the greatness of this country firsthand. I’ve seen what opportunity can do. But I’ve also seen what happens when big government steps in, taxes too much, spends without restraint, and treats freedom like a problem to be managed, not a right to be cherished. Now, in 2025, we face an America under siege by radical policies from far-left Democrats that would’ve crushed my family and my future if they had been in place when I was coming up. So, here’s my promise: I’ll never stop fighting for families like mine growing up. But I can’t do it alone. The national Democrats are raising mountains of money from Silicon Valley, Hollywood, and hedge fund billionaires. They’re watching closely to see if we fall behind. Let’s prove them wrong.
---

clean_body: This country gave me everything. I won’t let it slip away.| | | I want to tell you something personal — something that’s shaped every decision I’ve made as a businessman, as Governor of Florida, and now as a U.S. Senator. I didn’t come from money. I didn’t go to Ivy League schools. I wasn’t handed anything. I was born to a hardworking, courageous single mom. She worked long hours as a clerk and took on second jobs just to keep the lights on. We lived in public housing andI started working at a young age to help where I could. At 18, I enlisted in the Navy. It gave me discipline, a chance to serve my country, and a belief that if you work hard and never give up, anything is possible in America. Eventually, I built a business from scratch. I created jobs, signed paychecks, and lived the very American Dream that today’s Democrat leadership is working so hard to dismantle. That’s why I’m in this fight. I’ve experienced the greatness of this country firsthand. I’ve seen what opportunity can do. But I’ve also seen what happens when big government steps in, taxes too much, spends without restraint, and treats freedom like a problem to be managed, not a right to be cherished. Now, in 2025, we face an America under siege by radical policies from far-left Democrats that would’ve crushed my family and my future if they had been in place when I was coming up. So, here’s my promise: I’ll never stop fighting for families like mine growing up. But I can’t do it alone. The national Democrats are raising mountains of money from Silicon Valley, Hollywood, and hedge fund billionaires. They’re watching closely to see if we fall behind. Let’s prove them wrong. Thank you,Rick Scott | | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Fellow conservative, with your support, I can continue to protect our conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

name: Ilhan for Congress
subject: 100 more Republican seats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump has made it clear from the start that he wants to rig the system and cement a permanent Republican majority
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1774%2E791427%2EmB5IO-)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250822-1-180&t=2&akid=1774%2E791427%2EmB5IO-)
Friend — Trump has made it clear from the start that he wants to rig the system and cement a permanent Republican majority, no matter what the voters have to say. Now we are seeing that plan come together.
Last night, Texas approved an unprecedented mid-decade redistricting that eliminates five Democratic congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering.
Republicans are not even trying to pretend that it’s about making “fair maps” anymore. They are openly telling us that they want to win the midterms and preserve their power. **Trump is openly saying that he wants to add 100 more Republican seats until “politics is over.”**
In other words, he wants a one-party dictatorship where voters have no way to change who is in power.
The question now is: Are we going to let the GOP get away with it?
Ilhan Omar believes that Democrats need to fight fire with fire. We need to do everything and anything we can to keep our elections competitive and block the Republicans from creating an unfair system where other parties can no longer compete.
If you feel the same, we need you to be part of our movement. We need all hands on deck, putting pressure on Trump, but also on Democrats to stay in this fight and never back down to the authoritarians.
**[Please, chip in to Ilhan Omar’s campaign as we continue to organize for victory. Grassroots, mass movement politics are our only way forward as Republicans seek to rig the system and continue to push their far-right, anti-immigrant, anti-worker vision of America.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250822-1-180&t=3&akid=1774%2E791427%2EmB5IO-)

Once Upon a Time,
There Was a Mom....

Exhausted, foggy, and constantly running on empty.

Until she discovered something that
changed everything.

That "something" is nitric oxide
– the molecule of life –

and now you can watch how it transformed
real moms’ lives in our

Event Replay
with Dr. Avery Jackson

his wife and dietitian Caramarie Jackson,
and Kimberly Fletcher of Moms for America.

What you'll discover:

“Mommy brain” is real – Research from the American Psychological Association confirms cognitive changes in mothers postpartum,
often worsened by inflammation and vascular stress.

Fatigue isn’t just emotional – A 2023 NIH review found that endothelial dysfunction (poor blood flow) and low nitric oxide levels
correlate with chronic fatigue in women.

The miracle molecule – Nobel Prize-winning research shows nitric oxide improves blood flow, oxygen delivery, and hormone
regulation – critical for moms juggling intense physical and emotional loads.

Watch the full replay here → [http://email.mg.momsforamerica.us/c/eJxskstyszgUhJ8GdnEJAQIWWhjb2I7v_-_gy8YlSwIrIAkLgZM8_ZSTqalZZKkunVN9uj96EQwfi772mA0X5L7fFMfofE56l-HCi1jguUxLIhSW5UBq2RbaEMmNoGTQtS7HXhSGcYQQ8lwuiagvkrctKflz72HZH1PJ_MOaoNcTUCt7v__7y342HFMiGyJK9T_tOYZiEkUs8khCaEE4ubKoKGASuVz1wmglubK4MZp11Aqt3BvmrCCcEcgYi4CPAkgBJR7zkjAEfnilrsAQwBDEEHqh7wFvAKMCFolHCSIxSfzACcCvB9b4Zm3TOv7QgZkDs1qoaiDbslXMDKiWDsy-zb9YQ2glVOnADFFGOYlJEYeOn1GtLKF2zhx_vFvYx3k3-UrfjYH79-rP8lM6EPWOP57b-f02jItoCdyaXn4SEcpyo0iN32DWsmleHb1ksducHZh9-AiEnR_InTcuwekjrT739-nmPAz-bDsDj2S9LR4ri2i6zYClo8f2bdLUGwemFVxPrvH5NT_stxqCE8nC5etKnILdNJmr1X3zF7EmWF43i3R8ikKeZ_uZA9PdoRmX-y0ZtVnedA5Mx5M3Mdvm6QScAYLmcAzVrN9_XT2bCqNWvV6P5uLQNr0Zzcb5jOWrdujW-pu4xirUTP7KfBqsItS8B3zEXcntTTNMGuFqI0qh8LWrq5fvKNzG6F4wbvDzVXbKNZg1D1HXokWRE4DyqT8bcVvdGcrxTy2i7V8e2lTcuBZTLS-_sm4xt5f_aLT46fJXiz2G_wQAAP__bbwTCw]

Ready to act on what you've learned?

Cardio Miracle combines vitamin D3, L-arginine, L-citrulline, and antioxidants – all scientifically shown to stimulate nitric
oxide and nourish overall health at any age. In a 2020 clinical study (Pharmacognosy Research), this blend increased nitric oxide
bioavailability by 50%, helping reduce oxidative stress, brain fog, and fatigue.

Start your Cardio Miracle transformation today →

clean_body: Watch the webinar recap with Dr. Avery, M.D., Cara Jackson and Kimberly Fletcher If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Once Upon a Time, There Was a Mom.... Exhausted, foggy, and constantly running on empty. Until she discovered something that changed everything. That "something" is nitric oxide – the molecule of life – and now you can watch how it transformed real moms’ lives in our Event Replay with Dr. Avery Jackson his wife and dietitian Caramarie Jackson, and Kimberly Fletcher of Moms for America. What you'll discover: “Mommy brain” is real – Research from the American Psychological Association confirms cognitive changes in mothers postpartum, often worsened by inflammation and vascular stress. Fatigue isn’t just emotional – A 2023 NIH review found that endothelial dysfunction (poor blood flow) and low nitric oxide levels correlate with chronic fatigue in women. The miracle molecule – Nobel Prize-winning research shows nitric oxide improves blood flow, oxygen delivery, and hormone regulation – critical for moms juggling intense physical and emotional loads. Watch the full replay here → [] Ready to act on what you've learned? Cardio Miracle combines vitamin D3, L-arginine, L-citrulline, and antioxidants – all scientifically shown to stimulate nitric oxide and nourish overall health at any age. In a 2020 clinical study (Pharmacognosy Research), this blend increased nitric oxide bioavailability by 50%, helping reduce oxidative stress, brain fog, and fatigue. Start your Cardio Miracle transformation today → [] Every mom deserves a happy (and healthy) story. name: Phil Weiser
subject: Colorado needs a Governor who knows how to fight for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
When President Trump violates the Constitution to attack your rights, I take action, and sue in court to block his unlawful schemes.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113790577/564966304/1239926708?refcode=email_082225_experience&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRmZjZkYi02YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mF8d6YZxKCtWfxsIe56fpoDbBDemZt6RwZYGKE-LtZY=&emci=48eaf5b3-b17d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=294ff6db-6c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=51844520) Friend, it’s Phil Weiser. Since Donald Trump returned to the White House, his administration has flouted countless laws and norms, acting as though they are above the law at every turn. They’ve fired independent monitors who oversee public agencies and hold them accountable. They’ve fired nonpartisan public servants unlawfully. And again and again they’ve infringed on our fundamental rights enumerated in the Constitution. It’s putting our institutions — and our public servants — to the test. Some have responded by seeking compromise, or outright placating to the President’s demands and illegal actions. _Not me. _ **When you are up against a lawless bully, they don’t back down when people coddle them or try to cozy up to them, but only when people stand up to them and say “no”.** So when President Trump violates the Constitution to attack your rights, I don’t seek common ground or make nice. _I take action, and sue in court to block his unlawful schemes. _ So far, we’ve taken the Trump administration to court 35 times to defend Coloradans’ rights and freedoms, securing injunctions to halt many of the President’s most harmful executive orders in their tracks. **We know that the attacks on Colorado, its people, and our rights aren't going to stop anytime soon. That’s why Colorado needs a Governor who has experience taking on Trump — _and winning._ And that’s exactly what I’ve done.** **[So if you’re with me, please, make a donation to my campaign today and help me build a campaign strong enough to win this race and defend the principles we believe in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113790578/564966305/1955520693?refcode=email_082225_experience&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRmZjZkYi02YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mF8d6YZxKCtWfxsIe56fpoDbBDemZt6RwZYGKE-LtZY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113790579/564966306/-1555140616?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_082225_experience&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRmZjZkYi02YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mF8d6YZxKCtWfxsIe56fpoDbBDemZt6RwZYGKE-LtZY=)

Peter,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1b55ce421bd248e1bd47c797001ed48d&_e=MPy3RsRD8U2ISyh8aE8SHE1BJdhTLrIcSEu42TQY1ZqTGYwxIiWRyP3nUc-CrInV6rIULmyOlKy5ShzNH0Ts1Na6d85pCGWWetjRWUYCoqFGkWCvop2ZRl-kQqag1YGlXImxRp3_oKnLXOQG3Y9ttosPHeLUKYY6Lo6OUOAM_xvrndlxldOqvnnEt4NY52Rn2kWfSe3dEvcM3SUe6cHWt2GxxmxK1CHdcVXRnphkWAt9N_IXSS4gZvVfJ_dA35jt_RkNIHhLBINKSAw5nZwPbUZ5n7SbARlatuk35anrqAujeJMYlhQXq_R3qvXiqjljHM41eObI9Rg_c3G6xiRbOWPYDrLTzUrSmttnHACNBx7VuVloXw2G0WlKtI6w7eobZm7eqILtJ4p2dSvlOjFrxaFnIp8B-CDAmIp7n-7XAM5DzNxe--bUQP5LQnwjEUefZjAjJ_nUfaGEDGfaNc0vqDtE8AfTCELz3Qjs7X6lZkK0Qzwi9psY5rbMWts9XAmEH5ql-fhon_GkrZpFknM3dD-hy73M8YGGOsZO3S74XiaQAAXDF1UVNCMYpm4cEuOBQ5rz05QNsWDk1nTgChL1RBBcm3wO6HA4Lknm5R22xKwP4SCClBB3gx26g9_noaTU)

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

clean_body: Peter, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

Listen, I’m a big believer that a good burger can make a day 10x better.
So, when I was in Southwest Virginia, I had to stop at the legendary Burger Bar. 🍔
Small businesses like Burger Bar are the backbone of our Commonwealth – they keep us fed, fuel local economies, and serve as community hangouts. And now more than ever, they need our support.
We need an Attorney General who’s ready to take on corrupt special interests that stifle competition from small businesses, crowding them out of our communities. At the end of the day, when monopolies win, local jobs disappear – and we lose hometown gems like Burger Bar.
I’m ready to go to bat for Virginia’s small businesses. But first, we need to win this race.
Will you chip in $10 – the cost of a burger – to help us win this fight and give small businesses a champion they can trust in the Attorney General’s office? I can’t do this without your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=10]

name: EMILYs List
subject: What you heard about EMILYs List on MSNBC
body:
You can watch the full clip here >> |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113790796/564966929/1716793864?refcode=WUEFE846_20250822_MorningJoeRR_PL_v1s4&sourceid=1056851&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2M3ZGZkNy02ZDdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-2GJg-j-L_lVBBq_sMlvBgTrK1hZKdv1x339F3ZBHLA=) Peter,

Yesterday on _MSNBC's Morning Joe_ , political analyst Lauren Leader highlighted EMILYs List Action's new poll from Impact Research — and why Democratic pro-choice women are the leaders voters are looking for: _"Women candidates, where they run, do an incredible job of linking to the pain points in their communities, especially on economic issues... women candidates especially, many of whom outperformed, are so good at connecting with people on those kitchen table issues."_ Here's what the data showed: women make up the majority of the electorate, they're struggling the most in the Trump-tanked economy, and they're desperate for leaders who will fight for them. EMILYs List recruits, trains, and supports the candidates who can connect with voters on these issues and deliver real results.

We need you now more than ever. Will you give up one coffee a month and join our Sustainer Circle program at $5 a month? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]

I’d like you to hear from one of our Sustainer Circle members, Donna Maebori, about why monthly giving is so important to our work:
“Since the 1990s, I had become politically active every now and then, mainly attending rallies and marches. In 2004, I learned, somehow, about canvassing for John Kerry for president and went to my first-ever experience, which was followed by several more times of door-knocking. The people managing it were really friendly and efficient. Over time, I learned they were from OLCV. In 2016, after a certain election, I knew I wanted to be consistently active politically. Thinking back to my experience with OLCV, remembering it was good, I volunteered and have been on the Washington County Leadership Team ever since. Without a single exception, OLCV’s friendliness and efficiency are always present. OLCV is organized, effective, clear on its goals and purpose, with good-hearted people doing the work. Generally, the League is considered the political arm of the environmental movement. With government policy able to produce large societal changes, getting persons into office who live out environmental justice principles is absolutely vital to a viable future for the earth and all her inhabitants. Each year, it becomes easier to donate, having developed deep confidence in the quality and care given to this important work by everyone involved. In fact, it is a joy to give to OLCV. As a monthly giver myself, I invite you to join me in the Sustainer Circle!”
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=B9Y3ZWVWtCpQrbJVZhQtCCrW6OlpJQA/Ypjwi4FvpsAenzKSByMCQrSenBtDVFbrAN1qtx/0dhwvcHqSF7ym+hUNF/PwDmQJUaGTmcKYO0dUDx4zQ8irCT1DGiiUbOQO [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=B9Y3ZWVWtCpQrbJVZhQtCCrW6OlpJQA/Ypjwi4FvpsAenzKSByMCQrSenBtDVFbrAN1qtx/0dhwvcHqSF7ym+hUNF/PwDmQJUaGTmcKYO0dUDx4zQ8irCT1DGiiUbOQO]
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=B9Y3ZWVWtCpQrbJVZhQtCCrW6OlpJQA/Ypjwi4FvpsAenzKSByMCQrSenBtDVFbrAN1qtx/0dhwvcHqSF7ym+hUNF/PwDmQJUaGTmcKYO0dUDx4zQ8irCT1DGiiUbOQO [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=B9Y3ZWVWtCpQrbJVZhQtCCrW6OlpJQA/Ypjwi4FvpsAenzKSByMCQrSenBtDVFbrAN1qtx/0dhwvcHqSF7ym+hUNF/PwDmQJUaGTmcKYO0dUDx4zQ8irCT1DGiiUbOQO] Volunteers and Sustaining Circle members like Donna truly are our secret weapon. By donating their time, knocking on doors and talking to voters face-to-face, attending events, and educating others through Letters to the Editor, they make a huge impact. The supermajorities we elected in 2024 are a testament to that. But where does it all start? With your monthly gift.
If 8 more people sign up to give just $5 a month right now, we can recruit 10 new volunteers to OLCV! [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2] Think of the reach we would be able to have in the 2026 election and the difference we could make — that is even more needed right now.
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=B9Y3ZWVWtCpQrbJVZhQtCCrW6OlpJQA/Ypjwi4FvpsAenzKSByMCQrSenBtDVFbrAN1qtx/0dhwvcHqSF7ym+hUNF/PwDmQJUaGTmcKYO0dUDx4zQ8irCT1DGiiUbOQO]
Despite the tough times we are living through, we can and must continue making progress protecting our climate and environment right here in Oregon and it all starts with you . Will you give $5 a month now? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
Thank you,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Laurel.png]
Laurel Viles (she/her)
OLCV Engagement Organizer

Our weekly newsletter has all the news you can use and more!

ON THIS DAY (August 18, 2025): One hundred and five years ago, the 19th Amendment to the Constitution, guaranteeing American women’s right to vote, was ratified.

To be clear; although voting/civil rights icons such as Ida B. Well, Mary Church Terrell, Sojourner Truth and other Black women were pushing the suffrage movement as well - Black women didn’t fully have access to the ballot until 1965 with the passage of the Voting Rights Act (45 years later).

None of us are free until all of us are free!

State supreme courts have always made big decisions, but the nationalization of American politics – where national partisan politics drive voter behavior in local elections – has elevated the controversy over state supreme court decisions on issues such as reproductive rights This November, Pennsylvanians will be voting on whether or not to retain three state Supreme Court judges. Though this might seem like a simple down-ballot election, the stakes couldn’t be higher. These three non-partisan seats are crucial to retaining the current fairly-drawn electoral district maps.

Founding CEO of NPP, Kadida Kenner, is cohosting an event about how you can support a fair and independent Pennsylvania Supreme Court.

Don't miss the panel discussion on how justice, democracy and the courts directly impact our lives and communities.

(https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz6-2FNyCk7eQYnESFIGNxHDSADV-2Bf5cMBYXmycF7TQ6fbZcDRV22gDQw1lVewgXlUsfg-3DCnsX_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjjyaD9sW32DI7QLiNr344DKExnQkKIpItkGP4J4XsZozVxg4AreD7DDVPQ6dUq7D7jDlwrv7uLCE1lEpVP3BZfpHECa0G-2BysqLBcBlagHWjMazHDCiwwDM5wiDHaJ3YRCipm2NYfp-2F6w4vJEmDX7jCC
A federal appeals court (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YqekfGyadfyRGkoW9vaClkF3PNvA5YD2YBf9qZhapo10vHgRZsc9t7wV2eA8PM2Fo9lw64QHgoZkjTeFTnoZRDAHdjBe-2BkZx57spLecKdYz2WivEDBJIW1HCzQRVHAinTA-3D-3DYUUv_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjgiAO9FpEnrWaJVFjK-2FytNSnYn9WrZ23tWKhVY-2FXJqTSV-2BPM-2FW13ccZK3s3UtKNbzbICQt-2FJiwOHTX-2FWa7WtA2rqy52k-2B2cYd1G2nMJnIo-2FdbKAmgqxl9G6T6fJVA12CEZkXchskJwsl4JpCvuKq-2Fay upheld Texas’ requirement that potential voters must list their identification information in their application for a mail-in ballot.

Stricter voter ID requirements would likely not have prevented people from casting fraudulent ballots in the vast majority of cases charged in Pennsylvania over the past decade, a Votebeat and Spotlight PA analysis shows (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YqekfGyadfyRGkoW9vaClkGmufMHgJlF6rnwDn17scFKfCjUt614SDrPoar-2BjFdeu7CE6A1f0CYerouJ7ev7Ce4WV6H-2B9WVIP8sw56hM-2BqBv2eFUVuHwqmkGA7u44qPJxCkmtwwLqRUZsmxoqmSbEwWcWUVkFlde1z5a1LyaFKcfQFtM_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjjTglJ2wHCRIdKFGzoaTQl5D3Wv0j5diyeQiim-2B4CCwA7Xwf6VHSVaMEqimQcsju6HeiL4gAS39kcw0J3U4O4xHe7IuK6aJBGB7-2BgXh4AUwZOLEkt4RAemhgUyc8C73zfbhWX2Bz-2FlUW-2F428Ls5udeo

Black and Latino voters are more likely to lack specific IDs required and to encounter mismatches in their documents. Over a quarter of Black and Latino citizens do not have a driver’s license with their current name or address, compared (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YsToItNJFrEzQ4jQvbCqNzjC8C2aj82-2FaK12o-2B8suWm2KWxR07E7n5DqUw-2F7tl93uEkiN7lt07YRwZc8SYrMO-2BCrYEdwZhFpehT4KgjBcK7JblqxAypBXBG2tWO2pIoHPPYW-2Bt4v9suSRC5a5uEgccuNS022O-2BWUI-2FWfmBfWlGqbzxR9zILPHg-2BnOUUGTA3ucA-3D-3Dee_P_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjgUpI7dhdZr5rYlWphV-2FUB3tvIaaw2Was9pyXjmRU8Y0zJWVlWsvug9tfXejRPtUucZL3ZYrIgw-2F0k-2FYkbSgtCMMc0x8bWZnX3T4awsaAoGUNBAp9NLDxGIhDG9xpAbpQPfn0TSUufvhqfevULVVWYp to 12% of the national average.

Disparities aren’t just an unfortunate side effect. In some cases, it’s compounded by policies that make those same IDs even harder to get.”
Texas Democrats, (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yvoli0BpMoY7Su6YCR-2BdeC7ZwSa-2F6VTxS-2Fl-2FfELGR1dnXICK6f8ZzjKLD5mBOt583sto02Yxrre0hxERhoZaDlNIqgXbuRShxv3J0YEBry1hijT1rl3uwLvkrT-2BGkMtjEg-3D-3DYgY3_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrji8XK9fuDmkNjE5WrFeALatxgxzPPT3-2BdHitU9Xu24KBAHiacKglupaIsLegAymtzQTHKbQKsJUETkHUKK2hXMhy1y2lhWx-2Bv22e3KGybs7NNhLLZdSGH-2FypaBEaTR-2BH-2FxjfrkKE2PEfqncBgBhc3r9 had left the state to halt an aggressive redistricting, returned to Texas and ended their two-week walkout on Monday, paving the way for Republicans (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yvoli0BpMoY7Su6YCR-2BdeC49RG1sptpDx57RUMg92CezQAK173iteU8nFcfF5s-2F6JyZ3Gq8PKii0m81UvWDLSHtYNpnKVZDXDvYQzvgQ1xd2FvOBshUKoBtqV20wTB0jdFIfGslE6VcdcYUzRhkiJUI-3DL8AR_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjiaAXBAqoowrYCAoHH5DdxdESOa9LEKos4rWpCS15T6hAuRoxu1aABnwjsDTSOP0zAfDT6ceh8gE9a-2B5fBjhY0zYdqq4NN0uxfSluG9DO9CDgIDqvUdu10sV7E978gLJodUfDvm2kqhYO0WyAmlcIi1 to pass a redrawn congressional map called for by Trump.

This map creates five new congressional districts in areas President Donald Trump won by double digits in 2024. The state Senate is expected to pass it as soon as this week and send it to Gov. Greg Abbott (R) for his signature.

Common Cause softened its stance on redistricting (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yi-2Bn9DnSR-2Fyb1JZw20FMZsXFHg91-2FNVCcBjCPbtM355UifwN2IbE6TUjp5rVPzYKLQX9W19pj-2FyQ6Yjql6ixwdV0eHUZ60OGkNJu8Q3fdg3u-2F0B4fu-2FJ9UJN9ADriGiRurVtBpBi1qVj8NzYg1Th4fg-3DeFjP_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjhObbzDsrAoJRA23dFm749xkHw4tkCV9IkrJBII59rkiVpC8a8aLUvkkUtPoHzEavvW8OYm-2BLO0f7P6F8res4CxkLSUMkn5ii-2FcSx5FfZwitjIF0ajyEBBtq3RiTFJD-2B-2FeLj-2FocyzTtCRL4-2BcRfmSTy after previously equating Gavin Newsom with Texas Republicans.
Trump announced (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yq-2B8h3xVKPHApJAs080ky-2BBPtJ9xYFg5JzZ4Ozav4zxfF0mo-2FE-2FfcBVBIZrK21U-2F8Y-2FqPg4F67oMhNt-2BMk9uKIQSAsjFPjaD-2BLhpUC94blY3Q3BEndDqRAVqTs2vi9A7XXkh6I3zdRsUgBLtGpqZIfcQgnr74MbfgMUgH53n5bzhftNN_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjhX0zYY7usdzN2vTOTXmL8wrXcvRm0h4Uod8CjgRJUjEjcB0tAv5KJlDcOJmrOWHXaeCtE7pZtcwSp-2FSP7WSU-2Bw-2FQrWiO4CUYdLcJBONvmmuIKCIWVtWlxtRhV-2ByNidTDAr57hwxTeirRTxHWACgu1G a major effort to seize control of American elections.

Attempting to implement any of these policies via executive order would be flagrantly illegal and flatly unconstitutional — a power grab.

Three key Pennsylvania (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YjNKIdNrv5VEsblzXR2sx1vTCgBpDrttB5MgW-2FN1Ui8yLf9CLbx1CEj8KpK5wpcrEgMtDXqK7wa1Gw9RjV6GRyjx58Y4zD9KfjJprc5EObSqjjTJ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjgiXoEssqCbbDfEW-2BY-2Fq8kCRgeoL1AtN6f1UgEVyxI4lJrL0s2e8r8iDhGf2PwPs64EyoKtIKZ7pMKuKZnrUKzqtbJ2t3LKpQwvURLy7WePFN9fq9OS4-2F4OAQkTKfhFv5mRwJvlXbcBtuSLwXtVHtY9 U.S. congressional Republicans are 100% in favor of Trump’s call to ban mail-in ballots before next year’s elections. Pres.

On Tuesday, U.S. Senator Dave McCormick, Congressman Lloyd Smucker, and Congressman Scott Perry each voiced support for the president’s ban.
Pennsylvania told the U.S. Justice Department that it will not give federal officials a version of the state’s voter rolls (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yg0J2YES5j8Jy9tazUAuaUEt5mlhQH6G6TWakQ3Eo9dldz8Mf8LGpzml3WxIXWKHdOffPSuoI4Y06Fg17TvuEjvgbi6OEQ8xLBpn2NqWS3HKbFLka7l7l18Sfmx4OHp6dl5rHfdlBJF6wLTWA7wKe-2F6YEN4TnTmHxfSGVla1xIQ8jUXX8dcDHbbdHDo5wwzmp0gYJ7HguJLIAN1sE0Rlu2rQOQNAytU64yCY-2F7DgeazOeA-2BxgR-2BPasKIHRtQ8dJeNu946Z1oy66ZYmXfGoNjh0YkFNVHLLGcH3J0i-2BBeyGh9fLcZ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjgsyl14fSeDcYDq8uGPWgO7e-2B-2F6vThE-2B6EHmqQRcx03x3eEuZsLR671p6rhtjrcTnxgkZPpdjbaQLBDt6xsLCgOvQs1uJyjZ1YXKv3yRGjXGxS89ifCT0hn-2FHBEwhAdqUv8UpJZVXrRqmZkQowwsMww that contains personal information, rebuffing a request from the agency.
For the first time since 2018 (https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yvoli0BpMoY7Su6YCR-2BdeC49RG1sptpDx57RUMg92Cez-2BgqdCo5FN9tb0OLUU7bJ-2BlGmLlQVoqI7zi-2Biq3gRKcl1bMp2m8P8395duSgLW53xmfC1VpkFKb7mGBPz9mc3RY7kLVJJt9JPWTg5SpZXHieSPS4Z4P9hPdYQY4XM89IB1QV13j1V9nuIvjF-2BW6eU2MgBGGKxQnyHHkGuPIHQwLJQaZktJD3ypmmE-2FxE-2Fj8vq4v5c_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7ed01KT9dof69aqGDTFjSz13RceOKHx3dUHlmfHyrjiPa3C-2FJiZghB0w2LjpZayalWcaXbU3lcz-2FGZdv5tgubPijc5XyDiQMHc0LiRsPH8P8m9rYYVWV2dM6qOFm1ZgmA3TJi0fTPMZ4l4DdND9boe2G0vBBDi-2BeUUd3Pn6l2GLy57vU4qsm5hSWzeXho-2FJL more new voters nationwide chose to be Republicans than Democrats last year.

Of the 30 states that track voter registration by political party, Democrats lost ground to Republicans in every single one between the 2020 and 2024 elections — and often by a lot.

clean_body: Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! Our weekly newsletter has all the news you can use and more! If you haven't been to our website ( in a while, check it out! We have added some new content. In Case You Missed It: Episode 10 of Slingshot The Podcast Has Dropped ( From quarantine nights when COVID had us stuck in the house with D-Nice and DJ Jazzy Jeff to the joy of spinning in spaces where people could be their full selves, this episode is all about the power of music, community, and using your platform to speak truth. Don't Miss Out:Episode 11 of Slingshot The Podcast drops next Thursday, August 28th at 12PM ET Watch it on YouTube ( or listen wherever you get your podcasts (Apple, Spotify, etc.) From @newpennsylvania ( ON THIS DAY (August 18, 2025): One hundred and five years ago, the 19th Amendment to the Constitution, guaranteeing American women’s right to vote, was ratified. To be clear; although voting/civil rights icons such as Ida B. Well, Mary Church Terrell, Sojourner Truth and other Black women were pushing the suffrage movement as well - Black women didn’t fully have access to the ballot until 1965 with the passage of the Voting Rights Act (45 years later). None of us are free until all of us are free! #Vote () Poster by Karyn Jimenez-Elliott ( ON INSTAGRAM ( State supreme courts have always made big decisions, but the nationalization of American politics – where national partisan politics drive voter behavior in local elections – has elevated the controversy over state supreme court decisions on issues such as reproductive rights ( COVID-19 restrictions ( environmental protection ( and more. Most Pennsylvania voters ignore judicial elections − a political scientist explains w ( they matter. ( The U.S. Supreme Court ( set to hear oral argument in Callais v. Landry — the high-stakes Louisiana redistricting case that could upend the Voting Rights Act (VRA) — on October 15. The conservative-led Court made it particularly clear that it is zeroing in on the VRA when it ordered supplementary briefing, asking both parties whether a state’s creation of a “majority-miniority congressional district violates the Fourteenth or Fifteenth Amendments.” A federal court today ruled ( that Mississippi’s Supreme Court district lines must be redrawn to ensure Black voters have an equal opportunity to elect candidates of their choice. The most important election you’re not talking about? The PA Supreme Court retention election on November 4. Join Committee of Seventy, League of Women Voters of Pennsylvania, and Pennsylvanians for Modern Courts on September 8 for a fireside chat with the justices themselves, so you can understand what’s at stake before you vote. This event will be livestreamed for those who can't attend in person. Monday, September 8th, 2025 5-6:30PM (doors 4:30PM) Central High School 1700 W Olney Ave, Philadelphia, PA or on Zoom ( ( ( ( When: Wednesday, September 3rd at 6pm Where: Zoom This November, Pennsylvanians will be voting on whether or not to retain three state Supreme Court judges. Though this might seem like a simple down-ballot election, the stakes couldn’t be higher. These three non-partisan seats are crucial to retaining the current fairly-drawn electoral district maps. Founding CEO of NPP, Kadida Kenner, is cohosting an event about how you can support a fair and independent Pennsylvania Supreme Court. Join us on September 3rd to hear from keynote speaker Justice David Wecht. ( ( When: Saturday, September 13 at 10am Location: Berks County Democratic Committee office 1251 N Front St, Reading, PA 19601 Don't miss the panel discussion on how justice, democracy and the courts directly impact our lives and communities. This event will be moderated by Kadida Kenner, founding CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project. Panelists include: Judge Michael Wojcik, PA Commonwealth Court; Daniel Nevins, President Berks County Bar Association; Andrew Arnold, History Professor, Kutztown University; and Judge Brandon Neuman, Washington County Court of Common Pleas In case you missed it, you can check out the discussion hosted by For Our Future PA and The New Pennsylvania Project about the importance of courts in 2025. You'll learn how the Pennsylvania Supreme Court historically has protected our civil and voting rights, and why it and the other courts in the state are crucial components in our democracy. You can listen here. ( Passcode: Md9lAja+ Everything we do, from hosting town halls and producing podcasts to knocking on doors, expands Pennsylvania's electorate by engaging Pennsylvanians to be civically involved and encouraging them to turn out to vote twice a year, none of it would be possible without you. ( in Year Round Voter Engagement ( A federal appeals court ( upheld Texas’ requirement that potential voters must list their identification information in their application for a mail-in ballot. Stricter voter ID requirements would likely not have prevented people from casting fraudulent ballots in the vast majority of cases charged in Pennsylvania over the past decade, a Votebeat and Spotlight PA analysis shows ( Black and Latino voters are more likely to lack specific IDs required and to encounter mismatches in their documents. Over a quarter of Black and Latino citizens do not have a driver’s license with their current name or address, compared ( to 12% of the national average. Disparities aren’t just an unfortunate side effect. In some cases, it’s compounded by policies that make those same IDs even harder to get.” Texas Democrats, ( had left the state to halt an aggressive redistricting, returned to Texas and ended their two-week walkout on Monday, paving the way for Republicans ( to pass a redrawn congressional map called for by Trump. This map creates five new congressional districts in areas President Donald Trump won by double digits in 2024. The state Senate is expected to pass it as soon as this week and send it to Gov. Greg Abbott (R) for his signature. Common Cause softened its stance on redistricting ( after previously equating Gavin Newsom with Texas Republicans. Trump announced ( a major effort to seize control of American elections. Attempting to implement any of these policies via executive order would be flagrantly illegal and flatly unconstitutional — a power grab. Three key Pennsylvania ( U.S. congressional Republicans are 100% in favor of Trump’s call to ban mail-in ballots before next year’s elections. Pres. On Tuesday, U.S. Senator Dave McCormick, Congressman Lloyd Smucker, and Congressman Scott Perry each voiced support for the president’s ban. Pennsylvania told the U.S. Justice Department that it will not give federal officials a version of the state’s voter rolls ( that contains personal information, rebuffing a request from the agency. For the first time since 2018 ( more new voters nationwide chose to be Republicans than Democrats last year. Of the 30 states that track voter registration by political party, Democrats lost ground to Republicans in every single one between the 2020 and 2024 elections — and often by a lot. Thank you for staying informed and engaged! Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 412-699-6771 (

Friend -- North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I 've done it over and over in the most competitive years._ It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we've made. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don 't want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we're seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible -- not yank it away from those most in need. I'll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I'll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Friend. And I _know_ that -- with you on our team -- we can succeed here in North Carolina. [**I 'm asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and No Dem Left Behind ****because**** _right now_****is when we can build the momentum to win. clean_body: Join me in the fight. | | | Friend -- North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I 've done it over and over in the most competitive years. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we've made. I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don 't want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we're seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere. As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible -- not yank it away from those most in need. I'll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I'll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Friend. And I know that -- with you on our team -- we can succeed here in North Carolina. Grateful to have you with me, Roy Cooper | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Is this what they meant by “Great Again”?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8929%2E5257348%2EqOBlt0)
Derek,
Inflation is rising again.
Our global alliances are strained.
Health care for millions is on the chopping block.
And the President’s name is repeatedly in the Epstein files.
_So tell me: How does this make America great again?_
The Republican Party has become unrecognizable — a movement fueled by corruption, cruelty, and conspiracy. A party enthralled by a wannabe dictator. And while families struggle to keep up with rising costs, Trump is building a new ballroom for himself at the White House, and his allies are gutting programs like Medicaid to pay for more tax breaks for billionaires.
We’re not going to let this stand. Not without a fight.
Our campaign is about protecting the truth, defending our democracy, and fighting for the kind of country we know is possible — where leaders serve the people, not themselves.
**[Can you pitch in to help us stand up to corruption and take back the House? name: Paul Begala
subject: The most competitive Senate race in the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey there, Peter — it’s Paul Begala.
A lot of folks ask me why they receive so many fundraising requests from campaigns this far out from Election Day — and you may be wondering the same thing. _It’s a good question._
Well, for decades I’ve worked to elect Democrats in competitive races across the country. So take it from me: Jon Ossoff’s Senate race in Georgia will be one of the most competitive (and important!) races in the nation, and early contributions from grassroots supporters are the key to creating the strongest campaign possible.
Here’s how your donation can help power Jon’s campaign __right now:__
→ Giving early makes hiring new staff, printing yard signs, and building important infrastructure possible.
→ It allows the team to run ads, send mail, and communicate to voters across the state about Jon’s accomplishments for working families and set the record straight when Republicans try to tear down his record.
→ And, it helps Jon and his team build the resources they’ll need to run the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.
And, Peter, these contributions aren’t just about preparing for the future. As Republicans continue to hop into the race to challenge Jon and far-right groups pour more and more money into Georgia to distort his work — it’s more critical than ever to fight back **_now.**_
**[So, please, rush a donation of $5 — or however much you can afford — to Jon’s reelection campaign today. This race will be one of the most expensive and competitive in the nation, and any amount you can give today will help set Jon’s team up for success.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250822-1-subs&t=1&akid=661%2E5691347%2EQPnbae)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250822-1-subs&t=2&akid=661%2E5691347%2EQPnbae)**
Thank you for everything.
\- Paul Begala

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=661%2E5691347%2EQPnbae) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=661%2E5691347%2EQPnbae) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

It's Bart, Chrissy's husband.

You know, I've had the privilege of being by Chrissy's side for over three decades now, ever since we first crossed paths during our very first week at Stanford. From those early days, I've seen her unwavering commitment to making a real difference in the world. It's a part of who she is, deep down.
Since she took office, I've watched her pour her heart and soul into serving the people of PA-06. She genuinely cares, and she's worked tirelessly to keep her promise to make everyday life better for her constituents – the folks she wakes up thinking about every morning.
That's why, without a shadow of a doubt, I know she's the absolute best person to represent Pennsylvania. But here's where it gets real, Derek: **A wealthy Republican businessman has filed paperwork to run against her, and honestly, she needs our support now more than ever.**
With everything happening in Washington, and with the current administration dismantling the very foundations of our democracy, it's absolutely critical that we hold onto every single Democratic seat – and Chrissy's House seat in 2026 is no exception. It's too important.
That's why I'm reaching out to you personally, not just as a supporter, but as Chrissy's proudest advocate and biggest fan. I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can so she can continue to deliver on the issues that truly matter to you and your family, whether it's ensuring access to affordable health care or fighting for job security.
**[Please, will you consider giving $5 now? It would mean the world to us, helping us keep this vital seat in 2026, flip the House blue, and continue to defend our communities against the extremist agenda we're seeing from the opposition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113792106/564971404/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1157-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDNkZDEwZC03MTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDj-Dqek1QZX17X1sRIacjoiy5LvzagMzteMlQbZk54=)**

name: Lateefah
subject: How we cut jail returns in half
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress
body:
This is what justice looks like. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113793567/564976810/658807468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExMWExMDYtNzI3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvYcUnTw076TYZkeFtXrB8pMYPu-llf1S064VOU1h5s=&emci=816add10-6c7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4111a106-727f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22554739) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113793572/564976812/-92377995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExMWExMDYtNzI3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvYcUnTw076TYZkeFtXrB8pMYPu-llf1S064VOU1h5s=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113793574/564976844/-1535407989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExMWExMDYtNzI3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvYcUnTw076TYZkeFtXrB8pMYPu-llf1S064VOU1h5s=)
---
| | Hi Friend, When I was 19 years old, I became the executive director of the Center for Young Women’s Development. Most of the women we worked with were coming home from detention or prison, and I saw firsthand how our system was designed to send them back. Later, under then–District Attorney Kamala Harris, I built San Francisco’s first reentry services division. We focused on housing, employment, and mental health support. The result? We cut recidivism in half. That’s what justice looks like — not more cages, but more chances. **Not punishment for poverty, but investment in people’s futures.** Now, in Congress, I’m bringing that same evidence-driven approach to national policy: ending cash bail, expanding reentry programs, and funding community-based alternatives to incarceration. Because I know what works — I’ve lived it, and I’ve built it. [**But the right is trying to silence those fighting for justice. They’re trying to scare our communities from organizing, from discussing our shared vision for a better future. Help me keep fighting, keep organizing, and keep speaking up in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113793577/564976845/-545973753?&refcode=E14772-20250822-CJReform-SL-CriminalJusticeReform&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExMWExMDYtNzI3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvYcUnTw076TYZkeFtXrB8pMYPu-llf1S064VOU1h5s=) | [Chip in today »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113793581/564976886/-545973753?&refcode=E14772-20250822-CJReform-SB-CriminalJusticeReform&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExMWExMDYtNzI3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tvYcUnTw076TYZkeFtXrB8pMYPu-llf1S064VOU1h5s=)

clean_body: This is what justice looks like. | = = | | Hi Friend, When I was 19 years old, I became the executive director of the Center for Young Women’s Development. Later, under then–District Attorney Kamala Harris, I built San Francisco’s first reentry services division. We focused on housing, employment, and mental health support. The result? We cut recidivism in half. That’s what justice looks like — not more cages, but more chances. Not punishment for poverty, but investment in people’s futures. Now, in Congress, I’m bringing that same evidence-driven approach to national policy: ending cash bail, expanding reentry programs, and funding community-based alternatives to incarceration. name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250822em-tbafull-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250822em-tbafull-ob2]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=638%2E181023%2E4d6WtZ)
Earlier this week, our team sent along a survey to see exactly what your priorities are for Michigan’s next Governor, and you all made it clear: Michiganders deserve a Governor who is fighting to make life more affordable for everyday people.
People are struggling to afford the basics: food, prescriptions, and even the ability to buy a house and stay near our loved ones. Michiganders are concerned about the attacks on our rights by the Trump administration and are looking for state leaders who are willing to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community, voting rights, and to protect the Great Lakes from disastrous climate policy.
**[Jocelyn has a plan to address all that and more. She’s spent her career fighting for everyday people, and she’s committed to taking that fight to the Governor’s office. Will you pitch in right now to help us elect Jocelyn?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250822_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=638%2E181023%2E4d6WtZ)**

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Watch me talk redistricting on MSNBC:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

body:
---
Derek, We're about to ask you to [donate directly to the DNC](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250822_4389_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4409_22930333_SRfc9A&akid=4409%2E22930333%2ESRfc9A). If you give us a moment of your time, we'll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: President Trump and Republicans are trying to dismantle our democracy piece by piece, by gutting our federal agencies, redrawing congressional maps, threatening to end vote-by-mail, and more. And right now, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see that Democrats are exhausted and ready to throw in the towel. They’re counting on all of us giving up. We can't let that happen. That’s why reaching our upcoming end-of-month fundraising goal is so important. After our next FEC deadline passes, we’ll be required to report how many contributions we received and how many people chipped in. We need a strong report to show _everyone_ that Democrats are not done fighting. We hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. name: Ashley Moody
subject: Big news from President Trump!
body:
I am honored
| | | | [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2dbcc5cb651e4421915320b92c2d0d95&_e=8ebuzl25_pUWHCzIb0yTFuTui1YfoRTUyPvgznsNCOFcmObMyknZxFPACItTd4GUS-_YxXx_Jx0CdPOIOwLus7RcPT4kTIKkLysVgk0WZJpboMRR7KIVWdII8HaV-TmXRoZgN8NClof-lepxxJ9cGqMqv4yWSHRg2-hthw3oO8GiWc1-qBtdvEOsVqsJ2q0cLcx4NcOHt0h_9Zlyu4HBZBMjOSyjHkoZwh-ALd2b5U6iEv34aJWYNSOXKPW3J6Epkg1LnYk03ZFAopDbZ5gUSJk0ePwKzbOG7xnIO71gAcPUJ0O7NPRGuxfNwpBSXRtV8nIIgypCwGCpFSiGs1OiBFHRovMgHSrKitp7jfzDuCn6g5cRAt5IFcxeI_gsmcJAEkiZbsZwAtb3MmDTTNRknYJpSROxt79ZywZSGB8dW4GmOw_JzMMUfglVVRE3ANa2EcFqlRV45Ej1jp6YoiSkQMiCQSXHA7CGO9uDwFBrDJ4%3D)
---
_**“SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN”**_ Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that **I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement!** **My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – _but now it’s time to win this seat outright._** I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys. We can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us. **Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda.** _I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country._ [**President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election, and now I’d like to ask for yours. clean_body: I am honored | | | | “SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN” Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement! My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – but now it’s time to win this seat outright. I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys. We can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us. Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda. I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country. | | Thanks for your time and commitment. Sincerely,Ashley Moody | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Moody for Florida | Moody for Florida** 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606

name: With Honor Action
subject: 4CC Co-Chair Don Davis: "What matters most is our ability to stand with Ukraine."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0346f3b907f9/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14053826?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1cf3118eab&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Friends,

With Ukrainian President Zelenskyy and European leaders in Washington this week, attention is squarely on America’s role in supporting Ukraine and strengthening our European partnerships.

Representative Don Davis, the Co-Chair of the For Country Caucus, appeared on Forbes Breaking News and underscored the importance of standing firmly with Ukraine as it defends against Russia’s illegal invasion. He made clear that any settlement cannot come at the cost of Ukraine’s sovereignty, stating, "You can't have a deal where...you begin the conversation by giving up sovereignty of your land."
---
|
---
_Rep. Don Davis speaks with then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Bridget Brink._
| Congressman Davis isn’t just talking the talk; he’s walking the walk. Just last year, Congressman Don Davis traveled to Ukraine on the second anniversary of Russia’s invasion, where he observed frontline military preparations, met with U.S. troops training Ukrainian forces, and participated in sessions of the Ukrainian parliament celebrating resistance to the unprovoked aggression. During the trip, he emphasized that Ukraine’s resilience “remains high,” but warned that without “immediate support from the United States and allies, Russia will claim victory,” underscoring the crucial role of U.S. security assistance and swift bipartisan action.

📺 You can watch the full interview [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=839b24e44a&e=33f53a5b1a).

Senator Roger Wicker, Chairman of the Senate Armed Services Committee, echoed the following sentiment: “President Donald Trump, your advocate, Mark Levin, warns that Vladimir Putin is a ‘genocidal maniac.’ These are wise words from a good friend. Putin lies and kills. Your leadership will be key to keep Ukraine, U.S., and Europe together against Putin’s delays and deceptions.” ([Source](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1bd0bb282b&e=33f53a5b1a))
---
|
---
|
---
|
# For Country Caucus member Rep. Pat Harrigan: "[Veterans] cut through the noise and get things done"
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3de674f47a&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| “As veterans, regardless of party, we don’t argue over whether the grass is blue and the sky is green — we know what reality is, and that shared experience allows us to cut through the noise and actually get things done in a bipartisan way,” said Rep. Pat Harrigan in a recent interview highlighting the For Country Caucus. This bipartisan group of veterans in Congress is committed to putting service to country above politics, ensuring principled leadership, and working to restore veteran representation that once stood at over 70% after World War II, but today has fallen to just 19%.

📺 You can watch the clip [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4a25fd6313&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
|

and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

name: Crow HQ
subject: Demanding accountability from the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

House Republicans sent Congress home early for the summer recess — while they still had votes to cast on issues that impact the American people — to protect the elite and avoid releasing the Epstein files.

It’s time for our leaders to actually SHOW UP and work for the people. Scroll down to read more about Jason’s fight for accountability, then join him by signing our petition today >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/gop-accoundability]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/gop-accoundability]

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Crow
Date: Sun, Aug 3, 2025
Subject: We can’t let our leaders hide from the facts

Here’s the truth, team:

House Republicans closed up shop early for summer — all to avoid accountability.

They’re hiding from town halls, ducking tough questions, and refusing to face the people they’re supposed to represent. Meanwhile, they’re lying about the real impact of their cruel budget cuts and distracting everyone from Trump’s scandalous ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

Jason Crow sees right through it.

He knows Congress should serve everyday Americans, not the ultra-wealthy elite or a power-hungry president.

That’s why he’s fighting to clean up Washington, demand accountability, and get dark money out of politics.

If you agree that it’s time for our leaders to show up and be held accountable, add your name to Jason’s petition now: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/gop-accoundability]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/gop-accoundability]

Thanks for standing with Jason,

— Team Crow

Scroll down to read more about Jason’s fight for accountability, then join him by signing our petition today >> [] ADD YOUR NAME [] ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Crow Date: Sun, Aug 3, 2025 Subject: We can’t let our leaders hide from the facts Here’s the truth, team: House Republicans closed up shop early for summer — all to avoid accountability. They’re hiding from town halls, ducking tough questions, and refusing to face the people they’re supposed to represent. Meanwhile, they’re lying about the real impact of their cruel budget cuts and distracting everyone from Trump’s scandalous ties to Jeffrey Epstein. Jason Crow sees right through it. He knows Congress should serve everyday Americans, not the ultra-wealthy elite or a power-hungry president. That’s why he’s fighting to clean up Washington, demand accountability, and get dark money out of politics. If you agree that it’s time for our leaders to show up and be held accountable, add your name to Jason’s petition now: [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Thanks for standing with Jason, — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
