name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Kristen gets it, folks.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113798002/564988761/1362877131?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWI0NmY3Mi03OTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqofAEjUGSarGj5U1Vs1K2f_8z6KbRQ76Bvh8N14toY=) Hi there, it’s Gov. Gretchen Whitmer. Earlier this week, I had a conversation in Grand Blanc with Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet and a room full of concerned Michigan families – many of them worried about how they’re going to make ends meet with prices still climbing. Kristen gets it – because she’s lived it. She’s a mom of six and a lifelong advocate for Michigan kids. From Head Start to the Michigan Dept. of Education, she’s spent her entire career fighting to make life better for working families. **Kristen brings the kind of real-world experience that’s missing in D.C.** She listens. She does the work. And she fights for the people who too often get left behind. That’s exactly why national Republicans have made her a top target – and why it’s so important that we have her back. Kristen’s seat could decide control of the House. And the GOP is already spending big to flip it – because they’d rather have someone who will rubber-stamp their agenda than someone who actually understands what Michigan families are going through. [**Every dollar makes a difference in this must-win race. So if you’re able, I hope you’ll pitch in to help her fight back and keep MI-08 blue. $3 from you would go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113798012/564988770/1362877131?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWI0NmY3Mi03OTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqofAEjUGSarGj5U1Vs1K2f_8z6KbRQ76Bvh8N14toY=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113798024/564988811/1362877131?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWI0NmY3Mi03OTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqofAEjUGSarGj5U1Vs1K2f_8z6KbRQ76Bvh8N14toY=)**

name: Team Cooper
subject: This won’t be easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We can only win together. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113799016/564992017/823540626?refcode=ea.8a79e900-7a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.8a79e900-7a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc5ZTkwMC03YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaHJ0KV31qN2rMG5Y3Yn3oC4U-WyyIqPhTis6AJNECM=&emci=bbcfeff6-cf7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a79e900-7a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
You know this by now, Peter: **Flipping the U.S. Senate starts by winning North Carolina.** Our opponent, Michael Whatley, and his national Republican allies know that, too — and defeating Roy is a top GOP priority. **[This is set to be the most competitive Senate race on the map in 2026. If we’re going to win, we need Democrats everywhere to unite. Can you show you’re with us by pitching in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113799018/564992018/-1743631236?refcode=ea.8a79e900-7a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.8a79e900-7a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc5ZTkwMC03YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaHJ0KV31qN2rMG5Y3Yn3oC4U-WyyIqPhTis6AJNECM=)** Look, we don’t expect this to be an easy victory. But we have a candidate, a message, and a team that can _win._ Meanwhile, the GOP’s candidate is a D.C. insider and Big Oil lobbyist who’s nothing but a yes-man for Donald Trump. Extreme Republicans have made it clear that their plan is to rescind our rights, take over our communities, and run our country into the ground. And Michael Whatley is ready to help them do it. _That’s not the future we deserve, Peter._ **[Your early support is key to stopping Whatley and ending the GOP’s grip on Washington. clean_body: We can only win together. | You know this by now, Peter: Flipping the U.S. Senate starts by winning North Carolina. Our opponent, Michael Whatley, and his national Republican allies know that, too — and defeating Roy is a top GOP priority. = Look, we don’t expect this to be an easy victory. But we have a candidate, a message, and a team that can win. Meanwhile, the GOP’s candidate is a D.C. insider and Big Oil lobbyist who’s nothing but a yes-man for Donald Trump. Extreme Republicans have made it clear that their plan is to rescind our rights, take over our communities, and run our country into the ground. And Michael Whatley is ready to help them do it. _Please see a special message from our sponsor. There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/bkaclFav6-N8JeHzdDRGcx2yF2RMfPgaZLXWTL0PSvdSpwjNlcB8OsJIFnduD5Il2y6ORYqx6qp7QJ2YRLHTDHQY_SeF08cEI1MW2m6n5gt_OL42ZbfAM8oevJ2DJIuPy-RVb8fIxxtk1uaNlL7qRv4X32XUAhWJje7rLcnsABPvDzo0dxZ_ur4lBW-Dp2NsN7R5BGh3PJ_iA58-DSAmxiOTnmcbWRBRA3n7Gz19c0BVVcxP7QD_QcQ5PFhCsQ3LmoJJXNgHwCOqr-nZzxqIMQtra04R9YrPJjbMenelxqJbnTM7fcQle0bLy3HjrLkYR966xmAuHJ1_ZoGcJ5geE1eR9frZZmzexZ7bpb8_qSN6IyHB4mhPsfSlREhzWp26iv1RRpPj2zAQkKL30bjRQY4uAzRA9K2ePI9xU5SNBE1T2nHKKD6XUJ1LyK7rc3nbz635D-Ybt18tQbhqfeyKL4OcxilqdoK8doA8uS-vsvuuy7xwPRZLltbtnefXiitx-jHm8WdSF52brUxCBUnDCfJL2YGPuckU8y3HmM7YWAqD-gv1p8aevqIo7XB23y4tAwD8ifwfXjpYQwMcFWUq0XcgEjwltABHgZzNLvd7QHdh3e1gZdHfNhWIkS8FFz9yduZtKeiDX-s3N_nZ1SGXKvnFy70j2fgvc4Zug8FDwXFdDsv11cDQzmFMfxfH0Y3Z2nzQNgbWWTKFtierR3XqqMNYqsmxJTDI15SXYAeNRdwFi7FpvjgVKWdW9Es_hqiogDKr9lfh_boLz28RHA95/_sKvf-mqFnbMy0Imbv8Z-nAmV5JpAB22/12) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis." There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is. The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people. But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional? Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions. That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. name: Action [MarieForCongress.com]
subject: Support rural schools
body:
| | Peter,

Since day one, Marie has made it a top priority to advocate for rural communities in Southwest Washington, and she’s not letting up now.

Rural school districts have already been forced to endure painful budget shortfalls in recent decades, and right now they’re facing the possibility of further drastic cuts that will jeopardize schools’ ability to provide basic services.

**Marie is calling on Congress to invest in the equality of our children’s opportunities, making sure rural schools aren’t left behind.** [If you agree that where your kids live shouldn’t determine the quality of education they receive, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801092/564996496/-1289503321?refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250822_1_1&refcode2=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EwNTgzZS03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6G9FCyvTiGebk8siLyX5DL9JflPUzlROQL-uqsMsAo=&emci=cce5a58f-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=31138575)
| **[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801094/564996497/-1289503321?refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250822_1_1&refcode2=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EwNTgzZS03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6G9FCyvTiGebk8siLyX5DL9JflPUzlROQL-uqsMsAo=&emci=cce5a58f-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=31138575)**
---

A decline in federal funding has already forced school districts in rural Southwest Washington to combine schools and lay off staff – and if they lose funding entirely, it would mean further layoffs, inability to repair aging facilities, and even cutting down to a four-day school week.

**Time is running out to reauthorize the federal funding program upon which these schools rely, and Marie is working hard to bring those dollars home.**

[Our children deserve access to an education that provides opportunities and helps prepare for their futures, regardless of zip code. If you agree, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801098/564996499/-1289503321?refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250822_1_1&refcode2=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EwNTgzZS03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6G9FCyvTiGebk8siLyX5DL9JflPUzlROQL-uqsMsAo=&emci=cce5a58f-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=31138575)
**[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801102/564996501/-1289503321?refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250822_1_1&refcode2=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2EwNTgzZS03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6G9FCyvTiGebk8siLyX5DL9JflPUzlROQL-uqsMsAo=&emci=cce5a58f-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ca0583e-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=31138575)**

Thanks for taking a stand.

– Team MGP

As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. name: VoteVets.org
subject: One million dollars per day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
They found $1 million every day to take Guard Troops away from their homes, their families, and their jobs. To put them in a role they are not trained for and stand them up against American citizens.
#
$1 million dollars per day.
That’s the approximate cost of the National Guard deployments in DC.
$1 million taxpayer dollars to federalize the nation’s capital while grocery prices skyrocket.
$1 million per day after we were told there was no money to hire additional doctors, researchers, nurses, or support staff at the VA.
$1 million per day while food assistance programs are cut, leaving Veterans, their families, and millions of Americans hungry.
They found $1 million every day to take Guard Troops away from their homes, their families, and their jobs all for political theater. To put them in a role they are not trained for and stand them up against American citizens.
All after we were told we had to cut Medicaid by hundreds of billions of dollars and push hundreds of millions of people off their health care because we couldn’t afford it.
It takes Elon Musk something like 25 minutes to make $1 million. America could find the money to house every homeless Veteran, to make sure they get the care they deserve, to keep their families fed — and do the same for every other American who needs it, too.
But even now, we are not powerless. We can still stop Trump in his tracks — it is not too late. It’s going to take a ton of work, and a massive, nationwide, grassroots effort. Every person, every place, doing whatever they can to build power, resist this administration, and beat their candidates at the ballot box.
VoteVets is committed to doing that work. We have fought Trump from the day he launched his campaign in 2015 and every day since. We have defeated his candidates in elections from coast to coast. We have defeated his attorneys in the courtroom. We have defeated his patsies in votes on the floor of the House and Senate.
None of that work comes easy, or cheap. We’ve already invested millions of dollars this year, and we’re ready to do a lot more. But we can’t do that or anything else if we don’t raise the resources we need.
That’s why supporters like you are so important to this organization. And it’s why we’re humbly asking:
[**Please, make a donation to VoteVets.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250822-1-60&t=1&akid=34551%2E3013755%2E6mI7uL)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801300/564996938/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiMzEzY2EtN2M3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oulzTTQ4K3Ws5FDqYqOL0jiOkzE3Vd1uLBCdP8AGiXA=) _**Oregon faces $15 billion funding loss from Medicaid, SNAP due to Trump budget cuts**_ Republicans' budget could cost Oregon $15 BILLION in funding for programs Oregonians rely on. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801332/564997069/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250822_T1_OssoffSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzFkMTJkNy03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-WDnSMUJnky9uzztnfHk6vdIy0n7mezeY84wurx5N8=&emci=8bc665a1-5e7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e71d12d7-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | _Let me lay this out, clear as day:_ I am the only Democratic senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Fair Fight today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801334/564997070/-1096693956?amount=5&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250822_T1_OssoffSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzFkMTJkNy03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-WDnSMUJnky9uzztnfHk6vdIy0n7mezeY84wurx5N8=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801336/564997071/-1096693956?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250822_T1_OssoffSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzFkMTJkNy03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-WDnSMUJnky9uzztnfHk6vdIy0n7mezeY84wurx5N8=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this president is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Fair Fight today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113801337/564997072/-1096693956?amount=5&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250822_T1_OssoffSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzFkMTJkNy03YzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-WDnSMUJnky9uzztnfHk6vdIy0n7mezeY84wurx5N8=)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.

clean_body: This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream | | | Let me lay this out, clear as day: I am the only Democratic senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– = | = Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent. Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation. Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning. I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible. I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is. Now this president is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history: He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf. Purged independent watchdogs across government. Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents. Defied and threatened federal judges. Undermined the press. Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him. Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government. This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes. In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority. Now we must win again. And we will win again. Just like last time, I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. = Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: NEW: A $1,200 pay cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-22]
Congress may be in August recess and I am gratefully back in the 3rd District, but the bad news from Washington just keeps coming. The Republicans’ Big, Beautiful Bill already had staggering cuts for programs supporting working families like Medicaid and SNAP, but it’s now becoming increasingly evident that this was a bill written to support the wealthy.
A recent analysis from the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office (CBO) found that the budget bill will boost incomes for the wealthiest Americans by an average of $13,600, while cutting incomes for the poorest by $1,200.
https://subscriber.politicopro.com/article/2025/08/gop-megabill-will-mostly-benefit-the-wealthy-cbo-says-00504260 [https://subscriber.politicopro.com/article/2025/08/gop-megabill-will-mostly-benefit-the-wealthy-cbo-says-00504260]
Let’s be honest about what this is: it’s a giveaway to the wealthiest few, at the expense of everyone else. It’s a President who ran on lowering costs, but is now increasing prices on working families and eliminating the programs they rely on—all while increasing the deficit.
We need a Democratic majority in 2026 to fight back against these cuts. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-22]

clean_body: [] Congress may be in August recess and I am gratefully back in the 3rd District, but the bad news from Washington just keeps coming. The Republicans’ Big, Beautiful Bill already had staggering cuts for programs supporting working families like Medicaid and SNAP, but it’s now becoming increasingly evident that this was a bill written to support the wealthy. A recent analysis from the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office (CBO) found that the budget bill will boost incomes for the wealthiest Americans by an average of $13,600, while cutting incomes for the poorest by $1,200. [] Let’s be honest about what this is: it’s a giveaway to the wealthiest few, at the expense of everyone else. It’s a President who ran on lowering costs, but is now increasing prices on working families and eliminating the programs they rely on—all while increasing the deficit. We need a Democratic majority in 2026 to fight back against these cuts. Are you with me? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Sarah Elfreth [] Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wwgqudqegrm4ixy21vw7z85y7w6dv2ek438l18f8vnjx5z6yh1ertpzxi77p2p4m5bbrj9vwh95tav1g&__stmp=t1eoe2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hio3kkfrdsw4m0qa283s8ibqg4txe0z93nw0pklhyn27sdhw9mnko2rofww6n2x7cfs5qke4cx5tkm0jk2tkhbh2ci94p5ytbjxzaqwedtj8ax1ywbkbd81yqobd00uqex2n43g51&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hio3kkfrdsw4m0qa283s8ibqg4txe0z93nw0pklhyn27sdhw9mnko2rofww6n2x7cfs5qke4cx5tkm0jk2tkhbh2ci94p5ytbjxzaqwedtj8ax1ywbkbd81yqobd00uqex2n43g51&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1eoe2&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/aa9bbTKUxphNSc7wJJWMsQ~~/AAPPABA~/r2HQs8AQIE6pvNJoM6VqEJRwsn5-yQImOXK90NnpSPROUtw9ltp8alBqOpy1fTHtDwAbj21lsVFYw62kX9azIuekxIlH7giQhgF4w4T5UFv_zg-Pbsl974q3--hgBiiBBLJNbxr04P5zAYmGKrh2Bg~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/S3XY2qjibmC6Apo2WNE6FQ~~/AAPPABA~/WVA7YiDqPeJYOU_ZnlHPzzEntPQlyq957ch9FB20YcaFPGtcoaNo5O-54JeCzdvbmJmyUeyLcvgEwMITvxPtBah5BPm4ya_a5zuvgqLGTG3uS35wtXTRzwp-7fknEG2QrqV5g2IqEQ0ck7z3m4TpFVhhvBRf_6x37DFVXK5H3MXS2V5dQuLlWmX6ZtmrxVurrM_E1DcJHepvGR5vG1Xmig~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, Peter
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today , I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Real Texas PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1&amount=25]
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won . When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won .
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.
I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

clean_body: [] Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today , I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Real Texas PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat? But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won . When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won . Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one. Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._

Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Donald Trump is struggling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
I want to thank you for your support over the past week.

We're here because Donald Trump is struggling.
He is one of the most unpopular presidents in US history. He recognizes that because of his failed policies, he will lose the next election. He can't win playing by a traditional set of rules, so he plays by no rules.
I want to thank you for your support over the past week.
I am reminded of the great Walt Whitman poem O Me! O Life! (it's worth looking at). He talks about this notion that we are not bystanders in life, that we can shape the future. He talks about writing our own verse in this play that is life.
In that spirit, I want to thank the 15,000 people who have signed up to volunteer, the 75,000+ who joined a volunteer Zoom last night, and more than 250,000 people who have contributed more than $9 million in small-dollar donations since we launched this effort. Thank you all.
But we still have a long way to go, **[and let us not forget the stakes in this fight.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4518?t=1&akid=2489%2E4767699%2EZUprlU)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4518?t=2&akid=2489%2E4767699%2EZUprlU)
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250822&refcode2=2489_4767699_ZUprlU&akid=2489%2E4767699%2EZUprlU)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2489%2E4767699%2EZUprlU).

body:
Peter, did you see this headline?
| | | | |

| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8114119-67a7-449a-99f1-d6757b776cc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[This race is closer than ever, Peter — and if we continue to let Jack Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered, he has a real chance of pulling ahead. Can you split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us fight back?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te74fccc2-4b45-4800-a034-e8e51fd6d2ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Peter, New Jersey is not the safe Democratic state we once thought it was — in fact, it’s far from it. The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. And some of the early polling in this race? A statistical tie. Right now, my opponent is flooding the zone all over New Jersey with false attacks on my record and our vision for New Jersey. And the scary reality is that these attacks work if they go unanswered. But we also know this: when undecided voters learn who Mikie is, what she stands for, and how her policy priorities differ from her MAGA opponent’s, she earns their support. [Peter, can you help us gather the resources we need and split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Blue Amp Action to fight back against our opponent’s attacks and spread our message to undecided voters? This race is one of the most competitive in the country, and we need all the help we can get.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e08fbc1-5a19-4d09-8dbc-01df1b4a47ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38113b10-e558-468e-a68d-59f39911e98d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Wait, facts can change?
[@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/91ae3f09-5ea7-4934-a82d-819b4b6a1069?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): This picture captures the difference between Trump 1.0 and 2.0:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ecdeecf-00a7-48c3-a7db-1ab8e5fd1f92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb3fb0-8706-476e-a334-46ba2d7628db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb3fb0-8706-476e-a334-46ba2d7628db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Starting off the week strong, Monday I'm having a great conversation with former governor Rick Perry. Wednesday, tune in as I talk to J. Christian Adam on the issue of election integrity. Then Thursday, we've got a great panel, featuring Emily Sturge, Caroline Downey, and Katie Miller. Don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Call Bishop Gold!
Gold is over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included.
[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/58acbfb2-1dd9-4238-a2fb-202fe8a8748b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b29624-bb84-4e66-b987-4f15fa8d7f70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## The Dems' voting crisis...
I've talked a lot recently about the problems Democrats are facing (note, its plural).
They've got a messaging problem, they have no discernible leader... the party is basically a rudderless ship without a captain.
Well now we've got another challenge to add the list.
According to the latest numbers, Democrats are now facing dismal voter registration turnout.
Messaging and leadership are big enough problems, but voter registration?
Without voters, not only is the Democrat ship adrift, it's sinking.
My friend Seth Keshel has been on the show crunching the numbers.
To say the least, it's bad news for the Left.
Let's break it down. ...

subject: Stand with Flynn PAC—Defeat Corruption, Defend America First
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FIGHT LIKE A FLYNN
body:
Together we can restore America First leadership.

| | | | [](https://flynnpac.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDGJISi5KJ5-tA9gehz2n2pjdD1jxkvkHg5IIGdDXRA_Ey.z.lr5X6ik.~wnuw0Z2)
---
| |
---
# _**Stand With Flynn PAC to Defeat Corruption and Take Back Our Republic**_
| |
Thanks to President Donald Trump’s persistence and the extraordinary efforts of Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard—the American people now know the truth: the allegations of Russian interference to help Donald Trump’s 2016 campaign were a complete fabrication by Barack Obama and his inner circle.
As individuals who were personally targeted for destruction in this treasonous conspiracy to remove a duly elected President, we know it is vital that those responsible including President Barack Obama, Vice President Joe Biden, Hillary Clinton, former National Security Advisor Susan Rice, former FBI Director James Comey, former Director of National Intelligence James Clapper, former CIA Director John Brennan, former Special Prosecutor Robert Mueller, former Assistant Attorney General Rod Rosenstein, and many others—be charged and given fair trials where the undisputed evidence declassified by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard proves their undeniable guilt.
We are also heartened by the fact that DNI Tulsi Gabbard is now actively examining classified documents regarding irregularities in the 2020 election and are hopeful that those investigations will provide more shocking truths to the American people.
**_At the same time, it is imperative that nothing like the Russian Collusion Hoax ever happens again._**
Although it is abundantly clear that the shocking facts about this stunning abuse of power would never have been fully and indisputably revealed without the declassifications by DNI Gabbard,**_Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas has actually sponsored legislation that would strip the declassification authority from the Office of the Director of National Intelligence and shift that power to the FBI and the NSA—both institutions that were involved in fabricating and covering up the Russian Collusion Hoax from the beginning!_**

Therefore, it is vitally important that this legislation be defeated and that we elect Republicans in the 2026 election who will fight the Deep State's efforts to regain control of the narrative and hide shocking corruption from the American people.
That is the purpose of **Flynn PAC** —a political action committee dedicated to supporting good men and women in Republican primaries and in the 2026 general election who stand on constitutional principles and who will oppose this power-grab by the Deep State.
It is our intention to recruit and support a candidate to challenge Senator Tom Cotton in the 2026 Arkansas Republican U.S. Senate primary, as well as recruiting and supporting candidates for the Senate and the House who strongly support the America First Agenda.
**Please consider your maximum contribution to Flynn PAC to HELP US in this vital effort!**

##### You can contribute by going to [https://fightlikeaflynnpac.com/donate-now](https://flynnpac.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDGJISi5KJ5-tA9gehz2n2pjdD1jxkvkHg5IIGdDXRA_Ey.z.lr5X6ik.~wnuw1Y2)

**Flynn PAC** is very different from other conservative or MAGA political action committees because other than minor administrative costs, we have no overhead, no paid consultants, and no expensive infrastructure. Every dollar you contribute will be used to assist candidates either through direct contribution or independent expenditure consistent with federal election law.
It is our intention to target the most important key races in the country, and we have no problem challenging incumbent Republicans who have demonstrated a lack of courage and a failure to stand up with the America First Agenda.
**Please send your maximum contribution today to ASSIST US in this historic effort.**

#### Once again, you can contribute by going here: [https://fightlikeaflynnpac.com/donate-now](https://flynnpac.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDGJISi5KJ5-tA9gehz2n2pjdD1jxkvkHg5IIGdDXRA_Ey.z.lr5X6ik.~wnuw1Y2)
####
God Bless You,

General Michael Flynn & Roger Stone
P.S. Despite the hell that we and our families were put through, this is not about retribution or revenge—it’s about ensuring both the integrity of our federal government, as well as the integrity of our elections. Please join us in this crucial effort.

---
[Learn more](https://flynnpac.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDGJISi5KJ5-tA9gehz2n2pjdD1jxkvkHg5IIGdDXRA_Ey.z.lr5X6ik.~wnuw0Z2)
| | |
---
| |
### **Advancing the Mission**
---
| We will protect and defend our constitutional and God-given rights. We will advance the idea of American exceptionalism. We will be unapologetic standing up for American values and principles. We will not back down from anyone or anything when it comes to saving America.
---
| |
---
**Family Values**
| [](https://flynnpac.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDGJISi5KJ5-tA9gehz2n2pjdD1jxkvkHg5IIGdDXRA_Ey.z.lr5X6ik.~wnuw0Z2)

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: An underreported danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Democracy Docket: DOJ Doubles Down on Demands for Maine’s Voter Data, Secretary of State Fires Back| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113805625/565006043/-2030239706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNmI2YTE4LTgyN2YtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ygrM2QVsNdcT53ZVY-rZRa7VLZpC6eyMfpgNckowQKI=&emci=c0e2c937-6a7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bc6b6a18-827f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33603084)
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113805627/565006045/-1725532854?refcode=082225_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNmI2YTE4LTgyN2YtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ygrM2QVsNdcT53ZVY-rZRa7VLZpC6eyMfpgNckowQKI=)
---
We’ll keep this short, Team: **The MAGA-ified U.S. Department of Justice has been demanding voter data from the states** , requesting that election officials turn over unredacted copies of voter rolls and every voter registration application submitted in the past 18 months. Several states with MAGA-aligned Secretaries of State and opponents of voting rights in charge of elections have complied, but other states are holding out to protect voters from intimidation, including Maine. **DOJ has escalated their attacks in Maine** , with suppressive former Trump lawyer, now Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon demanding an electronic copy of the voter registration list that “ _must contain all fields, including the registrant’s full name, date of birth, residential address, his or her state driver’s license number or the last four digits of the registrant’s social security number_ ” from December 1, 2023, through July 1, 2025.Folks, the U.S. Constitution entrusts the states, not the president or his agencies, to run elections. There's no legal basis for the DOJ to demand such sensitive and personally identifying information. **It's yet another overreach by a president fueled by lies and taken by sycophants who are more loyal to his every whim than the rule of law they swore an oath to uphold.** **[Team, voters in Maine and every other state deserve safe, secure, private elections, free of intimidation. Friends,
This week's episode of _Welcome to the Party, Pal_ is a must-watch. Joe Walsh and I are joined by former Georgia Lieutenant Governor Geoff Duncan--fresh off his switch to the Democratic Party--for a wild ride through Trumpworld dysfunction, rising fascism, and what it _really_ means to fight for democracy. This was Jeff's first Substack Live ever, and he did not hold back.
🕒 **01:06** - Geoff Duncan on what it _actually_ feels like to leave the GOP and find purpose again as a Democrat.
🕒 **04:50** - The raid on John Bolton's house sparks a fiery exchange on Trump's enemies list--and why fascism is no longer a hypothetical.
🕒 **10:46** - Trump's bizarre "street patrol" in D.C. gets dissected: the political stunt, the military optics, and what it reveals about MAGA priorities.
🕒 **14:00** - A raw conversation about abortion, faith, and how we build a truly inclusive, _winning_ Democratic coalition.
🕒 **22:27** - What the hell is happening with the Epstein files? Plus, the alarming rise of Trump loyalists inside DOJ.
This episode pulls no punches. If you care about democracy, you can't afford to miss it.

name: Survey Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Take our candidate priority survey now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

In the latest Our Revolution survey, this movement made itself crystal
clear: Defunding the oligarchs and getting billionaire money out of
politics MUST be our top priorities.

As we lean into those fights, the next challenge is making sure we elect
bold, progressive leaders who are as committed to stopping the oligarchy
as we are. Which is why Our Revolution is launching a massive grassroots
survey to help us influence the platform that candidates adopt as they run
for office – and what they actually do once they win.

Our plan is to take the results straight to Members of Congress and the
candidates Our Revolution will be backing in 2026 to show them where our
movement wants them to focus their time and energy. Can you take a quick
minute to tell us what you think?

Here’s the first question:

How important is it to you that candidates take bold action against the
oligarchs?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33656?source=email-20250822&t=1011&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Very Important

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33656?source=email-20250822&t=1012&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Somewhat important

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33656?source=email-20250822&t=1013&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Unsure

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33656?source=email-20250822&t=1014&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Not important

80% of Americans agree – it’s time for big, substantive change, not the
empty gestures Wall Street and Big Tech lobbyists love.

Our Revolution is working around the clock to do just that by taking down
the oligarchy. Every single day we’re pushing to get billionaire money out
of elections, cancel federal contracts for oligarchs, end tax breaks for
the ultra-wealthy, crack down on crypto crooks, and shut down the
billionaire-backed surveillance state.

But we ALSO need commitments from candidates running for office that
they’ll follow through and actually use their power and resources to stop
billionaires and the ultra-wealthy from buying our elections and gaming
our political system for their own gain.

Right now, we have the chance to make “Defund the Oligarchs” the rallying
cry of the midterms and beyond. And your survey responses will *directly*
tell candidates what’s non-negotiable. But for this to work, your input is
crucial.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33656?source=email-20250822&t=1015&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Candidates look to us for direction. So together we can make sure
they’re fighting for US – not the oligarchs. Can you take 3 minutes right
now to fill out our survey and tell us what you want candidates to
prioritize? We’ll take the findings straight to candidates and make their
commitment a criteria for our endorsement!

When we organize, we win.

Team Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250822.jnrAyZ&t=1007&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250822.6kvqji&t=1008&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250822.z79YZ7&t=1009&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250822.qMo_A9&t=1010&akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9228%2E5885482%2Er7VLbD

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Brianna Titone For Colorado
subject: Brianna Won’t Back Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer, Registered Agent Brianna Titone
body:
In this Special Session, I'm fighting for the people of Colorado – not the corporations.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8707f8e83ea3/wontbackdown?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=2b4b13c25c&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | | Yesterday was the first day of the [Special Session](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9a85ecca72&e=8249791cac), and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
Trump’s “Big Awful Bill” slashes Medicaid, guts food assistance programs, and threatens rural hospitals – _**all to give billionaires another tax break.**_
**Now, because of these tax cuts to the wealthiest few and big corporations, Colorado is facing a $1.2 billion dollar budget shortfall from the loss of tax revenue.** In order for us to have a mandated balanced budget (which we did just a few weeks ago), we need to act fast, which means fixing the disaster that Trump and congressional Republicans caused.
**Here is what’s at stake in Colorado alone:**
* A spike in health insurance premiums due to the cutting of federal subsidies
* Massive cuts to food assistance programs, leaving low-income working families without options to feed themselves.
* Rural hospitals facing closures.
* Hundreds of thousands kicked off Medicaid and marketplace healthcare plans.

And that’s not all that we are addressing in this Special Session. Last year, I championed first-in-the-nation AI regulations to safeguard Colorado consumers from discriminatory practices from employers, lending agencies, insurance companies, and many more. But now, these [protections are in danger of being cut](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=4e885cc80a&e=8249791cac) due to pressures from the tech industry. I will fight tooth-and-nail to stop that from happening.
---
| [Check out my short video outlining the AI regulation fight happening in Colorado’s Special Session](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d7aafa3399&e=8249791cac)
---
| | **I’ve built my legislative career on standing up to corporate interests and fighting for working Coloradans.**[**This Special Session is no different**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6627aefe29&e=8249791cac)**\- I will never back down from my goal of fighting for people like you.**
_But my fight doesn’t stop there_. I’m also running to be Colorado’s next State Treasurer, so that I can ensure taxpayer dollars are invested in _people_ and not special interests. I’m running a grassroots campaign in a very competitive primary. In order for me to continue traversing the state and reaching as many people as I can, I need your help.
[**Please donate $25 to my campaign**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=19f12affb6&e=8249791cac)**so we can stand up to the Trump Administration and corporate interests, and show them that Colorado wants a working-class fighter as its next State Treasurer.**
---
| [Click here to donate $25 to help Brianna stand up to corporate interests!](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6bb4a20d89&e=8249791cac)
---
| | For questions about the Special Session or assistance with any potential cuts you and your family may be facing as a result of Trump’s latest ploy, please do not hesitate to reach out to my office: rep.brianna.titone@gmail.com**Never stop fighting for justice. Onward.**
In solidarity,
**Brianna Titone****Candidate for Colorado State Treasurer** _🔗**Learn more & join the campaign:**_[__](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b3fe1113c1&e=8249791cac)[_www.briannaforco.com_](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9af9d0acf5&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
| | _**P.S. Want to help our campaign for State Treasurer? Here are a few ways to make an impact:**_
* [**Donate**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=89740e77c3&e=8249791cac)**:** every dollar helps us spread our message of hope and economic prosperity for ALL Coloradans
* **Host a meet- &-greet or fundraiser: **email briannaforcolorado@gmail.com
* **Sign up for our newsletter** to stay up to date with the campaign: [briannaforco.com/get-involved](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=77dc8a0341&e=8249791cac)
* **Endorse Brianna** [here](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=01b4673030&e=8249791cac)
* **Follow Brianna on social media -** be sure like/comment/repost to spread our message of hope. Click on the icons below to follow Brianna!!

---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=e3d06a33eb&e=8249791cac)
---

name: Dinesh D'Souza
subject: This email could change someone's life
body:

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9506a1545f74e4f9e5f10fb48b29753&_e=qapb83XCnDBM-xAelFwUjBZwQNv2ZKasXf69r768NIfRVBFxdaUNwGmSipLYpBaf59OfWwAMUg0eWWdOAuSm9HIppHgHgGSdd9dDbb902Lsujw8g0ufLABVdKAHNyXSofQaPLZjazwvREjMtcWuZDKD510HG0btYX0lhJ0YvTkrafNjqgSBP9il9jgYJpzmoft-fJYT3tlk2ri7EhntXbjt0pjG9c52EGGA1Ef2-6Pv1O8DcqSt73jbinxtV2_hsoetDjROeXB2yUsJHJKgJ2P9RzCzGHMXOEJrNYWnD1JdmR2MDCV9s-70_q0Suk3V7_OJSAN8zC26gKtAG1OKmRyKd5s5f4aZc7yBbHRWGaWxBBb4OdweEon66iMFcy5hGSML69LfzkzVkt7A7A6xHA-SUAhWFnbobgPOT3xRgSBYAUV7h9zIHbv7z6Ifzdj9A51G4zcgBLF6A1lZJRVZfqUIWKn_MTVEo1AfTaUnmaZE8t_A7U9gWe4LFYqPzTGDJg-UO0CER0mh0Cf5Ex1rufUtTQN0AAzdmAn2ak8ToEGbtqIaeNQ0cZJUnFkFd_bWTYJQGM7mCEAgftkHUwP310CQadW7_4AdM-dztXrqWpTSuU9cMC2Nt4V9xPf5uKBCm)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9506a1545f74e4f9e5f10fb48b29753&_e=qapb83XCnDBM-xAelFwUjBZwQNv2ZKasXf69r768NIfRVBFxdaUNwGmSipLYpBaf59OfWwAMUg0eWWdOAuSm9HIppHgHgGSdd9dDbb902Lsujw8g0ufLABVdKAHNyXSofQaPLZjazwvREjMtcWuZDKD510HG0btYX0lhJ0YvTkoJ1bdLnYaQvl6JE7S4D5n6tQt0sQ0X086v-mYkBmqsl9r_nkC7G960qrWv-b899T3IAxUIuu8gCAhJwf9HiVWkPzVDFmu4RD8BgFwbovHNB1DzqA6bLnnw0qEInb0qr2yXfIuvErznWGkf6NXv1IQ-tMYUHjhnoaB6SLz7esvw_1-UxFgOA7RP3q45-ldv1_ElJxiW-OMM7UuwHLK-MQ4g94dG3EMR2BtBB_UartD5OJFt2_z80Fp9VZUeA2LsmIdf9hyYunppDdv8u5c7v89YXClm6x7lCckuqlhNW20DFznQVTXLilUT_dC92BEZJY44onMlmqa0BXRCLHTkQGNdZoduwh85bD153SlFcp5893mv3YIKgyO5_hDOX7wA1vHMUs5csstppSz1pG7gCIkllROQ1AqASng3n4nCxKEx_Q6cKvM5tW-pHVnnicjgiizXiP3vupOCwAGcQ5dAe6xI)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm
* Mental health challenges that their families can never understand

All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment.

But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance.
