Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Wirepoints Faces 74% Revenue Drop Since 2020 as Spending Spikes 57% as Leader Eyes Governor Run on Fiscal Issues (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(iStock by Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

An Illinois-based nonprofit that provides original research and commentary on the state’s economy and government finances is facing a financial crisis of its own as its president considers a run for governor.

Since 2020, Wirepoints has seen a steep decline in revenue. The organization reported $1.12 million at its peak that year, but by 2022, revenue had fallen to $709,000, dropping further to just $294,175 in 2023. With expenses totaling $688,601 that year, Wirepoints faced a deficit of $394,426.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(ProPublica)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(ProPublica)
Despite bringing in only $294,175 in 2023, the fiscally conservative nonprofit spent $200,000 on executive salaries – $100,000 to President Ted Dabrowski and $100,000 to the vice president. An additional $295,252 went to other staff, bringing total salaries for the year to $495,252.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(ProPublica)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(ProPublica)
Dabrowski, a close ally of state central committee member Jeanne Ives and Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, regularly offers commentary on Illinois’ finances and economy. He has led Wirepoints since its founding in 2018.

For years, Dabrowski has warned about the state’s chronic overspending – what he calls the “corrupt practice of deficit spending” – arguing that Springfield politicians consistently spend more than they take in.

However, his organization mirrors the state’s spending habits, raising only $294,175 in 2023 while incurring $688,601 in operating expenses, resulting in a deficit that he cites as evidence of the problems in Illinois government.

At the time of this publication, Wirepoints has not filed any disclosures with the IRS for fiscal year 2024.

As Dabrowski considers a governor’s run on a platform of fixing the state’s overspending, his potential candidacy is already stirring controversy.

At the Illinois State Fair last Thursday, Dabrowski steered clear of President Donald Trump, following a strategy favored by party insiders.

“Illinois’ problems have nothing to do with Donald Trump,” Dabrowski told a Republican crowd at the state fair. “He can’t fix the property taxes. He can’t fix the gas tax. He can’t fix our out-migration. We have to fix it.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/wirepoints-faces-74-revenue-drop-since-2020-as-spending-spikes-57-as-leader-eyes-governor-run-on-fiscal-issues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c760c235b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ted Dabrowski, president of Wirepoints, speaks to reporters after telling fellow Republicans he plans to announce a bid for governor soon. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Jerry Nowicki)
For years, Dabrowski has maintained his distance from Trump, carefully avoiding any hint of an endorsement.

Dabrowski will face DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick in the Republican primary for governor, with additional candidates expected to enter the race in the coming months.

The primary is scheduled for March 17, 2026.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Wirepoints Faces 74% Revenue Drop Since 2020 as Spending Spikes 57% as Leader Eyes Governor Run on Fiscal Issues () (iStock by Getty Images) By Illinois Review An Illinois-based nonprofit that provides original research and commentary on the state’s economy and government finances is facing a financial crisis of its own as its president considers a run for governor. Since 2020, Wirepoints has seen a steep decline in revenue. The organization reported $1.12 million at its peak that year, but by 2022, revenue had fallen to $709,000, dropping further to just $294,175 in 2023. With expenses totaling $688,601 that year, Wirepoints faced a deficit of $394,426. (ProPublica) (ProPublica) Despite bringing in only $294,175 in 2023, the fiscally conservative nonprofit spent $200,000 on executive salaries – $100,000 to President Ted Dabrowski and $100,000 to the vice president. An additional $295,252 went to other staff, bringing total salaries for the year to $495,252. (ProPublica) (ProPublica) Dabrowski, a close ally of state central committee member Jeanne Ives and Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, regularly offers commentary on Illinois’ finances and economy. He has led Wirepoints since its founding in 2018. For years, Dabrowski has warned about the state’s chronic overspending – what he calls the “corrupt practice of deficit spending” – arguing that Springfield politicians consistently spend more than they take in. However, his organization mirrors the state’s spending habits, raising only $294,175 in 2023 while incurring $688,601 in operating expenses, resulting in a deficit that he cites as evidence of the problems in Illinois government. At the time of this publication, Wirepoints has not filed any disclosures with the IRS for fiscal year 2024. As Dabrowski considers a governor’s run on a platform of fixing the state’s overspending, his potential candidacy is already stirring controversy. At the Illinois State Fair last Thursday, Dabrowski steered clear of President Donald Trump, following a strategy favored by party insiders. “Illinois’ problems have nothing to do with Donald Trump,” Dabrowski told a Republican crowd at the state fair. “He can’t fix the property taxes. He can’t fix the gas tax. He can’t fix our out-migration. We have to fix it.” Ted Dabrowski, president of Wirepoints, speaks to reporters after telling fellow Republicans he plans to announce a bid for governor soon. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Jerry Nowicki) For years, Dabrowski has maintained his distance from Trump, carefully avoiding any hint of an endorsement. Dabrowski will face DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick in the Republican primary for governor, with additional candidates expected to enter the race in the coming months. The primary is scheduled for March 17, 2026. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You’ll want to be able to say: “I was part of this.”
body:
Something’s shifting... and fast
You're going to want to say you were part of this

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e2d3e5b213bb4672b417d569f7979109&_e=3_ZVdExTu30PUhRy63bA95WACQCoIBabYw3cDroZ-ohOCh67fTEFVsKVBAdOZCEhl2sy6rknz9jltYS8X_7-4luL465cQFLmMxk6TQs0U0H9vLSb2fPRGXEI1vagAEN2quGt3Jg9B6d6jt5gCMfQtThoiEGVBbVNTJ3zhH3I_BE9ws0EPJKklzLHO3KzRL06QFO4jHkEr7GrEI9gy2pdbkebVkY5rLvMOWEpjPdlfGUse4s_xlPuwdhaKi4BXhOI2GwWksIGLO6SdvFSTPvX7cnFyGY5fFrjYdF4IXjTCt_u4TDZx6eN94TMWHSLSMioYfNX4w0q4U-ZVj_MmY8ABHkwl5PGYrmoyw1CLq7u_ZKW3gSMNBk6LTEVTmsFAjgLNSoBYHxrrO2aFtyyECJvP6tP_krUJbmBjbk-2YjXbLkLy80wQrs3IFVANnwh41TYTT0Xm73IHemFe0e8jkQIh5sQ769tuQVsLwALq8A_2pKwjnZoNJxxmjRAE0qJ94XQC9Wz75nA2IVQ5oK5ihDEsQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter
---
I don't know how else to say this... But something _historic_ is happening. And I want YOU to be part of it.At every college campus Turning Point USA visits, we see lines of college students stretching across the quads... wrapping around the buildings...We see thousands show up -- not to protest, not to disrupt -- but to hear the TRUTH. They wave the American flag. They chant _" USA!" _at the top of their lungs.They walk out of our events ready to fight for faith, family, and freedom.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e2d3e5b213bb4672b417d569f7979109&_e=3_ZVdExTu30PUhRy63bA95WACQCoIBabYw3cDroZ-ohOCh67fTEFVsKVBAdOZCEhl2sy6rknz9jltYS8X_7-4luL465cQFLmMxk6TQs0U0H9vLSb2fPRGXEI1vagAEN2quGt3Jg9B6d6jt5gCMfQtYjHzwrjNYt9lGXfvY3cqURi4UDA0hZXtS3Wl6zKBVG3VuLNNq0VflpY5WfsppakE-10jcHONuWnMHXxePUWVdN6oN7Srpk0x8mUhs6jHs1aAsBMmSQ1JHKNJmHCPJH7IMDi5EAjt38sN98DTyDHNtGPt9qURpaGzUJ_c0F1trCFUseLLdmm2A92Pdef8vqiXXCMDVKQGwUdVfoGwzkXiImWR5aiBjKSrGN-SX-4XgOwxJPUN2Yd_Bmr1rKycSuxniO2hNn8PsWkllSFs91ssrbitxyaaMFled4QvxNI81lumVi6Ug3cko2K_GUllEx08K_-EhhN0bO0BpREo6D68ia6ysGceg9yS1-KRkoCW8Lfqv312Pzmm3TVElK54CUN0g%3D%3D)
---
These kids were supposed to be the generation that gave up on America...But instead? **_They 're falling in love with her all over again._**That's not hype...That's what's happening.Right now. On college campuses. In deep-blue states. In places the Left thought they owned.And let me be clear: It's not just happening because of me... **It 's happening because patriots like you are stepping up. Because you've chosen to stand up and say: "We're not losing this country."**You're the reason we can show up and speak boldly on college campuses. You're the reason students feel the courage to stand up for their country.You're the reason this movement is catching fire across America. But Peter I don't want you to just watch this revolution from the sidelines...I want you to help drive it.To push it further. To wake up even more campuses and young hearts and minds. To CRACK every last one of the Left's strongholds...And help us DEFEAT the Left in the American Culture War. **That 's why today, when you make your gift in any amount to Turning Point USA...****I 'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat -- the same one students are BEGGING for on campus -- as my personal thank-you.**_Not because you need a hat ... _But because you deserve a reminder in your hands that says: _" I helped build this. I stood up when it counted. I helped SAVE my country."_
---

---
To say we're seeing a "shift" in Gen Z would be an understatement...We're witnessing a youth REVOLUTION... and we're leading a generational REALIGNMENT. You can feel it in the air. You can see it in their eyes.You can hear it when they shout for FREEDOM. FAITH. FAMILY. COUNTRY.**They 're not ashamed anymore. These kids are PROUD to be American.**That's the country I know you and I love. That's the movement we're building. _And I 'm asking YOU to be part of it right now, when it matters most..._Because if we don't go BIGGER... If we don't seize this momentum with everything we've got......the Left will come roaring back.They're already plotting. Already mobilizing. Already trying to take back the ground they've lost.But we can't let them.Not now. Not after how far we've come.Not when we're _this close_ to turning it all around.**So please, Peter: Make your first gift to Turning Point USA today.**
---

Join the fight. Fuel this movement. Help us reach the next campus, the next student, the next generation.And I'll send you your "47" hat as a symbol of what YOU made possible.

For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO

clean_body: Something’s shifting... and fast You're going to want to say you were part of this | | | Peter I don't know how else to say this... But something historic is happening. And I want YOU to be part of it.At every college campus Turning Point USA visits, we see lines of college students stretching across the quads... wrapping around the buildings...We see thousands show up -- not to protest, not to disrupt -- but to hear the TRUTH. They wave the American flag. They chant " USA!" at the top of their lungs.They walk out of our events ready to fight for faith, family, and freedom. These kids were supposed to be the generation that gave up on America...But instead? They 're falling in love with her all over again.That's not hype...That's what's happening.Right now. On college campuses. In deep-blue states. In places the Left thought they owned.And let me be clear: It's not just happening because of me... It 's happening because patriots like you are stepping up. Because you've chosen to stand up and say: "We're not losing this country."You're the reason we can show up and speak boldly on college campuses. You're the reason students feel the courage to stand up for their country.You're the reason this movement is catching fire across America. But Peter I don't want you to just watch this revolution from the sidelines...I want you to help drive it.To push it further. To wake up even more campuses and young hearts and minds. To CRACK every last one of the Left's strongholds...And help us DEFEAT the Left in the American Culture War. That 's why today, when you make your gift in any amount to Turning Point USA...I 'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat -- the same one students are BEGGING for on campus -- as my personal thank-you.Not because you need a hat ... But because you deserve a reminder in your hands that says: " I helped build this. I stood up when it counted. I helped SAVE my country." To say we're seeing a "shift" in Gen Z would be an understatement...We're witnessing a youth REVOLUTION... and we're leading a generational REALIGNMENT. You can feel it in the air. You can see it in their eyes.You can hear it when they shout for FREEDOM. FAITH. FAMILY. COUNTRY.They 're not ashamed anymore. These kids are PROUD to be American.That's the country I know you and I love. That's the movement we're building. And I 'm asking YOU to be part of it right now, when it matters most...Because if we don't go BIGGER... If we don't seize this momentum with everything we've got......the Left will come roaring back.They're already plotting. Already mobilizing. Already trying to take back the ground they've lost.But we can't let them.Not now. Not after how far we've come.Not when we're this close to turning it all around.So please, Peter: Make your first gift to Turning Point USA today. Join the fight. Fuel this movement. Help us reach the next campus, the next student, the next generation.And I'll send you your "47" hat as a symbol of what YOU made possible. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. This is the turning point that we've been waiting for...Our opportunity to take our country and our future back from the Left and DEFEAT them in our culture once and for all.Let's keep the fire going. Let's change history. Let's make Gen Z the MOST PATRIOTIC generation in American history. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: NEW POLL: 🔵Sherrill 48%, 🔴 Ciattarelli 42%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
#
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
**🔵 Mikie Sherrill - 48%**
**🔴 Jack Ciattarelli - 42%**
**⚪ Undecided - 9%**
**This new poll shows Mikie’s MAGA opponent just barely trailing Mikie in the race for governor — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the result.**
**[We knew this race was going to be close, Peter, and this poll proves it. And with Ciattarelli launching one false attack after another, we have no time to waste getting Mikie’s message out. Can we count on you to split a donation of _any amount_ between our campaign and State Democrats Committee to help keep New Jersey blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94114?refcode=em20250822-9318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9318%2E614464%2E_h-9mg)**

But if you split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today, we can fight back and win this race. | | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis. Despite a record thirty-year low for violent crime in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump has deployed the National Guard and seized control of the police. And he won't stop here. He's made it clear that he plans to target other Democrat-run states and cities next. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113812323/565019169/-76487485?source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_082225_CRIME_365DO120DD30NTL_D1_S1_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTNkNmNjYi04ZDdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmlvuooxALHpQpimOoswaZrijdABQwvS-VxSpp0UT4Q=) **Peter, there are productive, comprehensive ways to address crime.** **This isn't one of them.** Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Shapiro and I have worked to reduce violent crime through funding community programming, and since entering office, gun violence has dropped by 42%. **Taking care of each other works.** We need to lead with empathy first, rather than throw punishments at problems as a show of force. Reducing crime and making our communities safer is possible through intervention and prevention. **Trump's decision to deploy the National Guard and seize control of the D.C. police stands in direct opposition to the methods we know to work.** We need compassionate policies that bring our communities together and forward. clean_body: Trump won't stop here. He's made it clear that he plans to target other Democrat-run states and cities next. Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis. Despite a record thirty-year low for violent crime in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump has deployed the National Guard and seized control of the police. And he won't stop here. He's made it clear that he plans to target other Democrat-run states and cities next. = Peter, there are productive, comprehensive ways to address crime. This isn't one of them. Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Shapiro and I have worked to reduce violent crime through funding community programming, and since entering office, gun violence has dropped by 42%. Taking care of each other works. We need to lead with empathy first, rather than throw punishments at problems as a show of force. Reducing crime and making our communities safer is possible through intervention and prevention. Trump's decision to deploy the National Guard and seize control of the D.C. police stands in direct opposition to the methods we know to work. We need compassionate policies that bring our communities together and forward. Donald Trump is using fear tactics and aggression to divide us and send us backward. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. name: Zack Exley, Saikat for Congress
subject: Saturday canvass details & progress report
body:
Join us this Saturday

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=0119f6798c&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | | Dear Friend,We’ve got another volunteer canvass happening at **11:00 AM tomorrow** (Saturday, Aug. 23) to knock some doors with our campaign team! And Saikat will be helping to lead the training this week and will be out knocking doors with you!Meet us at Campaign HQ, [**800 Irving St**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=64f4d9cf22&e=bf17056ae8) — right on the N and many bus lines. [**Click here to let us know you’re coming**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=8565a0336c&e=bf17056ae8) , or _just show up!__(BTW: If you’re returning, you’ll skip the training and go right out!)_ Last week, 50+ volunteers got trained at our office to canvass and talked to hundreds of voters. We had a great feedback/brainstorming session afterwards with everyone who had time to stay and have made improvements based on what we learned. Here’s video evidence that I’m not making all this up:
---
[|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=8bde85c06b&e=bf17056ae8)
| | Two more quick things:**1) We’re REALLY looking for volunteers who’d like to contact people in their apartment building or on their block.** We’ll provide training, assistance, and our organizers will go with you the first time. Neighbors talking to neighbors is the best way to connect with voters about Saikat's campaign. If you’d like to participate in this pilot program, [**please sign up here**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=660fa5fd6a&e=bf17056ae8). **2) We are still looking to hire paid canvassers!** Please email us at team@saikat.us to apply. Please note: This is a physically demanding job (with all our hills and stairs!) that requires going door-to-door for a minimum of five hours per day. We’ll be holding an orientation call for everyone who’s applied very soon!**OK, back to Saturday:****🗓 Canvass Day Details
** **Date:** Saturday, August 23, 2025
**Time:** 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM
**Location:** Saikat for Congress HQ — 800 Irving St, San Francisco, CAWe’ll be walking nearby the office in the **Inner Sunset** , so everything is just a few blocks from HQ. Before heading out, we’ll do a quick training on how to knock doors, use the MiniVAN app, and connect with neighbors about why Saikat is the bold, progressive voice San Francisco needs in Congress.Starting soon, we’ll be branching out to many other neighborhoods and launching from different locations. **Again, if you came out with us last week, then we’ll send you right out and you can skip the training.****What to Bring:**
* A **fully charged smartphone**
* The “**MiniVAN app”** downloaded from your phone’s app store (we’ll help if needed). If you have time, watch [**this video**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=526ebaba42&e=bf17056ae8) on how to use the app for canvassing.
* **Comfortable walking shoes**
* **Water**

**What to Expect:**
* Meeting other passionate progressives
* Learning to have impactful conversations with voters
* Sharing your ideas and reflections during our end-of-day **debrief**
* Helping to shape a campaign that listens and leads with heart
* Snacks and small bites

This campaign only works because of people like _you_. Let’s show San Francisco what grassroots power looks like!See you Saturday!Zack Exley
Campaign Manager
**Saikat for Congress**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=6c971fc0dc&e=bf17056ae8)
| | [saikat.us](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=d43c04ec65&e=bf17056ae8)
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/about?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=aa640cfeb8) [unsubscribe from this list](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&t=b&e=bf17056ae8&c=aa640cfeb8) [update subscription preferences](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=aa640cfeb8)

| | Luna and I have been working on something big, and to be honest, we may go down in flames for it—but that’s okay. To keep you folks in the loop, I’m talking about Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, one of my favorite House colleagues and a good friend. She’s a woman of high ideals; a tough lady who served our country before coming to Congress. Not long ago, I had the pleasure of welcoming her to East Tennessee for a fundraising breakfast with some of my constituents—and she fit right in. Folks around here are a pretty good judge of character, and they could tell she’s the real deal. Anyway, she’s stepping up to [force a House vote](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/RmAAszbrQ65T4GNzbUjxQb9fp3Xy7DuZ5P6IaTICldO7bJ4jhLyijfYFjC8lZLXHUldJMmjNday4poymeJ1EXGWyOxCnuty1eg8Hmv4B_x8Th4MZ5rQGNAHEargwmmY6jper2OojRuGKorOb4cCywe4vXFIpKB3--nLjG8MxZUmU9S9bst3jSpCUcH_BefFa7u2Q916Wvyup2uyx4GM0tpq73-GnCnypt7i26U_TJsoHMNCBkI6uTTTGClHPSMAaF05CXZmYUGum-QaaSVa4tA8JzNg60qjQAOo-w-aqYh-GOEpbBfUpB_KfVUWVJ8U4yeeb1qbMoUxcEO3LCOuQxw4N2DuMHMNh84a3-F-pz44XKEzSpDxjydQEIo03zq_G3KYae_6cPDDANJ3xz4rHJw_rZxj2zlcK6elf7iTe40l9Ka_OoJWh9TR4qxpY4L0uqXq_QIfZBKYsdWV_OkIgaU8X86sOO_Bpfcx1pJDsNg7ZT9oM66ZfwcOxuzSwx0-Qq3HvbagPpbmUU82G8mZJ2Vj_7M9vqETA1ty5cNTRcZ7yCBfGn_FOp673HjXDlIZNuHVOv31p_4Qa/dF4g4qFLbQ1ylWt82tI9_rO3GfD7BUlw/12) on my congressional stock trading ban when Congress returns to Washington. Last week, I was on a “thread,” as the kids say, with Luna and Speaker Johnson—and she was wearing him down, showing him that we’re ready to rumble. Let me ask you something: Are you raking in returns on your stock investments every year? Cause members of Congress [on both sides of the aisle](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/msWUt6LfBc8GZ_ZOWw5a0hrg7lFloLAXmxbK58YdOThJVi5TJtchdrtTCQSs0bt2Htpa4dfEr4oWO5kv7Jp7f1SoHbd_Cs5ZfYz_BNDBNcpXdlXfckUcin8hS_VwS76WWqjnsvHBxrl8sTa0dkn-ca7hNhm5GvM2sYftSWrbz6nJ3HXTcaj_IjxPEj1aMUvEoBVNuygu_Gw1CYZBOrFdtOeI0sVrL1RY8KrO4Xwao_qj0r0ensHevQgBTlGveXJqgInHv_yR2O_33g61mOJxSErsl58hrYzWsXnhw0KsnmZRg2vw9A-kIvsGOmYd1TfhkpVHdqWDQsYUbDTA4OkYoWWrrB6sT6kcwyT9j1G-u9dlE7_ZOTd65xH2R2HZdejt7NaNNrE/qhsuUs4aaforc_uss83ACLC_0-j1Wt3T/12) sure are. Their stock trades are timed like clockwork—often tied to [inside information](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/yGr2Rq5AxgQXXQI7LcM8z9glpd183RfTnUljOuI-MkpNhhiQxLkhkZCZ5q4cRyV6E4tb9xcpI0C-h7sw1rGDATIbnNwGjlL7QGWjk9tJO-hF8SKD8vrdibP-eh6EQeZiOr4by0BMqtAs0cxk3OM0SlmNjT5akkyKb-zxFhr6dhTjzRoFdv1NKj2PaLB_rTjMjg_uT_5hVf5DRRcx7o8ro5Xyb_sTF4CrcF7PmbNxXjNOybjTp7BrtSm-9QVlIPSGdyaE9xO_Bu8QRFvJTio51yOA2hsaLHuzdGUHCHDNryMiS1QzxNB2RmQgmFQn_p1fvplgYbQ7e0wJIfDPURAnA_uhLpYCijzQq7kgXuaorqyAVfsfJUZl6BMS4yrqjqqHyOOeaDo7WH_8jWa6u4eTXk6X_lLA-lgmzp4Cu95u0tuyJjTaV1e-wcXRBQbQYtqImoLe5jgfddXhdzpYeD7BzdTuQ2b0MF6ItXpW-o9JMb1xq--E9lPhMdzJuABnuOM67UuedMx_l91fak4poHd9ZTolEQzTlNMXOP8-evubzXnn_ULeEhuL5gU2LDiUSC1o40F9zk5m4hebX-6sit6NFjq3uQofPztPdxqq8euzCvJGbZgdZzlb5DkhKKQF_SMpBEMfRNwbfoIiRtB6_Q/B-cYn4CBXvxGYYXC-pHuNKZuQZiQwWNu/12) they’re privy to. For heaven’s sake, don’t even get me started on defense spending and how all that is [tied up with members](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/4g0k_h30ktkVx0r1TXlNL6c2MZCARur3RBAxCCh1tTWAzBAEV3irMLbnmUXKr7MwOgRqRMn5E67me_FltmZRnR7LMk0V9_deObxyRb5w1i9XojtLd24NrlYhzBK5-hG_BJrKKxEkd_HtFUMQ8u7SDtin8HLpM7iQChessHJ68QWRA4i8JmLyEHO5n5XBb9ykgAIkhSVy5ufRBX66E_-J4JNGPfl0WOoan1EenaEZeBM_CkNh36lG19xhUMpFE2sJvhFcwzqEdg3kl60IayRxoevHFdO6cmGVfzK8AaclgIeU92FxbOSHwk5xsesvdqzGzb4gtUl7jS9mEeUiadI2gbssCURwhoPLNvdgfxU2erpJZhpPv-i1zzMD73pg4hTVNN2kLwSKURIO_5LUVifQCy7LvdxA40rP8mZ1Rks3VrEqEwTFu5hTTmwNqyG2uIeCAf57dbccv-nT1SNYCc9fV5fIPhntpd3Kgkk4abI6dKPSVNTU9sXkqUs9pRxaKpbd1pbtFS36RStavn6PRrA8XibXr4fPV5j9BBLv08VJ1oMrC9awAFB3-3LOVhUrOT6OPCl0WEj-I-S0Nrvm-B6h/NTMBsci_ELhPkbeKjl9sAqjvsuVqWbYi/12) who are heavily invested (literally). We’re talking about multibillion-dollar contracts, and you can bet members with stock in those companies are ridin’ high every time the federal government signs one of those deals. It’s crooked as a dog’s leg, as we say in Tennessee. There’s a bunch of chatter about another [bipartisan bill](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/FAfCZ-sp0aQaG7U2-983NtUp6nvimTSFrzm0B-X5g-gcLALzuElcE4WkjK5N6VbdHV2oM831uXfZFxtqMN0YAd4IZAPfyddrlqoC-XZkALHiYSl6N9tNy3EfEyDSWQLN_N_sioX04c-yngL30Xo6IkC-GmeItEpVMzW2vVSCcORDjDQwCfKKgyaRhPprQ0TXWr871rZRQNs7Og78VuNaPsfJsMpXKr0_OcyqQKWsw0hzjeoxKu6DuL2V3Kh9glOSRayk-_FQ5y446-Z3_C9EzWaNYPlMQC4L18avw3q6x9lgR-jYzFAKFEvP0totWitImh8PQj-QilND9s7kXhe4E9zKAJlZIyx4lnP28xM630gcWhhDtpp9twH5ttlbhcSzA_f9cGKC8HfGulP9v1sR1kJmqonXe1fa7E42zi_d3wWR_bwunah9tmfD3WbkaleU6UXPpuWD63IHlEc2l3A59-4lU7YELyOoyD_yZQo9TA/9SqbG0Itnu5bJg1rMizl6jz3efZi18NK/12) on this topic, but they’re still stuck in negotiations that may never hit the floor. And to be honest, it’s probably because they’re more concerned with making sure they don’t hurt their friends. It won’t go anywhere, so that’s why Luna’s ready to force a vote on my bill. The approval rating for Congress is down in the dumps, and members need to take [a play out of my book](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/fFhqG38kao5nyefM1PVC8coJw9c08IamGbqWAnceyHmH8B-v4P3WoRy9tpeWVJ0oQZD_I2BQeiSXvRvr_ql4Zt7T7wqDsjt7pU5BrLhxc_RDsj5hGuo3vTU0GczOlIQyeLaqb-KqUHZYQaVpMy_TOfw8h8ooJju-6SAGCsZWmsAPuZnDYtNzum-FK3pnIEeGDOXeqsgjMTsCn_ZyCXbFCcJKSD0rc_3MkOgiUIsOfTy8I4uARS_Oci5a2wCIi2IBPTZvw2exV0FAbv_5n3bn1OTDMhK-BCvkQ5sM8pR-6ukYrUFSE6AchaMc1ZicBCI2Jy7eRKhP2ToDRJAqzPg6K37thpgjh8ONI5FwpBOmHnjCVzgCOMKkOVNHdLHLOFAfZtfWNKZj7DeQLCOoyG8E9OELtpi1v3vzz4gdi7yIW-fX1z3P4g/4ygzg9RMH2N8X4h84xi-HuDQcie8GSYh/12): Move it all to a mutual fund that doesn’t water down your ability to serve the people. We’re sick of messing around. End individual stock trading [by members of Congress](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/c7O61XqSYDSvKtYA7E1lFuT4uchTaopVb1DAianGOQLKxE2E7mTk7gP1V1ZnsmN8VPj2BwGTbfgotLaGkqChZjVabdq9YSu5r1bYIT7bDt0Ce9e2g7rD39LcUFiY4HYRx1O_zIqli46Pm1yVtb-AfStg3y75vy5v9czPK1-C4V3EHtGvl_MQpCAWTnhI499K0p7t7YFAdJN849loLu0GMt53K5Xz-X5720OaojkpooZgbITwJHdWca-8VNF5tSE2YSP7tLcv2Ydye6MVqtktvSP6JDp7-Mqh_U4uV4nrWwbyg1AJykCH8zNuJVhgp10q6Pbo-nKe0PriqfRLQIhc9pZsycwlTLMs1Eg6IOFcbZdHfOtUIAlj8Bxf8TkKHPHI38Z7WF00qo2Wr-AlT4cgtidDKA1OrpCyJlhfpDkWwv0SerrsBg/3FOqlunKLSREkWLG3GQevHDeRpG6SE_j/12).

| | **Home In Tennessee 🧡**

| | I’m still having a ball at home in Tennessee, and I’m making every day count. I was glad to take part in a ribbon cutting to celebrate new investments in Head Start and Community Action Committee (CAC) that will provide important resources for families in Knox County. I know I speak for all of us when I say we’re a grateful community for all the work they do to support folks here at home. I also want to give a shoutout to [Rutherford Tennessee GOP](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/eaJ-ng4rj3QCIW1Od1gHp1UH6nTf7AtrmAZfEYrpZQARH96JGYh4INcLuJGk9nDpleD8imVtkh7kq5jmOVAFUmM3AgxmyoGlNoQIXQkqqmhSb3UBbjMslGUiUrKylBQBP7o43DpTTSJqRjS4yIPCPN1q62NgeltmP-raKUVW6sfkNXNRbz_HEjBLAnRpUYDB-2nVZQGmyRTDYDaI7FgDKFXfAZHYi-TwTLk6I2ao0vt1lyfHtjqKHNOQhOouAzzU-qYY5vGQKW2XxzYYiOB5VdGrywDcAi4_8fZrbgCPxDK3JjLr9TElqazDcAJaXJxOCME8U8DP6PX0LB7PjxziVw65DXALTmrlMEBuOfnR0pAl0ER2PX7J5uz7IBFkNMY_5iQ38DaWOZ2gDlTV14lI3o3G-BDQfir4ZstLCMkzI0K3WiTusPo/CRjh1kX-J9m1FF0SzdltPLd0LM9WvPot/12) for asking me to come on their podcast and share a little bit about myself and my work. clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | Burchett 🤝Luna | | | | Luna and I have been working on something big, and to be honest, we may go down in flames for it—but that’s okay. To keep you folks in the loop, I’m talking about Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, one of my favorite House colleagues and a good friend. She’s a woman of high ideals; a tough lady who served our country before coming to Congress. Not long ago, I had the pleasure of welcoming her to East Tennessee for a fundraising breakfast with some of my constituents—and she fit right in. Folks around here are a pretty good judge of character, and they could tell she’s the real deal. Anyway, she’s stepping up to on my congressional stock trading ban when Congress returns to Washington. Last week, I was on a “thread,” as the kids say, with Luna and Speaker Johnson—and she was wearing him down, showing him that we’re ready to rumble. Let me ask you something: Are you raking in returns on your stock investments every year? Cause members of Congress sure are. Their stock trades are timed like clockwork—often tied to they’re privy to. For heaven’s sake, don’t even get me started on defense spending and how all that is who are heavily invested (literally). We’re talking about multibillion-dollar contracts, and you can bet members with stock in those companies are ridin’ high every time the federal government signs one of those deals. It’s crooked as a dog’s leg, as we say in Tennessee. There’s a bunch of chatter about another on this topic, but they’re still stuck in negotiations that may never hit the floor. And to be honest, it’s probably because they’re more concerned with making sure they don’t hurt their friends. It won’t go anywhere, so that’s why Luna’s ready to force a vote on my bill. The approval rating for Congress is down in the dumps, and members need to take : Move it all to a mutual fund that doesn’t water down your ability to serve the people. We’re sick of messing around. End individual stock trading . | | Home In Tennessee 🧡 | | | | I’m still having a ball at home in Tennessee, and I’m making every day count. I was glad to take part in a ribbon cutting to celebrate new investments in Head Start and Community Action Committee (CAC) that will provide important resources for families in Knox County. I know I speak for all of us when I say we’re a grateful community for all the work they do to support folks here at home. I also want to give a shoutout to for asking me to come on their podcast and share a little bit about myself and my work. And last but not least, I can’t forget to thank the ladies who packed the house at the as well. What a blessing it is to serve folks like you all. | | Just For Fun 🥳 | | → Anything for love 🤟🏻 () → Is it fall yet!? 🫠 () → Mama’s the boss 🦛 () | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: August 2025 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
August 2025 Newsletter
Supporting Our Youth: Child Advocacy Centers
Earlier this month, I had the privilege of touring the Child Advocacy Centers (CACs) in Charles and Calvert counties. These centers provide safe, welcoming environments where children and families can access critical services, including forensic interviewing, advocacy, and therapy. They play an essential role in both preventing and treating child abuse in our communities.
Last year, I visited the Prince George’s center, which does incredible work, so it was inspiring to see how other counties are carrying out this vital mission.
I am deeply grateful to the dedicated teams at the Charles and Calvert County CACs for their inspiring work on behalf of our most vulnerable community members. Their compassion and commitment make a profound difference in the lives of children and families every day.
Maryland is home to 24 Child Advocacy Centers, ensuring that every child in our state has access to these vital resources. Find your local Maryland Children’s Alliance Center here [https://www.marylandchildrensalliance.org/find-cac/] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Child%20Advocacy%20Centers.jpg]
Federal Workers Resource Hub
I was honored to join my friend, Prince George’s County Council Member Shayla Adams-Stafford, at her Federal Worker Resource Hub event. The Hub brought together federal workers with local and state partners, offering critical support during this uncertain time. From resume workshops and benefits assistance to networking opportunities, attendees were able to access the tools they need to navigate today’s challenges.
At a moment when the Trump Administration continues its unprecedented attacks on these essential workers, it’s inspiring to see Maryland and Prince George’s County stepping up. We are sending a clear message: federal workers are not alone. Supporting them has long been one of my priorities, and this year I was proud to help pass the Protect Our Federal Workers Act to ensure they receive the respect and security they deserve.
A heartfelt thank you to Council Member Adams-Stafford for her leadership and commitment to our community’s workforce.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Federal%20Workers%20Resource%20Hub.jpg]
Prince George's County Expungement and Resource Fair
Last week, I joined Prince George's County Child Support Administration for its 2025 Expungement and Resource Fair. Many organizations joined us to offer their services to allow community members to receive the essential support and meaningful opportunities they need for a fresh start.
Thank you to the Prince George's County Child Support Administration for allowing me to join and for hosting this important event!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/PGCo.%20Expungement%20and%20Resource%20Fair.jpg]
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151
6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401
800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us
www.jazzlewis.com
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: President Fatima Heyward via ActionNetwork.org
subject: TODAY: National Youth Town Hall (Virtual)
body:
Join us at 4pm ET for a national town hall! | | |
Attention Young Democrats, The time is now. The future of our democracy is in our hands. Today, the Young Democrats of America, in partnership with the DC Young Democrats, College Democrats of America, High School Democrats of America, and others, are hosting a virtual National Youth Town Hall.
Key leaders from across the country will come together to discuss the critical issues surrounding the federal takeover of Washington, D.C.—and how we can take action against it. Don’t miss this opportunity to join this important event. [Register here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhy_TtrWBBAnh9vPhfXW55SOYJbs4UkOgVYzt8AGOsvCuMDrLU-6wHZzdkLnHoz2jBPEtS3RAtB_AHm2FUR49y4h9Nw4OQdaYHFSW8GB9eh7YlJPX-gLwu5P2ONlYvAzc5R3FH5zKrNC6QdGc4avQjBMsuRIO23HL2D4XAJc07WWNjA7vWNVkN13fTxEM6QZsKDiliKA2WXRaquyP2rvTijTSxfwKDWUBHSUF2Pl8y6llZ70PsYDXIo7ix6D2qGP0BRFL_x8lomtaYcC3cDp4Q78Kps8AVL6GjT9kWymgTxZd1PGaU8gcnA2kPKrslq8eChsIpL8YO_KG_Ok5qOx9sUHwQ7t9AgrEb96XdNM8iiL3JiLs_LJk9HdD96lXn_soXjQ/4j9/hLrK5N63Tp-nUoHqb4KwwQ/h0/h001.lBUq6HTlCc_LLtJfF-Y8dkXFXyKVHaGiT0g_QNjRi3g).

* * *
### Reminders:
* **Appointment Applications Are Now Open:** The application will be open until 11:59 PM CST on Friday, August 22nd. Please find more information and the application [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mh1XP4uYQOZ13jho2SJ2dIAMDIyo8Dw6QkfhcbskR_YjBXT3CxWW4JoviqDLoKqNO2Piv09lg4vna9h_49fHu_0DqhwnMjtA7L4jNu5KVh8xsoXfNqIz76ezhzpctNhtKaah7id3nYeGg83rNd4lV8a9oTQPOdpRyntIqagyoTQOTJMJmsXdrEJe_b-duLQIp5xB1BRcFZ_lZOwRby3PrUfEzRhbSejM2Coioh0rQ0iX9pCNdQ3BLOFZXKOjxgLDVFENWXtmbID316BMlDIAjOCOUOLTLm0kZUO91i989_AcOcKEPDUeKJwrlSw_BBdu-EvtSxafuTnxp_SLuBpXRVZ2lTu12YeZ1GSK63dKrKz0o4F-DvV6bx0qjxvTmdSJI0JxM_mE2a3yBMj1OFSWQnqwmX8Ecv4mpjZ3B1m_hMR-KmkcyqEJpRrOU93QZ9PWEAWSC4ZogDMe-2cFkrM7e5AQvGvinEWpmMHk6pcyx1m2/4j9/hLrK5N63Tp-nUoHqb4KwwQ/h1/h001.gg0r6_TDiyJ08bYhRrWyg1MzYjKVysa-RAhvHMxqx3c).

* **Bid Applications Are Now Open:** Bid applications for both the Winter 2025 Meeting and Spring 2026 Meeting are now open. subject: This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
I’ve made it my mission to fight for public education, good jobs, affordable health care, retirement security, and safe, welcoming neighborhoods.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815736/565026808/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEyYmUxZi05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpUpuLJtwovWVp8yty5L_ri4DHF4eznqEbKrGi3j_Sg=)
---
| | | _Below is a longer email from Linda. We hope you’ll take the time to read until the end, but if you don’t have the time you can[ _**contribute here:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815737/565026809/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEyYmUxZi05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpUpuLJtwovWVp8yty5L_ri4DHF4eznqEbKrGi3j_Sg=)_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815738/565026810/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEyYmUxZi05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpUpuLJtwovWVp8yty5L_ri4DHF4eznqEbKrGi3j_Sg=)
---
I was born in Southern California, the sixth of seven children raised by Mexican immigrant parents who worked hard, believed in education, and gave everything to give their kids a better future.

My dad was an industrial mechanic. My mom became an elementary school teacher, but not before going back to school herself to earn her college degree. They didn’t have much, but they made sure that all seven of their children went on to become college graduates.

I learned early what it meant to work hard, stay grounded, and serve your community.

After earning my law degree, I started my career practicing civil rights and employment law. I fought for workers as a labor lawyer with IBEW Local 441 and NECA, then went on to lead the Orange County Central Labor Council, AFL-CIO.

I’ve always believed in fairness, opportunity, and standing up for people who deserve better.

That’s why I ran for Congress in 2001. When I won, my sister Loretta and I became the first pair of sisters in American history to serve together in Congress.

And I’ve been “kicking ass for the working class” ever since.

I’m proud to represent California’s 38th Congressional District — a vibrant, diverse region of hardworking families across communities like Norwalk, Whittier, La Mirada, Diamond Bar, Pico Rivera, and more. I’ve made it my mission to fight for public education, good jobs, affordable health care, retirement security, and safe, welcoming neighborhoods.

In Congress, I’ve taken on everything from tax fairness to trade policy to ethics reform. I dedicate my work to helping shape policies that affect working families.

I’m also proud to serve as Chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus. It’s the first time a woman has held this role, and I take it seriously. Together, we’re working to elect more progressive Latino leaders across the country — because representation matters.

We have a lot of work to do.

Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are determined to keep control of the House so they can rip away health care, slash taxes for the ultra-wealthy, and undermine our democracy one law at a time.

I’m not going to let that happen.

[_**But I can’t do it alone. I hope you’ll consider making a contribution today to join me in this fight:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815739/565026811/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEyYmUxZi05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpUpuLJtwovWVp8yty5L_ri4DHF4eznqEbKrGi3j_Sg=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815740/565026812/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjEyYmUxZi05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpUpuLJtwovWVp8yty5L_ri4DHF4eznqEbKrGi3j_Sg=)
---
I know this was a long email and I really appreciate you reading until the end. I hope it gives you a little more insight into my background and why I am in the fight for justice.

Thank you for being a part of this campaign,

Linda

---
Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. If you do not wish to receive emails about her campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Q0eCU6m3OkqbxvA1ohNreQ2?unsubscribedata=IN4nmprtmlKi7z2OAXdmAvfDcRDcY5WrYh2KVTBxtMvJ72ROfrfCcXUTlUZjQ%2BliyPe3Ui0y9Qa1UQgq%2BZOnUlRdrHRfalQ32gAJqqFE0rwMn%2FnqfffyIKnlXZiH9zmZU1h2a2F23oeNtcST5VgTb8F5WjETg0oNUPzH9RyLmfBjlcrQ%2Bcqo7btbCGsx7CSQimUqk1QsfGXg6Kvb025NPXM3%2FWsugeA7cU4Vw8lYTSFRb28G67xx6Ug1FW4ayw7P%2Blq0kuh5wKBBds2ku7dVq%2BKdmL63D92kzschcmxtzj0MZePWFQF97Em7uFD%2FsrLJfUinSxybFaNEPOfJEAeWoVjXJVao8GH804leay3RuGvgBpD4tBJ0HNpD6FKrC6F8%2FqSpBCvou2XYFrzt766Bpz5FCMT0SvaysA9BASZ9Q00%3D)
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: The overwhelming pushback on what Texas is doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can’t keep fighting with one hand tied behind our backs.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113815747/565026821/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTVhYzJjLTkyN2YtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WYcRXDCrbFUnATwcTZgTiLehh2pjfr8G2wfEadF0mw=&emci=97588be1-667f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=65a5ac2c-927f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw A.G. Holder’s letter about Donald Trump’s gerrymandering scheme — and how Democrats must respond. We need to recognize that we’re no longer in a moment when both sides are playing by the rules. That’s why the NDRC believes that California’s new ballot initiative is a responsible, responsive action to Texas’s power grab, aimed at putting power back in the hands of the people. **Thanks to our efforts, the American people are waking up to the very real threat that Trump’s anti-democracy attacks represent.** **[From the overwhelming pushback we’re seeing from Texas to Indiana to the thousands of Americans who protested this weekend — it’s clear this is a five-alarm fire for democracy, and the NDRC must fight back. But we can’t do it alone — in this watershed moment for free and fair elections, will you make a donation to the NDRC?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113815748/565026822/-279538265?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderRRTopperNote_email_20250822-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRRTopperNote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250822-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRRTopperNote_&utm_campaign=AGHolderRRTopperNote&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTVhYzJjLTkyN2YtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WYcRXDCrbFUnATwcTZgTiLehh2pjfr8G2wfEadF0mw=)** I encourage you to read A.G. Holder’s thoughts below — and I’m so grateful to have you alongside us in this fight. — Biz \-------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Date: Mon, Aug 11, 2025
From: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
Subject: Extraordinary steps must be taken Peter, From the day President Obama and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee eight years ago, our north star has been fairness in the redistricting process. We oppose the use of partisan and racial gerrymanders — by all political parties — designed to disenfranchise people. I’m still deeply committed to that ideal. **But let me be clear: That enduring commitment to fairness does not blind us to reality.** Right now, Republican leaders, led by the president, are attempting to gerrymander their way to unchecked power. Let’s call this what it is: We are witnessing an authoritarian attempt to thwart the will of the people. We cannot stand by in the face of an overt threat to democracy. Extraordinary steps must be taken to meet this moment. **We must preserve our democracy today in order to ultimately heal it.** For that reason, we are evolving our approach. The NDRC will not oppose — on a temporary basis — responsible, responsive actions to ensure that the foundations of our democracy are not permanently eroded. And once this moment has passed, we must pass reforms at the federal and state levels to outlaw the very actions that have led to this crisis. The people who are willing to undermine the core precepts of democracy for partisan gain must never again be allowed to threaten what makes America exceptional. We are not abandoning the fight for fairness — far from it. Fairness is a weapon that exists to protect the people’s power. And we shouldn’t be afraid to use it. In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113815749/565026823/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderRRTopperNote_email_20250822-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRRTopperNote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250822-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRRTopperNote_&utm_campaign=AGHolderRRTopperNote&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTVhYzJjLTkyN2YtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WYcRXDCrbFUnATwcTZgTiLehh2pjfr8G2wfEadF0mw=)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: The stakes are too high not to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
What Texas Republicans are doing is dangerous and undermines our democracy.
We can't fight back if one arm is tied behind our backs.
| | |
---
Friend, I firmly believe that voters should choose their representatives – not the other way around.
That's why I introduced the very **_first_** bill in the Senate to ban partisan gerrymandering and ensure our democracy works for all Americans. _Unfortunately, Republicans have other plans._
Donald Trump and his GOP colleagues are willing to do anything to keep their majorities in 2026 – even if it means disenfranchising voters.
So President Trump ordered the Texas GOP to rig the game by redrawing the state's congressional maps – and gerrymandering Texas's five Democratic House seats out of existence. They obeyed.
Let me be clear: **What Texas Republicans are doing is dangerous and undermines our democracy. **
As Trump takes a wrecking ball to our democratic institutions, our courts, and our fundamental checks and balances to cling to power, we can't fight back with one arm tied behind our backs.
So, as wrong as partisan gerrymandering is, what states like California are doing is necessary to confront this fight head-on. The stakes are too high not to act.
**Governors are on the frontlines of the fight against Donald Trump, and as Colorado's next governor, I will stand up to him every day to put Colorado first. **
**_[Please chip in $5, or anything you can today, to help me win this race – not just to elect a Democratic Governor in Colorado but to keep its destiny in the hands of the people, not politicians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113815805/565026935/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk892-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmEzYTg0Ni05MzdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRQuQ9bzv1bDJXh5tbXyo6YXJMlENyH3pvMrONU4_wE=)_**

body:

## Paralyzed Teen Breaks Barrier in Scottish Racing
Seventeen-year-old Ally Chalmers of Glasgow has become Scotland's first race car driver who uses a wheelchair, just three years after a ski crash left him paralyzed. [Watch a video of Chalmers driving](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMy18oGJAsIlZb7ohhfBQdhC64HVbPV8_1TOfMNkNbp1Tdf7d9M2EGNL-15yo_O41-awTXjUiERbtjPtZFR8FP8yZT0xUTdLAYOyY7AC0MyG-tGid8oiAvEU1zOMoFw7j0B5qmQRyv1kYZ7FxxrdJmE3aUVg2cAlTG9SbxiQAMDbD0i92GGBhwiOX0nrTCIYuUC79_xwSHejjKz-x9DafbVQH0b02_E8DawPrdV39mSmXLVT7CPQ-NbDeTTHx9YmuqzYThXp0hJhqV4wNae8cbg9qYG2LcvcrxBjqNDeC7acJ8VtEvy70VPAVAAD__x_Kfck). Driving a hand-controlled Mini Cooper S, he [made his debut at Knockhill in Fife](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u8yAUQJ8Gb7bgYjv2wPAt3vKtHRGBS3wbfiwgsfL2VdtH6Hamc6TzcdVXQ4HS_b-JqPzd6-azTnjWgK1h0c64X6r4LPgwMUdMrZqkgcPU86UH0M5QeOuxc8ojAsoOlbhM07JKmES3KyFHvFkxrbO0883xSU4oPNp5dqsU49KR-rbxBQA4v8A6rFYIWPnoUS6L9YaNHB21XIbPTKnt6MM7v7AMNscuqL21ozL5j8HGYDvPc6ix2MHm4flgsNndxINyqjsdlcFWbW6N6t5HStTbnA8svX0eDLauKHecFALV-cJGfo-Gwk-l_XnPS8FXAAAA__9utXwk) and earned runner-up Driver of the Day. The car, rebuilt with help from engineers across the U.K., uses a ring on the steering wheel for acceleration, buttons for shifting, and a lever for braking. He says the adrenaline gives him the same rush he once got from ski racing, and he hopes to join Team Brit, an all-disabled team aiming for Le Mans.
## Dad Letters Go Global From Ohio
An Ohio father who spent decades [writing daily letters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFqxCAYhJ_G3Azm1yR68FAouW0vpfQoJv4mtkYXYzfs25dt-wa9DQwM833vF3OxIYa0vtgdtV-9qT6bhOcRsVYsxln3mw78Kvhp97xjqodNBhj0lEkKYJwN8W5E47RHBOQN6m7se6k49F2zaan84JWSkotRdbPgzMMwj8ug5r73ApugH2tMAgBjI6hWLV0HigmPXMrFWyIYulBzaT9ySHVDH-_5hqVd8t5EvdV6PQh_IjARmOy8PAjaNT9qAtPbK4EpbyHTM-820bXgSQsuGG4hrXSzyZ0l1IqJ_sFSb-uGhaZ8EpiOmsud8Ck4wp87EP0o1DA2RbvrGWIMxzASwdbdhvhzqP7b5E3DdwAAAP__m1CJwQ) to his daughter is now sending fatherly advice, dad jokes, and heartfelt notes to more than 1,200 strangers worldwide. Buz Ecker, 67, launched the Dad Letter Project this summer from his cabin in Michigan. What started as a post-retirement pick-me-up has grown into a full-fledged operation, with help from three other dad staff writers. [Each letter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb8GukFmgDUuKNLQvbQp0eAZL35r8MpMFr2_j_Ylf5DuXF3pSuf--lg-KKZ43H_SLlO4h0VDXg65ziSqUhYm_kun_C7yoD3vcuhJx4IGBzAjIC5MMX0tfc1TEEHpaplaOwyj63Bo620KphXCzq7sxLEd7IqE7oarHcl5xDpO7zUzIqIxFl3jfNuiM32Qbhx9oKo3wlFzaT5zPHSTkL7yS0rj816naVN9nlX3o8K5wvm6ruZBD3mXFc5vmwrnlF8CTAx5i_kbkhCf8Cz5U7yCZmBJ8SUF_hlDKHmHQLq9g2bQLZ8C8YBDhCucqWj0SRYZDJJjBr86D33wDI65BVmF-l5udnC22XRPdZn4ecWU4nmzVW_uO8X07aD_ff5rwj8BAAD__5DknCA) is handwritten, personally addressed, and mailed the old-fashioned way—stamp and all—paid for by the dads themselves.
## Scientists Catch Brainstorm Before It Strikes
Researchers at the University of California, Merced, may have cracked the code on those [sudden, brilliant “aha!” moments](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7HwMwQYGLp4S9eOiMDDpgUTAU3kv6_SqF_Q7U5H95yPi7nYmOK-vtuMOqzB9FDMjo-WsHesxlv_Wg2_K37ZXDLuvdndAAV-ovIEYLyN6TBs8DogAs4D6klwLtUMfBo2fZ3OkxCSnYVSVM1X6rlzCpwLM6PC8iHqJ41KAKBUgBqVmyZQlAWcpXTBEkbRx17q-Fni3jcM6Sh3rKMreUh66_3WyPxGYCGw3LajjaWuBJanCYHl7-vLYdx6TkPV_vaIKcV2FoTRNduYfnH93x3uGn4CAAD__4k4cdA), showing they don’t come out of nowhere after all. By filming mathematicians at work and analyzing over 4,600 moments of scribbling, pointing, and pacing, the team uncovered a clear shift: familiar thinking patterns broke down, and [unpredictability ramped up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3ojws7HxwNAlW7p2RAQezmsxRPCaKH9fpVG_oNsZru7VuR8ne3KUKG_vbkcTt2g5Fpvx3hIyY7XBhRc1_K745fayY-bmsgUJSkgtAGxwlB526oOJiIBjj2ZYlNLrCGroLyauWukZz8ovelnjrPyCsx7Pk_fneXahJ_NskxoApFxgPax-GGCVU8RRax9dN0kMxKUePgtlvmBMj3LDevBl75O5MF9bN751cOzgSJmxYmPKG-aNMmKlvD2jHRybJ8we_4ipcRPeZZHLXQRk9CxequLl2lcTrndKidq8dJPcdkfpd5f_fdjNwE8AAAD__5-KhH8). Using tools from physics, ecology, and information theory, the team found these creative sparks could be measured minutes before they happened. It’s the first real evidence that insight leaves a trail—and a peek into how the mind gears up for genius.

clean_body: An Ohio father who spent decades to his daughter is now sending fatherly advice, dad jokes, and heartfelt notes to more than 1,200 strangers worldwide. | | | | | | Friday, August 22, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Our top story this week features a Scottish race car driver who competes despite being paralyzed. Amy Hess, host of , sat down with him for an interview featured in today's episode. Make sure to catch it on . Learn about these 11 weird little hacks Costco shoppers should know from today's sponsor, . | Paralyzed Teen Breaks Barrier in Scottish Racing Seventeen-year-old Ally Chalmers of Glasgow has become Scotland's first race car driver who uses a wheelchair, just three years after a ski crash left him paralyzed. . Driving a hand-controlled Mini Cooper S, he and earned runner-up Driver of the Day. The car, rebuilt with help from engineers across the U.K., uses a ring on the steering wheel for acceleration, buttons for shifting, and a lever for braking. He says the adrenaline gives him the same rush he once got from ski racing, and he hopes to join Team Brit, an all-disabled team aiming for Le Mans. Dad Letters Go Global From Ohio An Ohio father who spent decades to his daughter is now sending fatherly advice, dad jokes, and heartfelt notes to more than 1,200 strangers worldwide. Buz Ecker, 67, launched the Dad Letter Project this summer from his cabin in Michigan. What started as a post-retirement pick-me-up has grown into a full-fledged operation, with help from three other dad staff writers. is handwritten, personally addressed, and mailed the old-fashioned way—stamp and all—paid for by the dads themselves. Scientists Catch Brainstorm Before It Strikes Researchers at the University of California, Merced, may have cracked the code on those , showing they don’t come out of nowhere after all. By filming mathematicians at work and analyzing over 4,600 moments of scribbling, pointing, and pacing, the team uncovered a clear shift: familiar thinking patterns broke down, and . Using tools from physics, ecology, and information theory, the team found these creative sparks could be measured minutes before they happened. It’s the first real evidence that insight leaves a trail—and a peek into how the mind gears up for genius. | Flying together with our sponsor Do you shop at Costco? Check out these additional ways to save money while shopping from today's sponsor, If you spot an asterisk on a price tag, grab it—those items won’t be restocked. Skip the coupon clipping: the Costco Savings Booklet automatically applies discounts at checkout. And learn the secret of price endings — .79, .49, or .89 often mean manufacturer deals, while .88 or .00 could be manager markdowns or clearance items. Shop smarter, save more— | ➤The first woman to skateboard across the U.S. completed a 3,266-mile trip from California to Virginia Beach in 119 days, raising $50,000 for spinal cord injury research. The journey honored her late stepfather, whose memory fueled the record-setting ride. () ➤ A fast food worker in Roseville, Minnesota, who walked over four miles daily between jobs at Chipotle and Dairy Queen, was gifted a used car by a Bible study friend. () ➤ A 6-week-old pygmy hippo at a Kansas wildlife park refused to leave the pool until his mom gave him a stern look. The moment struck a chord with parents everywhere, who recognized the universal power of the “mom stare.” () ➤ A 92-year-old former Royal Canadian Air Force pilot took to the skies in Alberta, flying the same Harvard aircraft he trained on nearly 70 years ago. () ➤ A runt goat rejected at birth is now thriving at a U.K. farm after being adopted by two border collies who groomed, snuggled, and even taught her how to herd like one of their own. () ➤ Here are 24 hilariously timed dog photobombs capturing pups crashing everything from engagements to selfies, proving once again they’re the real stars of the show. Hey Peter, it’s Jon. body:
| | |
**Local Democracy Project and School Board Integrity Project understand that****saving democracy starts in our public schools.
****
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt0jFmuCbeWM4PuZjX7ec3Xw6tTv0d8C7gEpFrceroJ6lnOt6qstsob1tCnVWl5wIpBEaiAhT6FgdDPxyZmXwTvvf6z22OgPwBmTKZr5jb9R6328fIqE_SoAJx0xJh5DGNN0F8c6-MIrIn4oY649lOVa9YvRMmBDVC3jnkjVuGgXZ21zQR7SOSfo_WXuGIh_AAg3bnQXb6nuoiMmBrcKatgr900vEkwbraEXu2pUMa9__5WcVThXnETTerSorw8twfSzwJMN_dNnyQ7C4jQ-WzHD5TG0UPy_mo-OynSrXPcBbZZwgFsOrxadi2gkqsjjXEM/4j9/FHMLPfjRSeCj-bkYXnz_kA/h0/h001.k9Y1wroFYQZajBIOmfpcjeHSVj5OgXNf5jiADhYWFbE)**
[**Will you split a donation to help us support candidates who will defend public education and rebuild our democracy?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt1Aw9AfazvQHwtigjMHi6c3RdGkXirqfa0CiBp-8geDVRnaa5sRk19fDhcg21tyj4mZrX6vCHQUNmzOkgGoDI4v-kTOmL31tb6tdCAoQs8ucnUBiWYLJYo1U_Ipt10IXgJTUoygjsiTzCvVyax7ql2wKGjy4_fWemP7oEcDM6jhrAWzZeMDAkU-cGLf9BHwfIGlONAN8EK6D2MwpTKLnRnmhsQoG4vlJDJB7Moik3XOkwSpYp3UjVOq2JarBDmvkUWvXL_NBgrLqQPKcXbfVLDDo2Eu4DyPvJ69LCJZzO7fYOBJGO-7kWbrD1dj0zLzQyQ/4j9/FHMLPfjRSeCj-bkYXnz_kA/h1/h001.guSN5iNyhR7ug1FjTX5IEVXwIRwHNJoMuI3_LRgjsAE)
* * *
Trump and Republicans’ so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” doesn’t just slash Medicaid and shower tax breaks on the wealthy—it unleashes one of the most devastating attacks on public education in a generation. Billions for teacher training, after-school programs, and support for English learners? Gone. Medicaid reimbursements schools use for nurses, mental health counselors, and special education? Gutted. Even free school meals are harder to access. And now, with the Supreme Court greenlighting the dismantling of the Department of Education, our public schools face an unprecedented assault. **It’s time to fight back! clean_body: | | | Local Democracy Project and School Board Integrity Project understand thatsaving democracy starts in our public schools. Trump and Republicans’ so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” doesn’t just slash Medicaid and shower tax breaks on the wealthy—it unleashes one of the most devastating attacks on public education in a generation. Billions for teacher training, after-school programs, and support for English learners? Gone. Medicaid reimbursements schools use for nurses, mental health counselors, and special education? Gutted. Even free school meals are harder to access. And now, with the Supreme Court greenlighting the dismantling of the Department of Education, our public schools face an unprecedented assault. It’s time to fight back! By investing in school board races, we can protect the foundation of our democracy. Meanwhile, extremists are targeting local school boards—banning books, censoring history, and singling out vulnerable students. Here’s the kicker: only 5–10 percent of voters show up for these races. That’s how fringe candidates win—not because they speak for us, but because too many of us sit them out. We can change that—now. School board elections are where we can defend our kids, our classrooms, and our democracy.** Let’s take back our schools—for every child, in every community—and protect our democracy together. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. We need the resources to mobilize, organize, and show up in force on the Capitol steps to shout: NO. NEW. TAXES. But standing up to Kotek’s tax-hike machine isn’t free. It takes ads, outreach, and organizing – but most of all it takes YOU stepping up when it matters. That’s why we’re asking you personally: | | | | | | | We have one week to prove we can fight back – and win. Oregon Republican Party. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. From state and local governments to the federal level, we are fighting for a better Oregon – defending parental rights, reducing taxes, ensuring safe communities, and standing against government overreach. Join us in our mission to uphold the principles that make our state and nation strong. >>> | | | | | | | | | | | Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | | | | | | The fight for Oregon is far from over and 2025 is our chance to stop the damage and turn things around.Democrats are pushing a disastrous agenda of bigger government, fewer freedoms, and zero accountability. If you’re fed up with their policies draining your paycheck and destroying our state, now’s the time to stand up. | | | | | | | Shop our store for other Oregon GOP merchandise to show your support and spread our winning message! | | | | | Sign up to volunteer with the Oregon Republican Party and be a vital part of our fight for a better Oregon! Your time and talents are just as valuable as a donation – whether it’s knocking on doors, making phone calls, or helping at events, every effort makes a difference. | | | | | Join us in defending Oregon’s families, freedoms, and values. Your support fuels our fight - donate now to make a difference!** | | | | | ⬇ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ⬇Oregon Republican PartyPO Box 1586Lake Oswego, OR 97035 By participating, you agree to the terms & for recurring autodialed campaign & donation messages from the Oregon Republican Party to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | | | |

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Washington is WEAK on crime; Send me to help President Trump fix it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
In Congress, I will "Back The Blue" and President Trump! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f3dc9129ba8a/welcome-to-team-flippo-10339766?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=9afbe82af4&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Friend,

In the Air Force, toughness was not optional; it was mandatory. Today, Washington is proving just how soft it has become on crime, among other things.

I am Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.), a 26-year combat veteran, and I am running for Congress because Nevada families deserve a leader who is Nevada tough: tough on crime, tough on borders, and tough enough to stand up for our police.

But I need you in my corner today to help me fight back.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=85d007c82a&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [CLICK HERE TO STAND TOUGH WITH DAVID](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=06134ad7a9&e=273c9a71fb "CLICK HERE TO STAND TOUGH WITH DAVID")
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f91d5b2983&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE NOW")
---
| The radical Left has unleashed chaos in our streets and abandoned law enforcement: 🚫 They defund the police while crime surges. 🚫 They tie the hands of officers and let criminals walk free. 🚫 They vilify the very heroes who risk their lives for us.

That is not leadership; it is weakness. We have had enough of weak politicians in Washington.
---
| [BE NEVADA TOUGH & SUPPORT OUR POLICE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ed7f81f273&e=273c9a71fb "BE NEVADA TOUGH & SUPPORT OUR POLICE")

**➤➤ BREAKING: Election workers just lost critical protection from cyberattacks** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817083/565030400/55160957?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI5ODhjNy05NjdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLbbb66ew-rCDMdVDiY6g4lS4Jg7jYEDAiOwBOuHe5w=)**
* * *
Friend. This is exactly what election officials feared. Donald Trump’s administration just slashed vital CISA support for state and local election offices – cutting off cyber threat intelligence, emergency response help, and trusted guidance that workers depend on. And the effects are already being felt: election workers are overwhelmed, getting doxxed online, and threatened routinely with violence. Software patches are falling behind, and misinformation campaigns are spreading faster than officials can respond. **This is an emergency. If we don’t act now, the next election could be the most vulnerable in modern history.** Trump’s allies knew exactly what they were doing when they dismantled these programs. They’ve repeatedly tried to shut down EI-ISAC, block grant funding, and sideline the very agencies tasked with keeping our elections safe. They want chaos. They want fear. And most of all — they want control. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are more important than ever. They’re stepping up to fill the vacuum and protect our elections from attacks both foreign and domestic. But they can’t do it alone. [**Will you rush a $3 donation to help us fight back and defend election workers on the frontlines?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817084/565030401/1071238056?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI5ODhjNy05NjdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLbbb66ew-rCDMdVDiY6g4lS4Jg7jYEDAiOwBOuHe5w=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817085/565030402/1071238056?refcode=em-8.22.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI5ODhjNy05NjdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLbbb66ew-rCDMdVDiY6g4lS4Jg7jYEDAiOwBOuHe5w=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Election workers just lost critical protection from cyberattacks = Friend. This is exactly what election officials feared. Donald Trump’s administration just slashed vital CISA support for state and local election offices – cutting off cyber threat intelligence, emergency response help, and trusted guidance that workers depend on. And the effects are already being felt: election workers are overwhelmed, getting doxxed online, and threatened routinely with violence. Software patches are falling behind, and misinformation campaigns are spreading faster than officials can respond. This is an emergency. If we don’t act now, the next election could be the most vulnerable in modern history. Trump’s allies knew exactly what they were doing when they dismantled these programs. They’ve repeatedly tried to shut down EI-ISAC, block grant funding, and sideline the very agencies tasked with keeping our elections safe. They want chaos. They want fear. And most of all — they want control. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are more important than ever. They’re stepping up to fill the vacuum and protect our elections from attacks both foreign and domestic. But they can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you. [**But first, I need your help to get this campaign off the ground. My ask today is that you'll consider chipping in to help us build early momentum.**](http://links.russellcleveland.org/s/c/Pj_Voi8ggN9yvFvlnowohcmA_YLK1eiYU73bNC3YyXPIyy44cBBYsDBS-uvRs4yjrPPHcoWwbtMR1xihvgSa-qCnA3yeDXrFU6u7ptgDFp_vRlygl6CyRMav5uP_qh2ODSWGSsQKxs83R8CW7jQuSIIJOI6Wj1aBIrzLaG4WCF48Di2hXO7lgFSxkF9oMypW2ewr1eFy9WcTyEx9wvj4gXam4Wo3xIMB29KmwXQFfhYq4XPuJg10_D1TjtnRnIbbAoC1s5YJV12xIM9t0izwCCODAVn4pyTmTJPW9mDbv3T-W-6xZcyTiMYCJrVBAEk-aaxMe14Jyh9dMiT0CavGDApr9pfGTlwnv_CKDEup39AuPcUR7-86QC5NU4MtqkLyht9iSCxX2A9mjPWngfllwr9esrkELgSoYW4TzDVSeScdTDYQyQVS4bWYYJgEmskiZlKZsZwp0DxuisZp0Rw6aroMQA7pCaDZQkFT8TC1sPxj66vSDzkOgwUfzaPw3wXQhvy7X7FTqO_xQgacaV1dSdlIOnAsca4_ZDBr-LJAfGurZoZPCZt4nqd3vFwOWRhKCzJ_Sz-Q4gp6Inm--pcZ8gRM-zhTYK1Lf300I1GYyJDAUfmn5Dyfrk-JK7i8diD_Rkp5gGMvS7iAxnLkaG9AorkJOE0gTtpojfr2BoXQL4gbITiPM5u8H-Vxiwfkx5-itYjTaHxQ3pvADHrc-y_S5Fm4T041z1mLQa7rnzKIXGYFsOirsfYBGpSiHilMV7Q3m0e3bX5x-pvfXHMuZnQmhPi-UKqO3bIUJIutvqxe-kam6DC20_p2Fpm61dt3IYlJ62Bi4z8p0cqkuXUs859PketcRZ7z9r9Hft4zjHSH9l4danO5-DsmnOStfKoHc5XW0ckRkBt9uh6lODiHlw1TZJpKzIaSPGrHT5-n1v2fq6kvAaxE/U36Ft8WOzVjgFLcwQzAFwn5WzI9ULQua/12) Though military service has taken my family and me out of state many times throughout life, Montana has always been home. When I was five, my parents moved us back to the Bitterroot Valley to raise our family on a small farm. Those mountains, that land, and our tight-knit community helped shape who I am. Like many Montanans, I’ve worn a lot of hats. I’ve worked with my hands, built businesses from the ground up, and weathered hard years and good ones. As a small business owner, I’ve experienced firsthand what it takes to create opportunity, to meet payroll, and to keep going when things get tough. That experience, paired with my Montana roots, gives me a deep understanding of what families and entrepreneurs are up against today. My wife and I wanted to raise our family with the same values and connection to the land that shaped me growing up. We believe in this place, and we believe in its future. [](http://links.russellcleveland.org/s/c/3RweRTZK9r5Sh426P7EFEeD_OaBrFiFtPOjQhiAaGSfYBwlGRuQJUCo_rnDehYs6GCiS-i4ZTmP_Kay4jrFwgBp1ibserXX4hARF2Yep1G-ACcBChy9Q4rOdifbVM7Ps1sHPtXfcIsb-lQkXjNVbrMmAQswJdc1dRrl3CUBD_asWBE2wSvAX0Wl9eE-Dr-Qh2vrANVywt47EKd4VyIfV1NNp86pudtcz9jRYdWndaUbGN-MiBgOrAUQGI0SDPd4aFAq8W94re8w0U2mkHfeRKEf-3BAfMyO9IakBnhrr-xlthRLHKw2GX9UKvq8yndnmPDX3kZHbC6utLUw4FmFRqdNaMpnb09m38kT3GQe-H6k1hL1OpkI367Xrb09RUbpZBsf6LwDXdncKJQllmzOroHiRrtQ-Zq1pG7pTc_ojszrGzvXrebSh1hjyiYM0Spedng-Su_V-hXuBa8Z92DCZNDZwrKYB20MvLTe_7gvDymD1L8YDPDJw18goqsum4RPYt1b10aBMKxQy2CWjFjsp-Rn3xsnJS85vs_qFyqV-_CtjixTtrGl4UmuIMsH3bg5Xdtmv5WbynukJdmCCAWJrmEBcLmdPHvgfEp1HY5hqehP5aUTDlQE0HoQf5AOwqWV3PthBhsd3r8V0SaNyKOi4ZApEYZQKGojnruLN4Eg4Dv7ZRCp4EcQeTLPFiRGaXxXYGbBconBiQ4DgBrVAuCWyRq1qIQ3fv8M4VTabnknTdBBNA7njTvR1hobvdVwJQWDvvllyWuZ7XzdLsvL_50tfkTSNPoQWvI8s6op4YxlQMd4ER7K9c9FExeYt1RThdfPTlMmCtY7APhU4A8JKnLqMyJwQ6wdhJpbc6Z2PCsyLojGDr3D5AUCYzXfEu3YHAea1OFZ_kgqmXfblorWTgLpBdSxSPFVj9YeHliXEhhQvywcBvIb6/uq62QxRW7P9oclOs-ew8tB3JEVy6l00u/12) I’m running for Congress because I know Montana deserves better. Russell Cleveland is a Montanan, Navy veteran, and proud product of the Bitterroot Valley. He’s running for Congress to bring common sense back to Washington and put Montana families ahead of partisan politics. Russell believes in service, integrity, and protecting the Montana way of life for future generations.
