clean_body: I’m running for Congress, and I’m reaching out to tell you a few reasons why. | | | Friend, I have committed to the battle ahead of running for Congress — and I want to share a few reasons why. Though military service has taken my family and me out of state many times throughout life, Montana has always been home. When I was five, my parents moved us back to the Bitterroot Valley to raise our family on a small farm. Those mountains, that land, and our tight-knit community helped shape who I am. Like many Montanans, I’ve worn a lot of hats. I’ve worked with my hands, built businesses from the ground up, and weathered hard years and good ones. As a small business owner, I’ve experienced firsthand what it takes to create opportunity, to meet payroll, and to keep going when things get tough. That experience, paired with my Montana roots, gives me a deep understanding of what families and entrepreneurs are up against today. My wife and I wanted to raise our family with the same values and connection to the land that shaped me growing up. We believe in this place, and we believe in its future. I’m running for Congress because I know Montana deserves better. We deserve a representative who listens more than they talk, who brings people together instead of driving them apart, and who never forgets where they came from. The political extremism we see today is not who we are—not as Montanans, and not as Americans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ****** | ---|--- **** | **** **** | **** This campaign isn’t about power—it’s about purpose. It’s about making sure working families, veterans, farmers, and small-town communities like mine aren’t left behind. I’m ready to serve. I hope you’ll join me. With Gratitude, Russell Cleveland Candidate for Congress, MT-01 Russell Cleveland is a Montanan, Navy veteran, and proud product of the Bitterroot Valley. He’s running for Congress to bring common sense back to Washington and put Montana families ahead of partisan politics. Russell believes in service, integrity, and protecting the Montana way of life for future generations. ****** Follow Russell Online: ** Paid for by Cleveland for Congress

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Healthcare is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250822-781&t=1001&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250822-781&t=1002&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

In the richest, most powerful country in the world, no one should have to
choose between getting the healthcare they need and putting food on the
table.

Yet far too many
Americans are
drowning in medical debt, skipping prescriptions we can’t afford, or
avoiding the doctor because of the cost.

This current system is nothing short of absurd.

That’s why we’re fighting for Medicare for All, to guarantee healthcare
for every American.

And tomorrow night, Abdul will be joining Bernie Sanders at a Fighting
Oligarchy rally in Kalamazoo. Together, we want to show the power of this
movement.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/em-m4a-petition?source=em20250822-781&refcode=em20250822-781&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix ]Before they take the stage, will you add your name in support of
Medicare for All?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/em-m4a-petition?source=em20250822-781&refcode=em20250822-781&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix ]Sign the Petition ››

Thank you. With your help, we’ll send Washington a clear message: People
come before profits, and every American deserves the security of
healthcare.

— Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=795%2E251025%2E9GXuix

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

And they certainly don’t care about justice in Pennsylvania.

But right now, dark money organizations linked to these right-wing billionaires are pouring their fortunes into flipping our state Supreme Court. Why? Because they know the court is the backstop for protecting abortion rights, stopping gerrymandering, and keeping elections free and fair.

**[Rush a donation now to help us defend our courts against these billionaire buyouts!!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817492/565031474/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250822_FR_SupremeCourt_0_3MO_PaDems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGUzZDE3Mi05ODdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fg-XLwCJXclfmU6bj6YsdISIBN9JAFzdLUJXyfIwjKw=)**

They don’t want fair courts, they want loyal courts. Courts that answer to MAGA extremists instead of to the Constitution. Courts that do their bidding while working families in Pennsylvania pay the price.

**_If they win, it won’t just be about this year._** They’re playing the long game: lock down the court now, and control the redistricting process in 2030. That’s how they plan to rig our democracy for another decade.

**[Chip in now to help us fight back. Because our courts are not for sale.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817495/565031477/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250822_FR_SupremeCourt_0_3MO_PaDems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGUzZDE3Mi05ODdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fg-XLwCJXclfmU6bj6YsdISIBN9JAFzdLUJXyfIwjKw=)** | [DEFEND OUR COURTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113817498/565031480/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250822_FR_SupremeCourt_0_3MO_PaDems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGUzZDE3Mi05ODdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fg-XLwCJXclfmU6bj6YsdISIBN9JAFzdLUJXyfIwjKw=)

We can’t match billionaires dollar-for-dollar. But we can out-organize them, outwork them, and outvote them. That starts with building the grassroots firepower to keep Pennsylvania’s courts in the hands of people who actually believe in justice.

— Pennsylvania Democratic Party

clean_body: | | = Peter — Leonard Leo and Jeffrey Yass don’t live in your community. They don’t know your family. And they certainly don’t care about justice in Pennsylvania. But right now, dark money organizations linked to these right-wing billionaires are pouring their fortunes into flipping our state Supreme Court. Why? Because they know the court is the backstop for protecting abortion rights, stopping gerrymandering, and keeping elections free and fair. = They don’t want fair courts, they want loyal courts. Courts that answer to MAGA extremists instead of to the Constitution. Courts that do their bidding while working families in Pennsylvania pay the price. If they win, it won’t just be about this year. They’re playing the long game: lock down the court now, and control the redistricting process in 2030. That’s how they plan to rig our democracy for another decade. = | = We can’t match billionaires dollar-for-dollar. But we can out-organize them, outwork them, and outvote them. That starts with building the grassroots firepower to keep Pennsylvania’s courts in the hands of people who actually believe in justice. — Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , and **! name: Haley Stevens
subject: This is why I love Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
in 60 seconds, you can help our campaign a lot

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4900?t=2&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley Stevens – and I want your input.
**
[Will you take 60 seconds to complete my official campaign priorities survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4901?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)**

**But before you respond, I want to tell you why I love Michigan – and why I’m running for U.S. Senate.**
**FIRST** , I was born and raised right here in Michigan. My parents ran a landscaping business, so I grew up surrounded by grit, grease, and hard work. That upbringing shaped me – it truly taught me the value of hard work – and it’s why I’ve made it my life’s calling to fight for Michigan’s working families.
**THEN** , I served as chief of staff on President Obama’s Auto Rescue Task Force during the Great Recession – helping save more than 200,000 Michigan jobs. And in 2018, I flipped a red House seat blue and helped Democrats take back the majority in a crucial midterm year.
**NOW** , I’m running for Senate, and the stakes couldn’t be higher: Michigan’s open seat will determine who controls the Senate, and multiple polls show I’m the only Democrat consistently beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers. But this race is still considered a pure Toss Up, and we need grassroots momentum to win.
**[null, I need your input to help guide our winning strategy. We still need 72 responses from 18326 – will you take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4901?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4901?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

With grit and gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4902?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4900?t=7&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=634%2E49239%2ET_Fn01)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Give me a [expletive] break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113818468/565034347/1866411932?refcode=250822_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWYyMjQ2Ny05YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd4iP9x24gPsPynnM4K-5Ce4gO1in_b1xPXYCWHwKps=)
---
Friends, In case you missed it, ICE had the audacity to put words in my mouth, and I’m not letting it slide. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113818471/565034352/2005830277?refcode=250822_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWYyMjQ2Ny05YTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd4iP9x24gPsPynnM4K-5Ce4gO1in_b1xPXYCWHwKps=) When I heard that an ICE processing facility in my own district was being used to detain people in unacceptable conditions for days on end, I went to see it for myself. And what I saw was completely inappropriate – inhumane for long-term detention. I went on the record with my concerns, yet instead of simply acknowledging the truth, ICE got defensive. Every day we're seeing and hearing of abuses by ICE. Now, with a historic budget, they'll be more embolded than ever. This administration needs aggressive oversight by Congress, but the Republican majority isn’t going to let that happen. **We need to win again, but I need your help.** My criticisms have made me a target. I need your support to keep fighting for accountability and transparency in Washington. clean_body: | = Friends, In case you missed it, ICE had the audacity to put words in my mouth, and I’m not letting it slide. = When I heard that an ICE processing facility in my own district was being used to detain people in unacceptable conditions for days on end, I went to see it for myself. And what I saw was completely inappropriate – inhumane for long-term detention. I went on the record with my concerns, yet instead of simply acknowledging the truth, ICE got defensive. Every day we're seeing and hearing of abuses by ICE. Now, with a historic budget, they'll be more embolded than ever. This administration needs aggressive oversight by Congress, but the Republican majority isn’t going to let that happen. We need to win again, but I need your help. Peter,

When the Trump administration demanded that the Department of Veterans Affairs ban abortion care with no exceptions, _not even for rape or to save the life of the mother_ , Kim called it what it was: **Despicable.**

Our veterans have sacrificed so much to defend our freedoms. They deserve dignity, respect, and the full range of healthcare, _not to be used as test cases for the most extreme abortion ban in the nation._

**That’s why Kim just signed onto the Reproductive Freedom for Veterans Act in the House.** This legislation will guarantee that our veterans can access abortion care, medication, and counseling through the Department of Veterans Affairs and ensure that no political agenda can strip away their rights.

Kim has always been a champion for women’s rights. As a doctor, she knows what’s at stake when politicians interfere with deeply personal medical decisions. She will never stop standing up for women— _and she will never stop fighting for those who’ve worn our nation’s uniform._ Now we need to show Congress the overwhelming public support behind this bill.

**[Will you stand with Kim as she takes action to directly reverse this despicable Trump policy? subject: Back to school
body:
| |

Hi friend, Across our district, families are packing backpacks, sharpening pencils, and getting ready for the first day of school. Our public schools are critical to our communities. They give every child a fair shot at success, help families thrive, and prepare the next generation to lead. But right now, they’re under attack. MAGA extremists are pushing to cut school funding and take needed resources away from our classrooms. I’m fighting every day in Congress to protect and strengthen public schools, making sure no student is too hungry or afraid to learn, supporting our teachers, and making sure students have the resources they need to learn and grow. Because when we invest in education, **we invest in our future.** **[This work doesn’t stop when the school year starts; in fact, it’s just the beginning. clean_body: | | Hi friend, Across our district, families are packing backpacks, sharpening pencils, and getting ready for the first day of school. Our public schools are critical to our communities. They give every child a fair shot at success, help families thrive, and prepare the next generation to lead. But right now, they’re under attack. MAGA extremists are pushing to cut school funding and take needed resources away from our classrooms. I’m fighting every day in Congress to protect and strengthen public schools, making sure no student is too hungry or afraid to learn, supporting our teachers, and making sure students have the resources they need to learn and grow. Because when we invest in education, we invest in our future. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Folks, in a moment, I’m going to make a simple statement.

Since my Republican colleagues can’t find their voices to speak out against the Trump administration, they prove that taking back the Senate for Democrats is the only way we can hold him accountable for his dangerous chaos.

subject: BREAKING: Judge orders Florida to dismantle Alligator Alcatraz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Yet another blow to our AG’s failed leadership. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819189/565036224/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_RR_AlligatorAlcatraz_082225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI2NTVjN2YtOWM3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aj-XPhdVuEaY0dV_h1_yPMxnogo1K2w-wA-SPqNxNdk=&emci=980172a5-8f7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=62655c7f-9c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)

Peter — I hate to say I told you so, but... I told you so. **A federal judge just gave Florida 60 days to clear out Alligator Alcatraz and ordered state officials to stop moving any more migrants there immediately.** This is exactly what I've been saying all along: this reckless, rushed project was illegal from day one. For months, I've been on CNN, MSNBC, and at protests on the ground — doing everything I could to expose this scheme. I warned that this was nothing more than inhumane political theater with no clear legal framework or due process. But did our current Attorney General listen? Of course not. **[This is exactly the kind of corruption I'll root out as Florida's next Attorney General. If you’re with me, will you chip in $15 right now to help me defeat James Uthmeier and restore integrity to the Attorney General's office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819190/565036225/1047671520?refcode=em_JJR_FR_RR_AlligatorAlcatraz_082225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI2NTVjN2YtOWM3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aj-XPhdVuEaY0dV_h1_yPMxnogo1K2w-wA-SPqNxNdk=)** | **[CHIP IN $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819191/565036226/1801001640?amount=15&refcode=em_JJR_FR_RR_AlligatorAlcatraz_082225&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI2NTVjN2YtOWM3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aj-XPhdVuEaY0dV_h1_yPMxnogo1K2w-wA-SPqNxNdk=) **
---
Instead of enforcing the law and upholding it like he's supposed to, James Uthmeier chose to flout it.
Instead of looking out for the best interests of Floridians, he wasted more than $200 million of your hard-earned tax dollars to build the detention center and lock up hundreds of immigrants in cages and tents.
Now the court has ordered that no more detainees be taken to the site, and that the state of Florida immediately begin dismantling it. This is another defeat, for our current Attorney General, and yet another blow to this cruelty and lawlessness.
**[Peter, I've spent my career holding powerful politicians accountable when they think they're above the law, and I'm not about to stop now. But I can't take on this corrupt system alone. Will you chip in a donation of any amount to my campaign today? No amount is too small, thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819192/565036227/1047671520?refcode=em_JJR_FR_RR_AlligatorAlcatraz_082225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI2NTVjN2YtOWM3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aj-XPhdVuEaY0dV_h1_yPMxnogo1K2w-wA-SPqNxNdk=)**

## **Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?**
President Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history. His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees.
But here's the catch:
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP.
The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks.
And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis.
**[We've outlined a wealth protection strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/91ac4c57-f792-4c8f-87b4-4aa0971e3659?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** inside the 2025 Retirement Protection Guide -- and it's completely FREE. Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.
Time is short. Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings.

**The federal government has made a drastic decision, slashing the application period for critical youth homelessness grants from a reasonable 60 to just 14 days. This is an urgent call to action.**

These grants fund transitional living programs, maternity group homes, and basic center programs that provide shelter, safety, and stability for our most vulnerable young people. But with this rushed timeline, many providers — especially in smaller or rural communities — simply won’t have enough time to apply.

_These cuts mean fewer beds, fewer safe places, fewer lifelines_ for kids who have nowhere else to turn.

I led 57 of my colleagues in urging the administration to extend the deadline so providers can meet these requirements and keep their doors open. But advocacy alone isn’t enough. **We need to keep building the pressure and the resources to protect these programs.**

[Can I count on you to chip in $10 today to help us fight for the funding, policies, and protections our youth need?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819393/565036793/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250822_FR_Homelessyouth_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTA4NTczMy05ZDdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=saVDsINpHc5s1hLDrxwAm3f7uP3wcalrzjQmDf00zrI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_

clean_body: | Willis, The federal government has made a drastic decision, slashing the application period for critical youth homelessness grants from a reasonable 60 to just 14 days. This is an urgent call to action. These grants fund transitional living programs, maternity group homes, and basic center programs that provide shelter, safety, and stability for our most vulnerable young people. But with this rushed timeline, many providers — especially in smaller or rural communities — simply won’t have enough time to apply. These cuts mean fewer beds, fewer safe places, fewer lifelines for kids who have nowhere else to turn. I led 57 of my colleagues in urging the administration to extend the deadline so providers can meet these requirements and keep their doors open. But advocacy alone isn’t enough. We need to keep building the pressure and the resources to protect these programs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = = We’re talking about kids. Some of them are fleeing abuse, some are aging out of foster care, and some are facing the streets for the first time. They deserve more than a two-week window to secure their future. Let’s make sure they get it. Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: What I know about special elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand here. **I want to talk to you about special elections.**

I won my first race to the Senate in a special election -- and my victory helped Democrats keep our Senate majority that year. Since then, Democrats have gone on to flip _crucial_ seats through special elections in states like Georgia, Arizona, and even ruby-red Alabama -- _and I’m laser-focused on making sure history repeats itself._

[**We're contesting _two_ special elections in Ohio and Florida next year ‐‐ and these two seats are among a tiny handful that could decide the majority. Will you donate $5 to win races like these and take back the Senate? >> **](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&akid=21054%2E9716520%2EGJD075)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&akid=21054%2E9716520%2EGJD075)
---

Let me be crystal clear: **Special elections give us a HUGE opportunity ‐‐ in multiple ways.**

First, they put crucial seats back on the ballot YEARS before anyone expects. Second, they force Republicans to spread their money thin as they work overtime to defend _even more_ seats than they planned for.

**Put those two pieces together, and we've got a great chance to flip multiple seats and take back the Senate majority --_but only if we act quickly._ **

We've got to make sure we have the strategic resources needed to avoid being _swamped_ by the GOP’s big-money fundraising operation. If we reach tonight's $50,000 fundraising goal, we'll be well on our way to taking back the Senate -- _so please don't delay:_

[**As DSCC Chair, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Democrats win in states like Ohio and Florida and take back the Senate? We have a real opportunity to topple Trump's majority, and we can't let it slip away. >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250822-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandSpecialElectionsFR-ETG-sl1&akid=21054%2E9716520%2EGJD075)

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: David Hogg
subject: Ask me anything. Seriously.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’ll be reading your replies and answering some of your questions.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250822-1&t=1&akid=2562%2E587540%2ET6Qzcq)
Peter,
I want to try something different.
You’ve probably seen those “Ask Me Anything” threads on Reddit — where someone opens the floor to _literally any question_ and answers as many as they can.
Let’s do that. Right here. Right now.
**🔁 Hit reply and ask me anything.**
You can ask about politics, the 2024 election, how we’re choosing which candidates to endorse, my favorite books, the fight to end gun violence, why we’re primarying out-of-touch Democrats, or even what music I’m listening to right now.
Here’s why I’m doing this: **Leaders We Deserve isn’t just a PAC. It’s a community.** And too often in politics, people talk at you instead of with you.
But the truth is, I want to hear from you.
What are you wondering about? What do you want to know? What’s on your mind right now?
Just reply to this email. I’ll be reading through every single message — and responding to as many as I can.
Let’s talk.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250822-1&t=2&refcode2=2562_587540_T6Qzcq&akid=2562%2E587540%2ET6Qzcq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: We need action to end gun violence, and we need it now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I’ve made it my mission in Congress to fight for common-sense reforms | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819869/565037837/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250822_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDMxMjJkOC05ZTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMoboUdF7VBKso6g94o3UQvVwwXC2rMEsf7lETwJ4po=&emci=1ee1dad1-9e7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0d3122d8-9e7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15529135) | Hello, Before you read on, I want to let you know this email contains mentions of gun violence. Addressing the root cause of this violence is why I’m in Congress, and it’s why I understand if you can’t read today’s message.
* * *
Team — Each time our communities are shaken by gun violence, we’re reminded that thoughts and prayers are not enough.**We need action, and we need it now.** I’ve made it my mission in Congress to fight for common-sense reforms:**universal background checks, red flag laws to keep firearms out of dangerous hands, and historic investments in school safety and mental health. ** Recently, I introduced the _School Violence Prevention Act_ to help eliminate the cycles of gun violence in our schools and communities. We can address the root causes of violence, but powerful interests — the gun lobby and their allies — are spending millions to block our progress. This won’t stop me from doing everything in my power to end preventable tragedies. I carry the stories of families in CT-05 who have lost loved ones to preventable tragedies; their pain, and the strength they show, drive me every day. To keep advocating for lifesaving policies and invest in long-term safety, I need your help. **[If you have room in your budget, please chip in to help us amplify the call to reduce harm and make every Connecticut community safer.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113819871/565037838/-1540404253?amount=&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250822_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDMxMjJkOC05ZTdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMoboUdF7VBKso6g94o3UQvVwwXC2rMEsf7lETwJ4po=)** Thank you for everything. In this fight together, Jahana Hayes
---

clean_body: I’ve made it my mission in Congress to fight for common-sense reforms | | Hello, Before you read on, I want to let you know this email contains mentions of gun violence. Addressing the root cause of this violence is why I’m in Congress, and it’s why I understand if you can’t read today’s message. Team — Each time our communities are shaken by gun violence, we’re reminded that thoughts and prayers are not enough.We need action, and we need it now. I’ve made it my mission in Congress to fight for common-sense reforms:universal background checks, red flag laws to keep firearms out of dangerous hands, and historic investments in school safety and mental health. Recently, I introduced the School Violence Prevention Act to help eliminate the cycles of gun violence in our schools and communities. We can address the root causes of violence, but powerful interests — the gun lobby and their allies — are spending millions to block our progress. This won’t stop me from doing everything in my power to end preventable tragedies. I carry the stories of families in CT-05 who have lost loved ones to preventable tragedies; their pain, and the strength they show, drive me every day. To keep advocating for lifesaving policies and invest in long-term safety, I need your help. = Thank you for everything. In this fight together, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Greg Casar
subject: They’re redistricting 10 million people — mostly voters of color
body:
#
Peter,
**10 million Texans.**
That’s how many people will be redistricted under Greg Abbott’s racist and illegal new maps.
**And two-thirds of them? People of color — mostly Black and Latino voters.**
Let that sink in.
The majority of the people whose voices will be silenced by this scheme are the very voters Abbott and Trump are most afraid of. Voters who will decide the outcome of the next election. Voters who should be protected under the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
This isn’t normal redistricting.
They’re moving 10 million people to new districts _in the middle of the decade._ And in the process, they’re making sure there’s no Latino opportunity districts in Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston, or the Austin areas — in a state where _the largest racial group is Latino._
If it wasn’t clear before, it is now: These maps are racially gerrymandered — plain and simple. And it’s one of the most dangerous attacks on democracy we’ve ever seen in Texas.
They’re not just redrawing lines. They’re trying to erase our communities. To silence our voices. And to hand Texas over to Donald Trump.
But we’re not backing down. And I’m fighting back.
I’m organizing. I’m traveling across the state. I’m meeting voters where they are. And I’m fighting like hell to stop these maps from ever going into effect.
But this fight takes real resources. And since I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power this movement.
**[Can you chip in $5 between Justice Democrats and my campaign today to help us fight back against Abbott, Trump, and these racist maps?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250822-gc?refcode=em20250822-36952&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36952_1203867_i8mW4X&akid=36952%2E1203867%2Ei8mW4X)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250822-gc?refcode=em20250822-36952&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36952_1203867_i8mW4X&akid=36952%2E1203867%2Ei8mW4X)**
This fight is about more than 5 seats in Congress. It’s about who gets to have a voice in our democracy and who doesn’t. We can’t let 10 million Texans lose theirs.
In solidarity,
Greg Casar

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250822-36952-footer&t=2&refcode2=36952_1203867_i8mW4X&akid=36952%2E1203867%2Ei8mW4X)**

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: Don’t tune out. Lock in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
The Election Rigging Response Act is officially on the ballot and we need your help talking to voters...

Last night, more than 14,000 people joined Governor Newsom’s livestream after he signed legislation to place Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act, on the ballot.
**[Here’s a link to the livestream if you missed it.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4500?t=1&akid=2490%2E4767699%2EjJJ8It)**
So what does the Election Rigging Response Act do and how do we win?
It's a simple, temporary, voter-approved way to keep our maps fair in the face of partisan power grabs. Unlike Trump’s backroom deals approach, it puts the choice in California voters’ hands this November.
And the path to victory is the one we have walked before: conversations with voters. Neighbor to neighbor. Friend to friend. Text and phone call conversations.
**[That work starts now. We need your help reaching out to voters. Sign up to volunteer today.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra?source=em250822-2&akid=2490%2E4767699%2EjJJ8It)**
Vote-by-mail ballots begin going out in early October -- that’s roughly six weeks from now. Every single minute that passes is critical for our ability to win.
This election will not be easy. Just this week, Trump said he is ready to take us on, and has already pledged $100M to oppose our initiative.
What they don’t know is we have a secret weapon: a people-driven campaign. More than 12,000 people have raised their hand to stand up and fight. **Join them.**
[SIGN UP NOW](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra?source=em250822-2&akid=2490%2E4767699%2EjJJ8It)
There’s a role for everyone in this fight. We’ll train you, provide ongoing support, and set you up with peer outreach, knocking on doors, texting, or calling -- whatever you are able to do.
After you sign up, you’ll be redirected to a virtual guide with resources to get started. An organizer will also reach out to help you along the way.
We’re on the frontlines, fighting for our democracy. We can win if you’re standing with us.
Team Newsom
[SIGN UP NOW](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/volunteer-erra?source=em250822-2&akid=2490%2E4767699%2EjJJ8It)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2490%2E4767699%2EjJJ8It).
Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: Newsom for California – Governor 2022, House Majority PAC, Bill Bloomfield.

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Hoosiers to Gather at Statehouse Tuesday for Large Anti-Gerrymandering Rally. You’re Invited. Join fellow Hoosiers this Tuesday for a large rally at the Statehouse against the Republicans’ attempt to cheat and steal the 2026 midterm elections. Sign up for the latest updates for the event While Indiana Republicans gather at the White House to hear pleas from President Donald Trump, Hoosiers will gather to tell them loud and clear that we OPPOSE any attempts to re-draw the maps early. Let’s be LOUD, Hoosiers! Hundreds Gather at 144th Annual IDEA Conference in French Lick Last weekend, hundreds of Hoosier Democrats came from all across Indiana to gather in French Lick for a weekend of fellowship, policymaking, and to recharge before the important midterm elections in 2026. State Rep. Ed DeLaney, Fort Wayne Mayor Sharon Tucker, and Charlestown Mayor Treva Hodges led the panel for Saturday’s Mayor’s Breakfast. They talked about the positive changes they are seeing in their communities, and the importance of Democratic leadership. We look forward to seeing you on the porch next year! Braun’s Dark Money Group Selling Policy Roundtable Spots to the Highest Bidder Ahead of Conference at Luxury Indianapolis Hotel Governor Mike Braun’s dark money policy group HOPE is holding a conference next week in downtown Indianapolis where seats at their roundtable are being sold for as much as $100,000. Regular Hoosiers should be at the table, not just those who can cough up six figures for a one-day event. 21 years of one-party control in Indiana has turned the Indiana Republican Party into a full time bribery racket. Here’s the bottom line: while we don’t have their billionaires, we do have you. = Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Next Wednesday, August 27, U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan is holding two community conversations in Portage and Highland to meet with Hoosiers and hear their concerns on the economy, labor, gerrymandering and more. Here is the full schedule: 2:30 p.m. - 3:30 p.m. – Woodland Park Community Center - Sycamore Hall, 2100 Willowcreek Road, Portage, IN 46368 5:00 p.m. - 6:00 p.m. – Lincoln Community Center, 2450 Lincoln Street, Highland, IN 46322 Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. IDOE – The Indiana Department of Education is taking its first round of feedback on a plan to reassign A-F ratings to all Indiana schools. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, August 26th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Maximizing Volunteer Capacity During GOTV. INDems IN the News WFYI: IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Capital Chronicle: ### [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: , I'm writing to you today as a big supporter of Winsome Earle-Sears. As the current Lt. Governor of Virginia, Winsome 's story has already inspired kids of all races from all backgrounds. But now, her race for Governor is TIED, and she urgently needs our help to take the lead. As a conservative Christian, I know that Winsome shares our values and will fight tirelessly to protect our families and our freedoms. But despite her impressive record, she's getting outraised MASSIVELY on the fundraising front by her liberal opponent. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Winsome today. We're not just fighting for bragging rights - we're on a mission to lift families up and create a better future for our kids. But we can't do it without your help. Winsome is up against a MAJOR deadline, and she needs your urgent support to stay competitive. opponent is doubling her fundraising numbers thanks to wealthy megadonors like George Soros. If we don't act now, we risk losing the fight for the values that make our country great. But with your help, I know we can make a difference and elect a true conservative champion like Winsome Earle-Sears. Sincerely,. Sarah Huckabee Sanders . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. # JOIN US THIS WEEKEND
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,
It’s getting real... only **FIVE DAYS LEFT until ballots drop** for the Special General Election on **TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 23RD** — and we need _**you**_**** for our future, _para nuestro pueblo_.
This weekend, we have **two critical canvassing opportunities** that will make a real difference for our community, for your future, for _you_. But we can’t do it without you. That means stepping up, having powerful conversations — at the doors or on the phones — and making sure our voices are heard.
There’s _so much at stake_ , and so little time.
Join us. Bring a friend. Be part of the movement.We need **you.**
---
| | **Here’s what’s happening this week:**[**Watch Last Night’s Debate Here:**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=950d52e3ca&e=f7c3700ccb)**🌟🌵💪**
**Canvassing Door to Door!** We have our **Tucson** canvass**Tomorrow**! 🍎📝 **Yuma **Meet n Greet **Tomorrow! 💪✨****&****Sunday,** we have our Carpool Canvass in **Nogales** _🚙_
**Keep your eyes open for next week 👀**[**Sign up: ☎️ Phone bank:**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=0f35f7ce24&e=f7c3700ccb) Sign up for more details!🤩 ****[****](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=822e2c0e8c&e=f7c3700ccb)

[Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=e25b934073&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=400c59e20f&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=d881807df7&e=f7c3700ccb).

If you have any questions or need anything from our team, we’re here to support you. Reach out anytime at **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
So—will you be joining us? 👊🏽
Let’s keep learning, growing, and building—together.
**Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: When politicians cater to wealthy donors, the rest of us get left behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is what’s wrong with our political system
#
**Did you know that this year, the maximum amount an individual can donate to a federal political campaign increased to $7,000 per cycle?**
This is what’s wrong with our political system. _When politicians cater to wealthy donors, the rest of us get left behind._
That’s how we end up with broken policies that help billionaires while working families and seniors struggle to afford housing and healthcare.
**Our campaign is different.**
We don’t answer to billionaires and corporate lobbyists — because the people powering my work inside and outside of Congress are everyday folks pitching in what they can, when they can.
**Our average donation of just $24 to emails just like this one is proof of that.** It would take about **292 people** chipping in that amount to match a single max-out check.
And here’s the thing: **I’d rather be accountable to 292 grassroots supporters than one rich lobbyist.** But it also means I rely on this grassroots movement to compete with the big money flooding our political system.
[**So if you’re with me, will you chip in $24 — or whatever feels right — to help me keep up the fight for you in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250822-1?refcode=em20250822-2283&amount=24&refcode2=2283_21716_iXAzNP&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)
**[Donate $24 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250822-1?amount=24&refcode=em20250822-2283&refcode2=2283_21716_iXAzNP&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)**
Whether you’re able to contribute today or not, thank you for being part of our movement. It means the world to have you on this team.
—Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250822-1&t=1&refcode2=2283_21716_iXAzNP&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2283%2E21716%2EiXAzNP)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/JU2Dl1AbWw7F6nnaejQVeX0BRPK9kJgghE62a9G_82cdpV7YqWmlsL0QxsDsUKlgyCjo48cj5y6radikYs445GY0YlDC8cmi8GOJxTclWVY0eP5I-dMFP7AL_LLAaprk3Gnkk10cIuKtR7DBKwUDmxcJ-6dlhHmw4bBTi9QfatMgidZ_Qep0w80R/-7z3MFGM13Prfv25LjR5BmshzNRkaL2-/12)_
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/3RjQkBSv_fYawQrQ7V7DiYxEgFU_TUdEUlO6ROo7olkhTnKTiG3FpfjM4JqznWLPVQX5YgSeDBvKz5kNLTHBPNSZJLadtqpBsMxd27Qyu8qmB06FWH-moohkVvAfgv0d_2OUv9mcHQvjsy6VXG9mh0yFHx4fnw1tm9xEqymrjHkd3D6RBIqcjbiH6Fii1sNKQcvihZFIyWJiEJNV3nfOE3GAUJVRPPDTqSWhstju_hNtvOSfhDWHTvpKTHp4MNNMCp5aWx43YPYPFRsOC892pEqvJJVG0UFzPVspKFYL-vJpks5aC9nAMj1LlQcgseMHWMbgHdF2aBzQ0Gg9iGJ8Lhkfo2FoAGyt-OMxoT4N2c-euXk0lzLII9lk0WJrNPrFrq4h__DCipIvWvFB3grLyk0vmag2fjtyBNwStXSvJ-b6Laar97QzQ3uPdkcZ0-Rds6xCD4LH3O48MgtFUI4vjrTGKzy7C0eG8kGGEzqynPDO_ODKPe1lCTQiQH81QkXPhHyoUprC4yP1VlvORfEU-4tsjAPc-zBqkQvJQwJh0NqhkCKVMPYHcksuX5fGUflRxjyMOHcFexqt5HMaynkFDxoUw7zgwtmj7tQFIJohqTYmMtgvBndNYGrn3WcymPPjZn9yEd4JeglER4Y17JfObj1S4nN57LUyVTLhltsB_t8pH0YkkGRrSOwvmv9-t_9Uvz6nDIm8F5pIhNMc0BdKEzyLDxU5WMIqwA/tvkWsgTeBTeEDVtHwjqQDwMUGKJhh-AC/12)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/2OkCgn83NSCP9ROwhUkKdvUV8ybW8_sEAh0TtamvalAaAj5W6CgqrctKxKPy4_I0rIWnUJY9qtWoS20t-tRgd2FG1-_lhX2LkMT6-YiR9JeS5_euVl3bCg_aWEVwMopsOK18ol7yAVg5hJw4OQDjnaSOVKVBgGEYpSTXWO7y_qna1RJWOXoq4qc4CnRm497O7r7QhmX-dWfrTUvjfmRPPobcRMZjq-XZqiaBX6qw2HKOKdRd9QiJMrdHRJvxZ_lK4e5G6ujVLfeQ4WIV9QbHkUCmmMR4BuNlfT5FKw0zWnh5t8qu98uFB0-Wn-syAP5a8JHGsoqSp014Iv8ATJW3wc-E3lQ6ljT5X-T6-fvoAdTcMOXacaZEZkEXUEgFsX6YIBdfUubu0J_KFJhHq1RWf91jfRFM8seuQWJzK6d04n7udop0kjydAAUjtnKBgBdqrYI0Cj7wc37QOEoAcwXISu3zRJgjq488H9VIT9mg7_883xhOKL5h5Swz7A4vlyMhBjDeEUCQ8KkLZwQbXAgj99Jxk2WYX41ib0iAKb8gWJGwgRzOKw7aJGSi5yn7ljF8yVbGOCpSFKNCQ-5mx-LNeD6ncwE9bliFxme-dyPffayiiD016ecByqUTgnCVUaW_1iBBBRXQf3z8P6n0a0TlXidk4lywaxCSenxakjDqUcCOLRBoisnZsyjW6LyY4xRoi4nREjPlZQCI97Z44CjoOd30Z1hqQzngOQ/O7gUhqRaAx8TYY1z6MKU3lx1osg7XM3Z/12) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/Oy97UZF8-BXYkB8TWim8l63D9hdgTnfLySPcvxMFhyWi98rhzrU1he0IizVB4JId83HkxRwEHLNj0BXmwkITFcEajtGjxN2ghTKcSanm0rPNpdYbaAp85Jvopha3tdn-aXrLgVo0f7pQkkCuZ_bejhcQpp-sXkYYogyB5f1MrdLUK1QsJs3KuBPTNIZ6FT5RH2iRrtZj9KV0TMq6kTceghBqoQFzDW41ID6VBQa46dnstXBt5TervH2YjT2b12QzxfxSN6b0ZaztFa8lS04XlEDinm7I8JZhj_Iu3LD58wchyCJCO0JTfrs0QHH-Gh6VlU5KZnWPH3Hx1IGbOisVt9NpgHCBb1KI32YFuarLphOU36c5zq98G_TTdrRt9f4yj5BGYDtap39U5LQGeUrYTN8ZVo--c3cse9SYDcl8_CN69cvqX8F-fm7-PQOnQI43MRgWeiSkHmcCpmHLoBMB58GqKX4qOqJ09ZFksf6Z6qb7pOTYP51YMWvldb9bJubgydAwjcUMlHOiGIw_xOiIGilj9FNwFZKuxiSz5nFcODQ2nfXiPgozTSEN6Gh3pG6mk7AGeNNwBGLgeUhqQ-n5dBQ4MLhqYNAXBE6xvK95dzlVQAJSvOtk5qECidocDfxdXE3v6Yp5061EnNQBef22eIfrvCAWyoUWjVVQHuEGpl3MlyiSwk_A9cUbT8qF9JmQmMVMH10k4pRaXSAh5G6tCQ6jAx0gQPLiww/IK-0-GsjOj3J8ck7PSf8zyFNuQ4LxLmG/12) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Will you answer the call?
body:

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Disbar Trump Attorney General and ban her for life from practicing law
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Disbar Bondi and ban her for life from practicing law](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6e5d995-2c1c-4ae4-8240-dce1382bda5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3032ed1-8f46-4bde-9f2f-0603013b0b28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Pam Bondi may well be the worst and most dangerous attorney general in our nation's history. [**And she needs to be disbarred NOW, and banned for life from practicing law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45df4b52-3167-491c-94ad-e6f801cbca51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) She thrown away any concept of actual justice, and instead has weaponized DOJ to go after Trump's political opponents. She has repeatedly lied (the Epstein list was "on her desk" and then suddenly didn't exist), ignored criminal behavior from political allies (including from Trump himself), and essentially thrown away the law and the Constitution. **Enough. It's time to fire her, disbar her, and make sure she never practices law again.** [**Add your name: Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te99681ce-a2d6-43b4-bd78-a596a5c878f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93cfd3d0-7e79-4070-818a-bb5a28b99e54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57f6e968-238a-4188-be3c-16173afbcac5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75692f23-c40a-4837-a86f-e47e5573502e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdde0fc01-b802-436d-b977-31c5c5b66527/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction) | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=LeftAction) | [](https://www.instagram.com/left_action/)

Washington, District of Columbia

PRES. TRUMP HAS ACKNOWLEDGED I’M IN THE LEAD IN SOUTH CAROLINA.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Now, it’s official. This race is CRITICAL_—AND COULD DETERMINE THE
GOP’S ENTIRE FUTURE._

I’m going to work my a** off to secure Pres. Trump’s endorsement.

BUT FIRST, I NEED TO SHOW HIM UNDENIABLE PROOF THAT THE GRASSROOTS ARE
BEHIND ME.

_THE NEXT 24 HOURS COULD MAKE OR BREAK MY CAMPAIGN._

PATRIOT, WILL YOU HELP ME EARN PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ENDORSEMENT BY
CHIPPING IN $1 TO MY CAMPAIGN?
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

CHIP IN TO HELP EARN TRUMP'S ENDORSEMENT
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

A buck might not seem like a lot, but I don’t need some
million-dollar check to win this thing.

_WHEN TENS OF THOUSANDS OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU CHIP IN, THERE ISN’T A
POLITICAL FORCE IN THE NATION THAT CAN BRING US DOWN. THAT’S A
FACT._

_ _

But without Trump’s endorsement, I’ll be fighting an UPHILL
battle.

Remember, we’re taking hits from the RADICAL LEFT AND THE
ESTABLISHMENT RINOS.

_YOUR $1 COULD BE THE DECIDING FACTOR IN THIS RACE._
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Rush $1 NOW to send an overwhelming message:

ENDORSE NANCY MACE!
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Let’s HOLD THE LINE and make history together
:ARROW_DOWN::ARROW_DOWN:

— NANCY MACE

STAND WITH NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

$25
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=25]

$50
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=50]

$100
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=100]

OTHER AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8827-w-eml-trumps-eyes-on-sc?utm_campaign=034000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838383237&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

HIGH SCHOOL DROPOUT. WAFFLE HOUSE WAITRESS. FIRST WOMAN TO GRADUATE
FROM THE CITADEL. SINGLE MOM. FIGHTER.

NANCY MACE WASN’T BORN INTO POWER. SHE WORKED FOR EVERY INCH OF
GROUND SHE’S GAINED.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash
browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League
connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

BY THE GRACE OF GOD, SHE TURNED THAT STRUGGLE INTO A STORY NO
POLITICIAN CAN TOUCH. She made history as the first woman to graduate
from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She
built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the
Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.

Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire
and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President
Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our
daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

SHE’S NOT HERE TO MAKE FRIENDS. SHE’S HERE TO MAKE HISTORY.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the
Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to
do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and
lead from the front.

SOUTH CAROLINA IS WORTH FIGHTING FOR. AND NANCY MACE IS JUST GETTING
STARTED.

PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186

Charleston, SC 29492

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=312694&trkid=861998282&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jon Husted
subject: Trump-Endorsed. Born in a Foster Home. Fighting for Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Trump-Endorsed. Born in a Foster Home. Fighting for Ohio. |
Fellow American,

**[I'm Jon Husted, and I'm running for U.S. Senate to fight for Ohio's hardworking families and defend the values that built this country.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3629b0be4592489c9d7f5370e6f09803&_e=nwKq5ZmN5TmCQ15F-rIl6SrQk65mhccJMiOodcgDBLVC3r7Vy-usrpPI91gpixGP3OWHfLBCCtEx34Ts9Xcuutlfuso2Yivk1Z77d9nBFc4UoUrLMTO9w5WM7ZXzsW-3sXxw-WrIpds2dICRk3Bsvx9HGWFmpP8mCmmFEpYyr55f-7b-3_7_VsCc9bV6DEyNINe85OfMwornlXSyIJkwRZ4ySi9jeIpj-4QepFRXZ-3_E6YFV-JWMENGsxI2vOf15-s12hAWQyE1sfpjqr3FZGoK20sjG-49Nc5ZrDpDLbnz7-ntQGm_H4ojrPEZzGoR0CXVLL3_yViHm_Zz71VeBfrMjdgGs5Gcmp6PvGuqmw7SKzaeHzoY9-ovEIxkuzQSkhOeD4uk03NCCOh7Hiuz91f6NrYPzukpmfHtRt1jWaGXQMTr1JuSV0HXeyEn15-NAiIlkBrPbLiiItXG6iwJe-btjqIf8U48N4oAGyQ5lo-Zm8XPzGMq2QOn1CHlJf7gQ_VIhZSFl9lL48BT1Vii6BjGLluM3iKjOdcTGs5CJKdjsWa8pn-bLCiMBAw6v5bJQiOlVtMX4P5PUhHxdDnSd9oMPfjgZZvA92Q7fGrVdMb_pRvDz8D75GgUZF92FMYArZfNWICEx6vkaZSX6nkw8Ky6Yz1jTQk5OwIhhI_9gbECWn-zs-fdCTlqPBaBCRGnqa4ExiKZFowZzzAbVv3QvhRjVVvFQhXIVyjbnlubbvIuRUqKF_1BasWcwWkrSJstPRjRD9YiX2klGZpoQZgAQri2Fs_QBKsBRHh_noAg9yf-DpQ5_sr9Uy2XcX0XYHM367lUf2LRIrR5lJjXo3TcWH2nrBTEKUFF2E6BjmHk64hvlETibU5YuYsKQIlFGiNIC4otltwgjwbicy_zBvVASvY0EFjFHAMmmY5xYSiBc-wjFWPqb2QnJ7BabKxTWrS9)**

My journey began in a foster home, where I was raised by faith and determination to seize every opportunity that America offers. Growing up, I learned the value of hard work on the football field at the University of Dayton, where we won a National Championship. _Those lessons of grit and perseverance have driven me every day in public service._

clean_body: Trump-Endorsed. Born in a Foster Home. Fighting for Ohio. | Fellow American, My journey began in a foster home, where I was raised by faith and determination to seize every opportunity that America offers. Growing up, I learned the value of hard work on the football field at the University of Dayton, where we won a National Championship. Those lessons of grit and perseverance have driven me every day in public service. I've served Ohio as Secretary of State and Lieutenant Governor, fighting for election integrity, job creation, and protecting our freedoms. Now, I'm stepping up to fill the Senate seat opened by President Trump and J.D. Vance's victory-a seat that's critical to Ohio's future. But Sherrod Brown wants to keep his grip on Washington and push his that's been Ohio families for years. Brown supports open borders, sky-high taxes, and reckless spending that's driving inflation and killing jobs. He's been part of the problem in Washington, siding with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer instead of hardworking Americans like you and me. President Trump has entrusted me to lead this fight and hold this seat for Republicans. We need patriots like you to stand with me now. Your donation sends a clear message: Ohio is not Washington D.C.– and we're going to it that way. Together, we will defeat Sherrod Brown's radical agenda and protect the future of our families, our freedoms, and our state. For Ohio and America, Jon Husted Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Endorsed by President Donald J. subject: Taking a wrecking ball to Oregon’s public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
I’m demanding answers.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821450/565041962/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTdlYTEwYi1hNDdmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BASVAPyZCS2lR5EswNpg9_z2MW46X-7G8bDChWkyTPw=&emci=6b19ec04-a17f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d57ea10b-a47f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9818364)

| | It's that time of year when families across Oregon are getting ready to send their kids back to school. And the Trump administration is determined to make this school year harder on everyone. The Department of Education is withholding BILLIONS of already-appropriated money for public education,**including nearly $75 million for Oregon.** This is taxpayer money that:
1. _Has already been passed by Congress_
2. Oregon's school districts were supposed to receive by _July 1_.

This means Oregon schools will have to make hard choices. Parents in our state could see cuts to afterschool programs, specialized literacy programs, educator training, or support for English-language learners. **I'm fighting to get the money our students and teachers are owed.** I recently joined a coalition of Oregon representatives to demand answers from the Trump administration about these cuts and the consequences. **We will continue to push for them to follow the law.** While the Trump administration doles out tax breaks and handouts to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations, families are left holding the bag. Trump will leave entire generations of Oregonians worse off as long as he can help his rich friends get richer. Meanwhile, Trump's tariffs are driving up the cost of back-to-school necessities in addition to food and gas at a time when families are already having to make tough economic choices. The academic year is fast approaching. It's time we _all_ took a stand for our schools, so _all_ students can be supported and successful in their education. And that's just what I'm doing. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump’s tax bill is gutting our future
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250822-1489-foote&t=1001&akid=1489%2E342411%2E8UqegN ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Trump’s tax and spending bill, which passed just last month, is nothing
short of a disaster for working families — stripping away essential
benefits from millions of people while handing massive tax breaks to the
ultra-wealthy.

Here’s a breakdown at a glance:

* 10 million people will be uninsured over the next decade;
* Low-income families could lose about $1,200 per year, while the
richest stand to gain over $13,000 annually.^1
* 2.4 million SNAP recipients will be cut off from food assistance.^2

These aren’t just numbers — they’re families losing health care, children
going hungry, and seniors being punished.

And all of it, so the wealthy can get richer.

But we’re not taking this sitting down. The Squad is standing up and
speaking out against the Trump administration’s authoritarian tactics.

Our movement doesn’t take corporate PAC money. We don’t answer to CEOs or
lobbyists. We’re powered entirely by people like you — and that’s why your
support matters more than ever.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250822-movement.anPFMh&refcode=em20250822-1489&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1489%2E342411%2E8UqegN ]Will you chip in $3 — or whatever you can — to help us
fight back and build a democracy that works for all, not just a select
few?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250822-movement.anPFMh&refcode=em20250822-1489&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1489%2E342411%2E8UqegN ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Trump’s tax and spending bill, which passed just last month, is nothing short of a disaster for working families — stripping away essential benefits from millions of people while handing massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. Here’s a breakdown at a glance: 10 million people will be uninsured over the next decade; Low-income families could lose about $1,200 per year, while the richest stand to gain over $13,000 annually.^1 * 2.4 million SNAP recipients will be cut off from food assistance.^2 These aren’t just numbers — they’re families losing health care, children going hungry, and seniors being punished. And all of it, so the wealthy can get richer. But we’re not taking this sitting down. The Squad is standing up and speaking out against the Trump administration’s authoritarian tactics. Our movement doesn’t take corporate PAC money. We don’t answer to CEOs or lobbyists. We’re powered entirely by people like you — and that’s why your support matters more than ever. [ ]Will you chip in $3 — or whatever you can — to help us fight back and build a democracy that works for all, not just a select few? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund 1 - [ ]Reuters 2 - [ ]The Guardian

name: Team AOC
subject: Quick poll:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Do you agree with Alexandria that Members of Congress must be banned from trading stocks?
#
We have somehow conditioned ourselves to believe that it is normal for members of Congress — **who swore an oath to the people** — to day-trade individual stocks and make millions with sensitive information.
How can anyone possibly make an objective vote on health care, energy, or war when their personal money is tied up in pharmaceutical companies, oil companies, or defense companies' stocks?
It’s not possible. That’s why Alexandria believes that **the time is long overdue to ban insider trading in Congress.**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/stocks-poll/?source=em20250822-9601-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9601%2E2526796%2EyuT4JG)
Regardless of political party, members of Congress holding and trading individual stock is wrong. It is corrosive, it is destructive, and Alexandria believes it must be banned.
[Do you agree with Alexandria that Members of Congress must be banned from trading individual stocks? Please let us know by taking our quick poll.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/stocks-poll/?source=em20250822-9601-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9601%2E2526796%2EyuT4JG)

Thank you for standing with us,
Team AOC

name: ALERT FROM TRUMP
subject: Personal letter from President Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
After the ruling in New York, I wanted to send you a personal note...
| | | | [](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
After the ruling in New York, I wanted to send you a personal note:
When Democrats began their first WITCH HUNT against me, you could’ve given up on me.
When they raided my home and TOOK MY MUGSHOT, you could’ve abandoned me.
**_BUT YOU NEVER DID! WHEN THE SWAMP COMES AT ME THE HARDEST, I KNOW IT ONLY STRENGTHENS YOUR RESOLVE!_**
From the bottom of my heart, I want to say **THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU!**
Only with **YOUR SUPPORT** , we won the Presidential Election!
Only with **YOUR SUPPORT ,** we’ve defeated case after case after case!
And only with **YOUR SUPPORT ,** will we MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
True MAGA Patriots like you are the only reason I’m still standing.
I’ve just got one thing to say:
**_I’LL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU!_**
So at this historic moment, I’m asking you to show the WHOLE WORLD that the MAGA movement is STRONG AND POWERFUL.
**_[Before the day ends, I’m asking EVERY SINGLE ONE of my supporters to chip in and say, I’LL NEVER ABANDON PRESIDENT TRUMP!>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
[I’LL NEVER ABANDON TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Remember, it’s only because of YOUR SUPPORT & LOVE that I’ve gotten this far.
If we’re going to DEFEAT the corrupt forces who HATE this country and who HATE me and you, I need you to respond with an UNPRECEDENTED TRUMP BLITZ!
**_[Please chip in today>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
I know with you by my side, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,
President Trump

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)

name: Pam Harder
subject: Our big annual family reunion
body:
Lillian and Karina can't wait for the BBQ! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821592/565042374/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) | Hi Peter, it’s Pam! I’m excited to see many of you at our annual Harder Friends & Family BBQ this weekend! Josh and I will be there with our girls, Lillian and Karina — and if you’ve been before, you know they’ll be running around, saying hi to everyone, and making new friends all day long. (That’s me trying to keep up with Lillian who wanted to be the star of the show while Hakeem Jeffries was speaking last year ⬇️) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821593/565042375/-1623235363?&refcode=E14855-20250825-PamBBQ-Image-Event&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=)** For us, this BBQ always feels like a great big family reunion surrounded by friends, neighbors, and the volunteers who make this campaign possible. It’s a day full of energy, laughter, and community. **But here’s the thing: pulling off an event with hundreds of people takes a lot. As we speak, Josh’s team is hustling to get everything ready — from food to tables to signs — and they could really use a hand.** [_**If you can chip in $5, $25, or whatever feels right, it would mean so much to help us make this our best BBQ yet.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821594/565042376/-1623235363?&refcode=E14855-20250825-PamBBQ-SL-Event&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) [Donate to the BBQ Fund »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821595/565042377/-1623235363?&refcode=E14855-20250825-PamBBQ-SB-Event&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) Thank you for being part of our extended family! We appreciate your support. – Pam
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821596/565042378/1618730853?refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821597/565042379/-1860252395?refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113821598/565042380/1618730853?refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1MDhhMTItYTU3Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3WYqbpXGuJa8RODheDA2ujn5WCJHeQK2xpSFFrbnpk=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand.
